These findings demonstrate that explanation stability is an emergent property of the model method pair rather than an intrinsic characteristic of the model alone. We therefore argue that explanation based claims should be validated across multiple attribution methods and that regulatory submissions should explicitly specify the attribution operators used to avoid creating illusory safety assurances.

</details>


### [67] [DORS: Dynamic Attention Routing for Diffusion-based Object Removal in Dense Scenes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16656)
*Haitong Tang,Haipeng Liu,Yang Wang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出DORS框架，通过动态注意力路由机制解决密集场景中对象移除时因语义干扰导致的不完整移除问题。引入实例过滤注意力（IFA）和上下文引导路由（CGR），有效抑制相似实例的误导信息，并保持视觉一致性。构建DOR-Bench基准测试，验证方法在减少遗漏与重复伪影方面的优越性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法在密集场景中依赖周围区域的上下文信息进行对象移除，但当周围存在与目标对象视觉相似的实例时，会导致语义干扰，引发不完整的移除结果，主要源于自注意力机制中的错误信息传播。

Method: 提出基于扩散模型的DORS框架，包含两个互补组件：实例过滤注意力（IFA），通过动态构建掩码引导的注意力约束抑制相似实例的误导信息；上下文引导路由（CGR），动态路由互补场景信息以维持视觉一致性。

Result: 在密集场景下的对象移除任务中，DORS显著优于现有最先进方法，尤其在减少不完整移除和重复伪影方面表现突出。实验验证了其有效性与鲁棒性。

Conclusion: DORS通过动态注意力路由机制有效缓解了密集场景中因语义干扰导致的对象移除失败问题，为复杂场景下的图像编辑提供了更可靠的解决方案。

Abstract: Object removal aims to eliminate target objects specified by a mask while preserving visual consistency with the surrounding regions. Existing methods typically rely on contextual information from surrounding regions. However, in dense scenes where the surrounding regions contain instances visually similar to the removal target, such reliance often leads to semantic interference, resulting in incomplete removal. This problem arises from erroneous information propagation in the attention space, where masked queries tend to align with such instances due to global similarity matching in self-attention. To address this challenge, we propose a Diffusion-based Object Removal framework for dense Scenes, dubbed DORS, built upon a Dynamic Attention Routing mechanism comprising two complementary components: Instance-Filtered Attention (IFA), which suppresses misleading semantic information from similar instances through dynamically constructed mask-guided attention constraints, and Context-Guided Routing (CGR), which dynamically routes complementary scene information to maintain visual consistency. We further introduce DOR-Bench, a benchmark tailored for object removal in dense scenes. Extensive experiments demonstrate that DORS outperforms state-of-the-art methods, particularly in reducing incomplete removal and duplicate artifacts. The code will be available at https://github.com/httang1224/DORS.

</details>


### [68] [Foundation-Assisted Active Learning for Object Detection Annotation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16671)
*Jinchang Zhang,Arnold Zumbrun,Jing Lin,Guoyu Lu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出一种基于基础模型协作的主动学习与半自动标注框架，通过双源机制（参考定位源SA-source与检测器预测源OD-source）和增强的不确定性估计，提升遥感目标检测数据集构建效率。引入基于DINOv2与SAM2的对象级多样性采样以抑制伪多样性，并设计双源框切换策略减少几何噪声，显著提升冷启动阶段样本效率，在低标注预算下表现优异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 遥感目标检测标注成本高，现有主动学习方法在目标检测场景中面临定位与分类不确定性耦合、冷启动阶段定位噪声严重以及高召回候选框导致的伪多样性等问题。

Method: 构建基于UPN+SAM2的参考定位源（SA-source）与检测器预测源（OD-source）的双源机制；提出基础模型增强的双源不确定性估计，联合建模定位一致性与分类置信度；设计基于DINOv2特征与SAM2掩码的对象级多样性采样；引入双源框切换策略，用更精确的SA-source框替代噪声检测框。

Result: 在DIOR、HRSC2016、DOTAv2和FAIR1M数据集上，该方法在多数标注预算下表现优于或相当，尤其在低预算条件下展现出更强的冷启动样本效率。

Conclusion: 所提框架有效提升了遥感目标检测数据集构建的效率与质量，特别是在标注资源有限的情况下，具备显著优势。

Abstract: The annotation cost for remote sensing object detection is high, while existing active learning methods still face several challenges in object detection scenarios, including the coupling of localization and classification uncertainty, severe localization noise in the cold-start stage, and pseudo-diversity caused by high-recall candidate proposals. To address these issues, we propose a foundation-model-collaborative active learning and semi-automatic annotation framework for efficient construction of remote sensing object detection datasets. We build a dual-source mechanism consisting of a reference localization source (SA-source) based on UPN+SAM2 and a detector prediction source (OD-source), and further propose a Foundation-model-enhanced Dual-Source Uncertainty estimation to improve sample selection quality in the cold-start stage by jointly modeling localization consistency and classification confidence. Furthermore, we propose Object-Centric Diversity Sampling, which constructs object-level representations using DINOv2 features and SAM2 masks to improve sample coverage while suppressing pseudo-diversity. To address geometric noise in the semi-automatic annotation stage, we design Dual-Source Box Switching, which replaces noisy detector boxes with matched refined boxes from the SA-source, thereby reducing the manual burden of box refinement. Experiments on DIOR, HRSC2016, DOTAv2, and FAIR1M show that our method achieves superior or comparable results under most annotation budgets, with notably stronger cold-start sample efficiency in the low-budget regime.

</details>


### [69] [OFD-Net: Teacher-Free Reliable Semi-supervised Medical Image Segmentation with Orthogonal Feature Disentanglement Net of Foreground-Background](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16705)
*Shao-feng Jiang,Zhe-yang Jing,Qin Lu,Huan-huan Shi,Zhen Chen,Cong-xuan zhang,Chen Yi*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出OFD-Net，一种无需教师网络的单网络框架，通过正交特征解耦模块（OFDM）分离前景与背景表示，提升半监督医学图像分割中伪标签的可靠性，减少错误累积和确认偏差。结合解耦引导模块（DGM）与可靠性感知伪标签学习机制，实现更清晰的前景预测和更鲁棒的训练。在ISIC-2016、Kvasir-SEG、Synapse、ACDC四个公开数据集上验证了其有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有半监督学习方法依赖教师-学生框架或跨网络一致性生成伪标签，但缺乏对伪标签质量的显式结构参考，导致在外观变化大的未标注数据中易产生低质量伪标签，引发训练不可靠、错误累积和确认偏差问题。

Method: 提出OFD-Net，引入正交特征解耦模块（OFDM）将未标注数据解耦为前景与背景特征表示，利用解耦引导模块（DGM）通过可变形卷积注入结构先验至解码器，并设计可靠性感知伪标签学习机制，基于主预测与解耦响应间的结构一致性评估伪标签可靠性，对不可靠区域进行加权抑制。

Result: 在ISIC-2016、Kvasir-SEG、Synapse、ACDC四个医学图像分割基准上表现优异，证明了正交前景-背景解耦在无教师单网络框架下可建立高效可靠的训练范式。

Conclusion: OFD-Net通过显式建模前景与背景的结构分布，有效提升了伪标签质量，缓解了错误传播与确认偏差，在无需教师网络的情况下实现了更稳健的半监督医学图像分割。

Abstract: Semi-supervised learning (SSL) is an effective solution for medical image segmentation with limited annotations. Existing SSL methods mainly rely on pseudo-labels generated by teacher-student supervision or cross-network consistency. However, these methods lack an explicit structural reference for judging pseudo-label quality. Low-quality pseudo-labels may lead to unreliable training, error accumulation and confirmation bias when processing unlabeled data with substantial appearance variations. To address this issue, we proposed OFD-Net, a teacher-free single-network framework for reliable semi-supervised medical image segmentation. OFD-Net employs an Orthogonal Feature Disentanglement Module (OFDM) to capture OFD features for reliable SSL by disentangling unlabeled data into background and foreground representations with a reliable structural distribution, thereby effectively reducing error accumulation and alleviating confirmation bias among unlabeled data. Specifically, OFD-Net explicitly employs a Disentanglement Guidance Module (DGM) to inject the resulting structural priors of foreground-background into the decoder by deformable convolution processing, and outputs predictions with clearer foreground representations. Based on DGM and the OFDM, we further develop a reliability-aware pseudo-label learning mechanism that evaluates unlabeled supervision according to the structural consistency between the main prediction and the disentangled foreground-background responses, and then down-weights unreliable regions during training. Extensive experiments on four public medical image segmentation benchmarks, namely ISIC-2016, Kvasir-SEG, Synapse, and ACDC, validate the effectiveness of OFD-Net. These results confirm that orthogonal foreground-background disentanglement enables OFD-Net to establish an efficient and reliable training paradigm within a teacher-free single-network framework.

</details>


### [70] [Can Experts Adapt Without Training? On Test-Time Modality Generalization in MVLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16726)
*Raza Imam,Darakshan Rashid,Yutong Xie,Dwarikanath Mahapatra,Brejesh Lall,Mohammad Yaqub*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出MoBE框架，通过无优化的动态专家选择与自适应，在测试时实现对未见模态和领域的鲁棒性提升，显著优于现有TTA方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有医疗视觉-语言模型在面对未见模态和领域时可靠性急剧下降，亟需无需训练优化的测试时泛化方法以增强临床实用性。

Method: 采用混合专家（MoE）架构，结合熵引导的动态路由与专家级贝叶斯自适应，实现测试时无梯度更新的在线信心调整与适应。

Result: 在已见、未见及异构医学基准上，平均准确率分别提升+4.72、+7.17、+4.3，显著优于当前最先进的测试时自适应方法。

Conclusion: 无需参数更新的测试时专家自适应能有效解决模态泛化中的专门化与通用性矛盾，为医疗视觉-语言模型提供高可靠性的零样本泛化能力。

Abstract: Medical vision-language models (MVLMs) promise broad zero-shot generalization, yet their reliability collapses when confronted with unseen modalities and domains, precisely where clinical robustness matters most. To address this gap, we revisit test-time modality generalization from the perspective of Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) and ask: can experts route-and-adapt without any optimization during inference? We identify a fundamental specialization-generalization dilemma at test time, where blindly aggregating modality experts dilutes modality-specific knowledge, while selecting one highly confident expert risks mismatch under shift. To address this, we propose MoBE: a fully optimization-free framework that performs dynamic expert selection and adaptation at test time. MoBE combines entropy-guided dynamic routing in MoE settings with expert-wise Bayesian adaptation, enabling experts to update their confidence and adapt online without gradient updates. Without parametric updates, MoBE augments a static MVLM with test-time routing and online statistics, achieving average accuracy gains of +4.72, +7.17, and +4.3 over state-of-the-art TTA methods across seen, unseen, and heterogeneous medical benchmarks, highlighting the effectiveness of training-free expert adaptation for robust modality generalization.

</details>


### [71] [Multi-Dimensional Quality Assessment for AI-Generated Human-Centric Videos: Dataset and Model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16742)
*Sijing Wu,Yunhao Li,Huiyu Duan,Yucheng Zhu,Xiongkuo Min,Patrick Le Callet,Guangtao Zhai*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了HVEval+数据集和MoE-Rater方法，用于全面评估AI生成的人类中心视频质量。HVEval+是目前最大的多维度质量评估数据集，包含1000个提示、20,000个由24个文本到视频模型生成的视频，以及60,000个主观评分和60,000对偏好标注，涵盖空间质量、时间质量和文本-视频一致性三个维度，并附带20,000个特定类别问答对。MoE-Rater是一种基于混合专家（MoE）架构的多模态大语言模型，支持多维度评分、对比和问答，通过引入Mixture of Projector Experts (MoPE) 和 Mixture of LoRA Experts (MoLE)，结合三阶段训练策略，在多个基准上表现出色，显著推动了AI生成视频质量评估的发展。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有AI生成视频存在质量缺陷和语义不一致问题，亟需高效、全面的质量评估方法。当前缺乏统一且大规模的评估数据集与多任务评估模型，限制了对文本到视频生成模型的系统性评价与优化。

Method: 提出HVEval+数据集，构建包含多维度人类标注的大型数据集；设计MoE-Rater模型，采用混合专家架构，结合MoPE与MoLE模块，通过任务感知预训练、任务特定微调和自适应路由优化的三阶段训练策略，实现多任务统一建模。

Result: 在HVEval+和Human-AGVQA两个数据集上，MoE-Rater均取得优异性能，显著优于现有方法，验证了其在多维度质量评估、偏好比较和问答任务中的有效性与泛化能力。

Conclusion: HVEval+数据集与MoE-Rater方法为AI生成视频的质量评估提供了强有力工具，具有高度可扩展性和实用性，能够有效支持文本到视频模型的评估与优化，推动该领域向更智能、更精准的方向发展。

Abstract: AI-generated human-centric videos play a crucial role in a wide range of modern applications. However, they often suffer from quality issues and semantic mismatches, underscoring the importance of effective quality assessment for such videos. To this end, we extend our previous dataset HVEval with pairwise preference annotations, resulting in HVEval+, the largest holistic quality assessment dataset for AI-generated human-centric videos, which comprises 1k prompts based on a comprehensive taxonomy, 20k videos generated by 24 text-to-video (T2V) models, and extensive human annotations, including 60k mean opinion scores (MOSs) and 60k preference pairs across 3 dimensions (i.e., spatial quality, temporal quality, and text-video correspondence), as well as 20k category-specific question-answer (Q&A) pairs. Along with the HVEval+ dataset, we further propose MoE-Rater, a Mixture-of-Experts (MoE)-inspired and multimodal large language model (MLLM)-based all-in-one method that supports multi-dimensional quality rating, multi-dimensional pairwise comparison, and category-specific question answering within a single model. Specifically, we introduce Mixture of Projector Experts (MoPE) and Mixture of LoRA Experts (MoLE), together with a three-stage training strategy consisting of task-aware pre-training, task-specific adaptation, and adaptive routing optimization, to effectively unify multiple tasks, resulting in superior performance on both HVEval+ and Human-AGVQA datasets. Extensive experiments and comprehensive analysis demonstrate the significant potential of the HVEval+ dataset and the MoE-Rater method in advancing AI-generated video quality assessment and further facilitating the evaluation and optimization of T2V models.

</details>


### [72] [VisionAssist: An Open-Source Smartphone Assistant for AI-Based Visual Accessibility](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16750)
*Ayşe Özlem Çalışkan,Jordi Sanchez-Riera*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: VisionAssist 是一个开源的移动应用，利用AI技术为低视力人群提供视觉辅助。它通过智能手机摄像头实时分析环境，帮助用户定位物体、语音描述图像内容，并与联系人和日历集成以实现紧急呼叫和语音提醒。支持语音控制和文本转语音反馈，确保无障碍使用。项目已开源，旨在促进社区协作，加速无障碍技术发展。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 低视力人群在日常生活中面临视觉信息解读困难，现有工具往往功能单一或难以访问。需要一个集多种辅助功能于一体的统一、可访问且开放的解决方案，以提升独立性和生活质量。

Method: 开发并集成三项核心功能：实时物体定位、图像内容语音描述、与手机通讯录和日历联动的语音提醒与紧急呼叫；采用语音命令实现手免操作，所有输出均通过文本转语音呈现；整体系统以开源形式发布，便于社区参与和持续改进。

Result: VisionAssist 成功构建了一个多功能、全语音交互的视觉辅助平台，显著提升了低视力用户的任务执行能力与自主性；开源策略有效激发了社区参与，推动了无障碍技术的快速迭代与发展。

Conclusion: VisionAssist 证明了将多种视觉辅助功能整合到一个开放、可访问的移动应用中的可行性与有效性，为未来智能辅助技术的发展提供了可复用的框架与范例。

Abstract: People with low vision often face challenges in performing everyday tasks that require interpreting visual information. We present \textbf{VisionAssist}, an open-source mobile application designed to improve independence by providing AI-powered visual assistance through a smartphone. The application integrates three complementary functionalities within a single interface. First, it enables users to locate specific objects by analyzing the live camera feed. Second, it generates spoken descriptions of captured images, allowing users to identify visual content such as food labels, documents, and everyday objects. Third, it integrates with the smartphone's contacts and calendar to facilitate emergency calls and provide voice-based reminders. The application supports hands-free interaction through voice commands and delivers all feedback using text-to-speech synthesis, making it fully accessible to users with visual impairments. By combining multiple assistive services into a unified platform and releasing the project as open-source software, the proposed solution aims to encourage community contributions and accelerate the development of accessible technologies. The source code is publicly available at: https://github.com/AOzlemC/LowVisionProject.git

</details>


### [73] [Hybrid Machine Learning for Articulation Angle Estimation of Truck-Semitrailer Combinations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16758)
*Qixuan Zhang,Jonas Boettcher,Simon F. G. Ehlers,Marvin Stuede*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出基于学习的模型，直接从视觉和运动学输入中估计卡车与拖车之间的关节角度，无需手动初始化、额外传感器或拖车先验信息，在真实世界多种条件下表现出鲁棒性和泛化能力。通过将两个学习模型与运动学模型结合，并在扩展卡尔曼滤波框架中采用基于不确定性量化的自适应加权策略，实现了高精度、低部署要求的关节角估计。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法依赖手动初始化、额外传感器、拖车先验信息或特定驾驶操作，且缺乏真实场景验证，限制了实际应用。需要一种无需额外硬件或先验知识、可在复杂环境下稳定工作的关节角估计方法。

Method: 融合两个基于学习的模型与运动学模型，构建在扩展卡尔曼滤波（EKF）框架下的混合估计系统；引入基于不确定性量化的自适应加权机制，优化视觉输入的测量融合效果。

Result: 在不同拖车型号、颜色、光照条件等真实场景下均表现优异，具备强鲁棒性与泛化能力；相比传统方法，显著降低部署复杂度，实现高精度、可靠的角度估计。

Conclusion: 所提出的混合学习-运动学方法能够高效、准确地估计卡车与拖车的关节角度，具有良好的实用性与可推广性，适用于自动驾驶与ADAS系统的实际部署。

Abstract: Accurate articulation angle estimation of trucks with trailers is critical for autonomous driving and advanced driver assistance system (ADAS). Existing methods either require manual initialization, additional sensors, or prior knowledge and signals from trailers, or they lack real-world validation, limiting practical deployment. This paper presents multiple learning-based models to directly estimate articulation angles from visual and kinematic inputs, eliminating the need for dedicated driving maneuvers for initialization, bounding box annotations, trailer-mounted sensor signals, or prior knowledge of trailer parameters. Two learning-based models are integrated with a kinematic model within an extended Kalman filter (EKF) framework, and an adaptive weighting scheme based on uncertainty quantification is applied for measurements involving visual input. Extensive real-world experiments with different trailer types demonstrate the approaches' robustness and generalization under out-of-domain conditions, including new trailers, varying colors, and lighting conditions. Results show that the hybrid method achieves accurate and reliable articulation angle estimation while maintaining reduced implementation requirements and practical deployment advantages.

</details>


### [74] [Thinking in Video: Can Video Generators Really Reason About the Real World?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17523)
*Yongheng Zhang,Guang Yang,Ruihan Hou,Qiguang Chen,Ziang Liu,Xiaolong Liu,Manman Zhang,Yanchao Hao,Zheng Wei,Hao Wu,Libo Qin,Peishan Dai,Yinghui Li,Di Yin,Xing Sun*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出“视频思维”（Thinking in Video）新范式，强调视频不仅是生成结果，更是因果推理的媒介。为评估视频生成模型是否具备真正因果理解能力，作者引入Causal-Generative Dual-Judge（CGDJ）评估框架，从显式因果感知和隐式生成预测差距两个维度检验世界模型一致性。实验发现：开源模型虽生成看似合理动态，但缺乏显式因果感知；闭源模型虽表现更好，但仍存在推理与生成不一致问题。此外，模型在语音与视觉表达上存在错位，说明其口头描述正确逻辑的能力强于实际可视化呈现，挑战了视频生成模型作为“世界模拟器”的观点。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视频生成模型的合理性可能源于记忆而非因果理解，且现有评估指标未能有效结合感知保真度与语义逻辑，导致难以判断模型是否真正具备推理能力。因此亟需一种能同时衡量因果感知与生成一致性的评估方法。

Method: 提出Causal-Generative Dual-Judge（CGDJ）评估框架，包含两项测试：1）显式因果感知——通过时空扁平化视觉问答测试模型对视频场景的理解能力；2）隐式生成感知-预测差距——评估模型生成未来视频时是否保持因果一致性。

Result: 实验表明，开源模型生成视频看似合理，但几乎无显式因果感知；闭源模型虽有较强推理与生成对齐，但仍不充分。此外，模型常在语言层面准确表达因果逻辑，但在视觉呈现中无法忠实反映，暴露出音画不一致问题。

Conclusion: 当前视频生成模型尚未真正实现“思维在视频中”的因果推理能力，其生成结果更多依赖经验性模仿而非深层理解。要构建可信的世界模拟器，必须解决因果感知与生成之间的根本断层，并加强多模态一致性建模。

Abstract: Recent advances in world models and video generation have given rise to an emerging reasoning paradigm that leverages video generative models to simulate, predict, and reason about real-world dynamics. We redefine this paradigm as Thinking in Video, where video is not merely an output artifact but a medium for constructing, extending, and verifying causal thought. However, this promise remains unverified: convincing rollouts may reflect memorized appearances rather than causal understanding, while existing metrics separate perceptual fidelity from semantic logic. To evaluate whether video generators support such reasoning, we introduce the Causal-Generative Dual-Judge (CGDJ), auditing World Model Consistency from two perspectives. Explicit Causal Perception tests whether a generator reads a video scenario as a reasoning problem through spatio-temporal flattened visual question answering, while Implicit Generative Perception-Prediction Gap evaluates whether it renders the causal consequence as a consistent future video. Applying CGDJ to representative open- and closed-source generators reveals a clear Perception-Prediction Gap: open-source models produce plausible dynamics despite near-zero explicit causal perception, whereas advanced closed-source systems show stronger but still limited alignment between reasoning and generation. Further analysis exposes audio-visual misalignment, where models verbalize correct causal logic more reliably than they render it, challenging the "world simulator" narrative.

</details>


### [75] [Spatiotemporal Facial Action Unit Detection using Twin Cycle Autoencoders for Driver Monitoring](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16760)
*Sai Sidharth D*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出Twin Cycle Autoencoder（TCA）模型，通过时空联合建模提升驾驶场景中面部动作单元（AU）的检测性能，尤其在低光照、遮挡和快速变化的微表情（如疲劳、打哈欠）上表现优异。模型结合空间与时间循环一致性约束，并在真实驾驶数据集上验证了其有效性与实时性，适用于车载高级驾驶辅助系统（ADAS）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有面部动作单元（AU）检测方法在驾驶场景中受限于光照不均、遮挡、头部姿态变化及微弱短暂的AU激活，且多数模型分离处理空间外观与时间动态，未能充分利用大量未标注驾驶视频中的自监督信号。因此需要一种能同时建模空间与时间信息的鲁棒方法。

Method: 设计双分支循环自编码器架构：空间分支通过图像级循环一致性将AU相关外观与身份解耦；时间分支通过潜在轨迹的前向-后向一致性捕捉AU的起始-峰值-结束动态；两分支通过跨分支潜在对齐损失耦合，并经注意力模块融合后进行多标签AU分类。

Result: 在DISFA、BP4D及真实舱内驾驶数据集上，TCA显著优于CNN-RNN、3D-CNN和图神经网络基线模型，尤其在低强度和快速转换的AU（如AU45、AU43、AU26）上提升明显；且可在Jetson Xavier NX嵌入式平台实现实时推理，具备部署潜力。

Conclusion: TCA通过联合建模空间与时间特性，有效提升了复杂驾驶环境下面部动作单元的检测精度与鲁棒性，支持高实时性应用，为生产级驾驶员监控系统提供了可行的技术方案。

Abstract: Driver monitoring systems (DMS) increasingly rely on facial cues to infer drowsiness, distraction, and cognitive load in real time. Facial Action Units (AUs), grounded in the Facial Action Coding System (FACS), provide an objective and interpretable representation of such states, but their automatic detection in the driving context is complicated by low and variable illumination, partial occlusion, head-pose variation, and the subtlety and short duration of relevant AU activations. Existing AU detectors largely treat spatial appearance and temporal dynamics separately, limiting their ability to exploit self-supervisory signal from abundant unlabeled driving video. We propose the Twin Cycle Autoencoder (TCA), a spatiotemporal architecture composed of two coupled cycle-consistent autoencoder branches: a Spatial Cycle Autoencoder that disentangles AU-relevant appearance from identity through image-level cycle consistency, and a Temporal Cycle Autoencoder that enforces forward-backward consistency over latent AU trajectories to capture onset-apex-offset dynamics. The two branches are coupled through a cross-branch latent alignment loss and fused via an attention module before multi-label AU classification. We evaluate TCA on the DISFA and BP4D benchmarks and on an in-cabin naturalistic driving dataset, and observe consistent improvements over CNN-RNN, 3D-CNN, and graph-based AU baselines, particularly for low-intensity and rapidly transitioning AUs relevant to fatigue (AU45, AU43) and yawning (AU26). We further show the model sustains real-time throughput on an embedded Jetson Xavier NX platform, supporting its use in production-grade advanced driver assistance systems (ADAS).

</details>


### [76] [HTT-Net: Hierarchical Text-guided Transition Modeling for Surgical Video Phase Recognition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16787)
*Kunjie Deng,Jinghui Zhang,Weidong Chen,Ganbin Li,Xiangjun Lyu,Zhendong Mao,Yingchi Yang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出HTT-Net，一种基于分层文本引导转换建模的手术视频阶段识别网络，通过引入结构化的手术语义知识，提升阶段感知段构建与语义精炼能力，有效应对视觉模糊、预测噪声和过程语义利用不足等问题。在Cholec80和LCRS-100数据集上验证了其鲁棒性与有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视觉-时序模型在手术视频阶段识别中仍面临局部视觉模糊、瞬时预测噪声以及过程语义利用不足等挑战，导致准确性和时间一致性难以保证。

Method: 设计分层手术语义记忆，包含相内描述、相间转换描述和细粒度语义单元；提出过渡感知段构建（TAS-Con）以组织帧级证据并处理边界片段；引入过渡感知段校准（TAS-Calib）通过分层语义校准阶段感知表示，在无需密集帧级视觉-语言融合的情况下增强视觉模糊下的判别能力。

Result: 在Cholec80和LCRS-100数据集上，HTT-Net显著提升了手术视频阶段识别的准确性与时间一致性，表现出更强的鲁棒性。

Conclusion: HTT-Net通过融合分层手术语义知识，有效解决了手术视频阶段识别中的关键挑战，为手术流程理解、术中引导和质量评估提供了有力支持。

Abstract: Surgical video phase recognition is a fundamental task in computer-assisted intervention, supporting workflow understanding, intraoperative guidance, and surgical quality assessment. Although recent visual-temporal models have achieved promising progress, accurate and temporally coherent phase recognition remains challenging due to local visual ambiguity, transient prediction noise, and insufficient use of procedural semantics. To address these challenges, we propose HTT-Net, a Hierarchical Text-guided Transition modeling Network for surgical video phase recognition. The key idea is to introduce structured surgical semantic knowledge into phase-aware segment construction and semantic refinement. Specifically, we construct a hierarchical surgical semantic memory with intra-phase descriptions, inter-phase transition descriptions, and fine-grained semantic units. Based on this memory, the proposed Transition-Aware Segment Construction (TAS-Con) organizes frame-level evidence into coherent segment representations and handles boundary clips with inter-phase transition descriptions. Furthermore, we introduce Transition-Aware Segment Calibration (TAS-Calib), which calibrates phase-aware segment representations through hierarchical surgical semantics and improves discrimination under visual ambiguity without dense frame-level vision-language fusion. Experiments on Cholec80 and LCRS-100 demonstrate the effectiveness of HTT-Net for robust surgical video phase recognition.

</details>


### [77] [Scene-SAM3D: Multi-View Scene Asset Generation Without Fine-Tuning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16805)
*Yuqi Zhang,Yadan Luo,Xiangyu Sun,Fengyi Zhang,Zi Huang,Xin Tan*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: Scene-SAM3D 是一种无需训练的框架，将 SAM3D 从单视图物体生成扩展到校准多视图场景资产生成。它通过选择一组互补视图减少观测冗余，并利用高效潜速度融合整合多视图证据，抑制跨视图冲突。最后通过轻量级刚性物体高斯优化在200次迭代内精修场景布局，同时保持物体几何结构。在 Replica 和 ScanNet++ 上的实验表明，该方法在实例和场景层面均取得显著提升，场景级 CD 分别降低 43.8% 和 30.9%，并减少了近 20% 的计算开销和延迟。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有单图像 3D 生成模型（如 SAM3D）在真实场景中表现不足，主要受限于严重遮挡、冗余观测和跨视图不一致性等问题。因此需要一种能够有效处理多视图信息并生成高质量 3D 场景资产的方法。

Method: Scene-SAM3D 采用选择性互补视图策略，减少冗余；基于选定视图进行步骤高效的潜速度融合以整合多视图证据并抑制冲突；最后通过轻量级刚性物体高斯优化在 200 次迭代内精细调整场景布局，保留生成物体的几何结构。

Result: 在 Replica 和 ScanNet++ 数据集上，该方法在场景级欧氏距离（CD）上分别降低了 43.8% 和 30.9%，同时在相同多视图设置下，将流模型采样浮点运算量（FLOPs）和运行时间延迟减少了近 20%。

Conclusion: Scene-SAM3D 成功实现了无需训练的多视图 3D 场景生成，在保持高质量几何的同时显著提升了生成效率与一致性，适用于机器人操作、导航和仿真等沉浸式应用。

Abstract: High-quality 3D scene assets are critical for embodied applications such as robotic manipulation, navigation, and simulation. Despite their strong object priors, recent single-image 3D generation models such as SAM3D remain insufficient for real-world scenes, where severe occlusions, redundant observations, and cross-view inconsistencies make reliable scene generation challenging. We introduce Scene-SAM3D, a training-free framework that extends SAM3D from single-view object generation to calibrated multi-view scene asset generation. Scene-SAM3D selects a compact set of complementary views, reducing observation redundancy while providing additional evidence for regions occluded in individual views. Based on the selected views, it performs step-efficient latent velocity fusion to integrate multi-view evidence and suppress cross-view conflicts in canonical space. Finally, a lightweight rigid-object Gaussian optimization refines the scene layout within 200 iterations while preserving the generated object geometry. Experiments on Replica and ScanNet++ demonstrate consistent improvements at both instance and scene levels, with our method reducing scene-level CD by 43.8% on Replica and 30.9% on ScanNet++, while cutting flow-model sampling FLOPs and wall-time latency by nearly 20% under the same multi-view setting. Code will be released at https://github.com/xibi777/Scene-SAM3D.

</details>


### [78] [Test-Time Registers as Global Priors for Tokenized Image Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16824)
*Cheng-Yao Hong,Yifan Wang,Yuewei Lin,Chenyu You*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文研究了视觉变换器中注意力集中现象，发现寄存器（registers）与图像的全局低频结构密切相关。提出一种无需训练的RegToken方法，通过NFN层定位、TokenRank引导的子空间提取及投影-保全更新，将寄存器结构转化为一组全局先验令牌，插入冻结的1D生成管道后，提升了ImageNet生成质量与对齐指标（如FID-5k从20.5降至20.1，SigLIP从3.6升至3.9），并加速测试时优化（步骤数从74降至52），证明了注意力异常结构可作为轻量级全局先验用于生成任务。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究多通过可解释性分析和线性探测探讨寄存器的作用，但未验证其能否作为无需重训练的即插即用信号用于生成任务。本文旨在探索寄存器结构是否可被操作化为生成过程中的有效全局先验信号。

Method: 提出RegToken方法，包含三个步骤：(i) 基于NFN的层定位以识别关键寄存器位置；(ii) 使用TokenRank引导的子空间提取技术提取相关特征；(iii) 在寄存器子空间上进行投影与保全更新，生成全局先验令牌，并将其注入冻结的1D生成管道。

Result: RegToken在不修改预训练权重的前提下，显著提升了图像生成质量与对齐性能（如FID-5k从20.5降至20.1，SigLIP从3.6升至3.9），同时加速测试时优化过程（步骤数从74降至52），且寄存器特征表现出更强的低频能量集中性。

Conclusion: 注意力机制中常被视为异常的寄存器结构，实际上可被有效转化为轻量级的全局先验信号，用于增强生成模型的性能，为无须重训练的高效生成提供了新思路。

Abstract: Attention-based models often develop attention sinks, where a small number of tokens repeatedly attract attention and accumulate unusually large activations. In vision transformers, these outliers are closely related to registers, which have been diagnostically linked to global, low-frequency image structure. Existing work has largely studied registers through interpretability analyses and linear probes, leaving open whether they can be operationalized as plug-and-play signals for generation without retraining. We revisit this question in tokenized image generation. Using OpenCLIP and DINOv2 on ImageNet, we find that test-time register features exhibit stronger low-frequency concentration than both [CLS] readouts and patch-mean features, and show a consistent (albeit moderate) correlation with pixel-space DCT low-frequency energy. Motivated by these diagnostics, we introduce RegToken, a training-free procedure that converts register structure into a small set of global prior tokens by (i) NFN-based layer localization, (ii) TokenRank-guided subspace extraction, and (iii) a projection-and-conservation update on the register subspace. Inserted into a frozen compact 1D token generation pipeline, RegToken improves ImageNet generation and alignment metrics (e.g., FID-5k 20.5 to 20.1, SigLIP 3.6 to 3.9) without modifying pretrained weights, and accelerates test-time optimization (Steps@$τ$ 74 to 52). Overall, our results suggest that structures often viewed as attention artifacts can be repurposed as lightweight global priors for tokenized generation.

</details>


### [79] [Spatially-Aware Class-Agnostic Object Counting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16826)
*Robert Wijaya,Md. Tanvir Hossain,Amanda Kau,Ngai-Man Cheung*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: UpCount是一种无类别计数方法，通过改进视觉表示来更好地保持空间结构。它利用ViT-B/16编码器提取多层特征，并通过密集预测变换器和FeatUp重新组装成具有空间精细度的多尺度金字塔，随后采用提案-验证计数头识别重复模式并生成密度图以获得最终计数。在FSC-147上，测试集上达到12.39 MAE和100.89 RMSE；在CARPK车辆计数任务中也表现出良好迁移性能（6.27 MAE, 8.79 RMSE）。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法在处理结构复杂对象时受限于空间建模能力不足，难以准确估计任意类别对象的数量。因此需要一种能更好保留空间结构的通用对象计数方法。

Method: 使用ViT-B/16编码器提取多层特征，通过密集预测变换器与FeatUp技术重构为高精度多尺度金字塔，增强空间敏感性；结合提案-验证计数头识别重复模式并输出密度图实现计数。

Result: 在FSC-147数据集上，测试集上取得12.39 MAE和100.89 RMSE；在CARPK车辆计数任务中表现优异，达6.27 MAE和8.79 RMSE，显示良好的跨域迁移能力。

Conclusion: UpCount通过强化空间结构感知与多尺度特征融合，显著提升了复杂结构对象的计数性能，具备强泛化性和实用性。

Abstract: Generalised object counting aims to estimate the number of instances of an arbitrary object category from a single image, but many recent methods can struggle on structurally complex objects due to limited spatial modelling. We present \textit{UpCount}, a class-agnostic counter designed to better preserve spatial structure. UpCount strengthens the visual representation by extracting multi-layer features from a ViT-B/16 encoder and reassembling them into a refined multi-scale pyramid that is spatially refined using Dense Prediction Transformers and FeatUp, yielding features with improved structural and spatial sensitivity; a proposal--verification counting head then identifies repeated patterns and produces a density map for the final count. On FSC-147, UpCount achieves 12.39 MAE and 100.89 RMSE on the test set, and it transfers effectively to vehicle counting on CARPK (6.27 MAE, 8.79 RMSE). Code: https://github.com/r28112072-rgb/upcount

</details>


### [80] [UniNDM: A Unified Noise-driven Detection and Mitigation Framework Against Sexual Content in Text-to-Image Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16828)
*Yao Huang,Yitong Sun,Huanran Chen,Ruochen Zhang,Shouwei Ruan,Ranjie Duan,Maoxun Yuan,Yinpeng Dong,Hui Xue,Xiaochun Cao,Xingxing Wei*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出UniNDM框架，通过噪声动态分析解决文本到图像扩散模型中的隐式性暗示生成问题。利用早期预测噪声的语义集中度随时间步增加的特性，设计轻量级噪声检测器和动态负向引导机制，实现高效精准的安全防护，并扩展至DiT架构，实验验证优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有安全机制无法有效识别隐式性暗示内容，因检测依赖显式关键词，而缓解手段采用静态负向提示，难以应对多样化的隐式攻击场景。

Method: 基于扩散过程中的噪声动力学，利用早期阶段预测噪声的语义分离特性，构建轻量级噪声检测器；引入大语言模型生成上下文相关的动态负向提示，并优化初始噪声以抑制对敏感词的注意力集中，同时扩展至Diffusion Transformer使用区域约束语义引导。

Result: 在U-Net与DiT模型上，针对自然和对抗数据集的实验均显示显著优于SLD、UCE、Safree等先进方法，在检测精度和计算开销方面表现优异。

Conclusion: UniNDM通过重新审视扩散过程中的噪声动态，提供了一种统一且高效的隐式安全防护框架，具备良好的泛化能力与实用性，为生成模型安全性提供了新思路。

Abstract: Despite the impressive generative capabilities of text-to-image diffusion models, they remain vulnerable to implicit sexual prompts, where subtle cues disguised as benign terms or adversarial tokens unexpectedly generate the inappropriate content due to model biases or latent correlations in training data. Existing safety mechanisms face fundamental limitations: detection methods primarily identify explicit content and fail to capture implicit malicious intent, while mitigation approaches rely on static negative prompts inadequate for diverse implicit scenarios. To address these challenges, we propose UniNDM, a unified noise-driven framework that rethinks safety mechanisms through the lens of noise dynamics in diffusion processes. Our key insight is that early-stage predicted noise exhibits inherent separability between normal and sexually explicit content, which we theoretically demonstrates quadratically increasing semantic concentration with timestep. Leveraging this property, we develop a lightweight noise-based detector achieving superior accuracy with virtually no computational overhead. For mitigation, we introduce noise-enhanced adaptive negative guidance: dynamically generating context-specific negative prompts via large language models to handle diverse implicit content, while optimizing initial noise by suppressing attention concentration on explicit tokens to provide comprehensive protection. Besides the U-Net-based diffusion models, we further extend our framework to emerging Diffusion Transformer architectures through region-constrained semantic guidance tailored for their unified multimodal attention. Comprehensive experiments across U-Net models and DiT models on both natural and adversarial datasets demonstrate substantial improvements over state-of-the-art methods, including SLD, UCE, Safree, etc. Our code is publicly available at https://github.com/Aries-iai/UniNDM.

</details>


### [81] [Robust PnP on a Neuromorphic Processor for Object Pose Estimation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16834)
*Tam Ngoc-Bang Nguyen,Mohsi Jawaid,Tat-Jun Chin*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种可部署在神经形态硬件上的鲁棒PnP新方法，用于解决物体姿态估计中的2D-3D对应关系中的异常值问题。通过设计一种可在神经形态处理器上运行的分布式算法实现鲁棒刚体姿态估计，并结合基于脉冲神经元原理设计的SNN来从事件数据中预测2D关键点。该方法实现了从事件感知、学习型关键点预测到几何优化的全链路神经形态处理，在Intel Loihi 2硬件上表现出更高的能效与竞争性精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前神经形态计算在机器人感知中因高能效受到关注，但非学习类任务（如鲁棒PnP）难以在神经形态硬件上高效实现，限制了其在包含学习与非学习组件的感知流水线（如物体姿态估计）中的应用。

Method: 提出一种神经形态可部署的鲁棒PnP公式，采用分布式算法进行鲁棒最小二乘姿态估计；设计基于脉冲神经元原理的SNN，从事件数据中预测2D关键点，实现从事件感知到几何优化的全流程神经形态化处理。

Result: 在Intel Loihi 2神经形态硬件上验证，所提方法在保持竞争性精度的同时显著提升了能效，实现了物体姿态估计主要阶段的神经形态化处理。

Conclusion: 本工作首次实现了物体姿态估计流水线中从事件感知、关键点预测到鲁棒几何优化的全神经形态部署，为神经形态计算在复杂感知任务中的应用提供了有效范例。

Abstract: Neuromorphic computing is gaining attention in robotic perception due to its higher energy efficiency. While neural network-based methods can more readily exploit the distributed and parallelized structure of neuromorphic computers, crafting neuromorphic solutions for non-learning tasks is less straightforward. This hampers the usage of neuromorphic computing for perception pipelines that depend on both learning and non-learning components, such as object pose estimation (OPE) where state-of-the-art methods use a deep network to predict 2D landmarks and nonlinear optimization to solve perspective-n-point (PnP). In this paper, we propose a novel neuromorphic-deployable formulation for robust PnP, where given outlier-prone 2D-3D correspondences, the object pose with the largest number of inliers is determined. Underpinning our method is a distributed algorithm for robust least squares estimation of rigid body pose that can be executed on a neuromorphic processor. We also design a spiking neural network (SNN) to predict 2D landmarks from event data, where the main layers of the SNN were designed according to the principles of spiking neurons. Overall, our work enables neuromorphic treatment of the major stages of an OPE pipeline, from event sensing and learned landmark prediction, to geometric optimization for robust PnP. Results on neuromophic hardware (Intel Loihi 2) indicate the higher energy efficiency our neuromorphic robust PnP, while achieving competitive accuracy.

</details>


### [82] [TopoGS: Planar Reconstruction via Topology-aware 3D Gaussian Splatting](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16838)
*Shanshan Pan,Jiale Chen,Yilin Liu,Hui Huang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: TopoGS 是首个在 3D Gaussian Splatting 框架中同时引入平面与拓扑约束的模型，通过多视角图像分割提取全局拓扑关系，并将高斯原语锚定于这些结构元素上，实现平面参数、渲染保真度与拓扑邻接关系的联合优化，显著减少几何错位，生成连通且结构化的 3D 模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有 3DGS 方法虽引入平面基元以提升表示紧凑性与可编辑性，但通常将平面视为孤立离散集合，缺乏拓扑连通性，导致重建碎片化、边界错位，难以满足精确空间分析与专业设计需求。

Method: 从多视角图像分割中提取全局 2D 拓扑关系，将高斯原语锚定于这些结构元素上，联合优化平面参数、渲染质量与拓扑邻接关系，强制多视图一致性与拓扑约束。

Result: 在 ScanNet++ 数据集上的实验表明，TopoGS 实现了当前最优性能，生成具有高精度、拓扑正确性和视觉保真度的 3D 场景表示。

Conclusion: TopoGS 首次在 3DGS 中融合平面与拓扑约束，有效解决几何碎片化问题，为生成连通、结构清晰、适用于专业场景的 3D 重建提供了强有力的新范式。

Abstract: Extracting structured, parametric 3D representations from raw images remains a fundamental challenge in computer vision and graphics. While recent advancements in the 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) pipeline integrate planar primitives to yield compact and editable geometry, these approaches typically treat planes as isolated, discrete sets. This lack of topological connectivity hinders robust geometric reasoning, leading to fragmented reconstructions and misaligned boundaries that fall short of the precision for rigorous spatial analysis and professional design workflows. To address this, we introduce TopoGS, the first 3DGS framework to explicitly integrate both planar and topological constraints for coherent 3D reconstruction. Specifically, we extract global 2D topological relationships from multi-view image segmentations and anchor Gaussian primitives to these structural elements. This formulation enables the joint optimization of plane parameters, rendering fidelity, and topological adjacency. By enforcing strict multi-view consistency alongside these topological constraints, our method significantly mitigates geometric misalignments and produces connected, structured 3D models. Extensive evaluations on the ScanNet++ dataset demonstrate that TopoGS achieves state-of-the-art performance, providing a highly robust solution for generating accurate, topologically sound, and visually faithful scene representations.

</details>


### [83] [O-VAD: Industrial Video Anomaly Detection through Object-Centric Tracking and Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.18142)
*Mei Yuan,Qi Long,Qifeng Wu,Zhenyang Li,Yizhou Zhao,Lei Wang,Yang Liu,Min Xu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出了一种无需训练的代理框架，用于工业视频异常检测，通过模拟人类检查员对物体状态演化的跟踪与推理，有效识别复杂工业场景中的异常，优于现有VLM、代理框架及传统方法，且提供可解释的异常报告。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于视觉语言模型（VLM）的异常检测方法在工业场景中表现下降，因工业环境具有复杂的物体变换、严格的物理规律和流程约束，亟需一种无需领域知识、能理解物体状态演化的新方法。

Method: 提出一种无需训练的代理框架，通过追踪物体在时空上的动态变化和内在转换，基于物体级的时间状态轨迹进行推理，识别异常物体，并生成可解释的异常报告。

Result: 在三个IVAD数据集上实验表明，该方法优于前沿VLM、代理框架及微调的传统VAD方法，具备更强的泛化能力与可解释性。

Conclusion: 所提方法无需再训练或注入领域知识，能够有效应对工业场景中交互密集的异常检测挑战，为智能制造中的质量控制提供了高效、可解释的解决方案。

Abstract: Industrial Video Anomaly Detection (IVAD) aims to identify anomalous objects and events in an industrial process, which is crucial for modern manufacturing and quality control systems. Existing VLM-based anomaly reasoning methods are capable of detecting open-ended anomalies in general domains. However, their performance declines in industrial settings characterized by intricate object transformations, strict physics, and procedural constraints. To tackle the complexity of such interaction-intensive detection, we introduce a training-free agentic framework for anomaly detection free of domain-specific knowledge, emphasizing object state evolution like humans inspectors. It is designed to track spatial-temporal dynamics and underlying transformations of detected objects over time, and then reason over the object-wise temporal state trajectories to identify abnormal objects in grounded frames. Our method overcomes limitations of prior approaches that rely on retraining on normal clips or injecting domain knowledge as context for test-time inference. Extensive experiments on three IVAD datasets demonstrate that our method outperforms frontier VLMs, agentic frameworks, and traditional VAD methods fine-tuned on the respective datasets, while providing interpretable reports over anomaly processes and types.

</details>


### [84] [Look Clearly Before Answering: Mitigating Hallucinations in LVLMs via Saliency-Driven Perceptual Realignment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16841)
*Pengxu Chen,Yao Zhu,Guangming Zhu,Jun Sheng,Jincai Huang,Xiangyang Ji,Liang Zhang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出了一种无需训练的框架SDPR，通过注意力重分配、缓存对齐和约束解码来缓解视觉感知在生成过程中的退化问题，有效减少幻觉并提升多模态理解能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法主要关注语言先验偏差或跨模态不平衡，但未充分探索感知与记忆中视觉信息的渐进退化问题，因此需要一种能够持续保持视觉意识的方法。

Method: 引入显著性驱动的注意力重分配以恢复被非语义令牌占据的关键视觉信息；识别并修正KV缓存中的空间失真，通过显著性驱动的缓存对齐保留查询相关的视觉特征；采用先验约束的对比解码机制惩罚由主导语言先验引起的不忠实预测。

Result: 在多种大型视觉-语言模型架构上，SDPR在幻觉检测和通用基准测试中均优于现有最先进方法，且无需额外训练，运行开销极小。

Conclusion: SDPR通过在整个生成轨迹中实现视觉意识的全局对齐，显著提升了模型对视觉证据的忠实度，为解决多模态幻觉问题提供了有效方案。

Abstract: Large vision-language models (LVLMs) have demonstrated remarkable capabilities in multimodal understanding. However, they remain prone to hallucinations, generating responses that are inconsistent with the visual evidence. Existing mitigation methods largely address language-prior bias or cross-modal imbalance, while progressive visual degradation across perception and memory remains underexplored. In this work, we propose Saliency-Driven Perceptual Realignment (SDPR), a training-free framework that mitigates the degradation of visual awareness throughout inference. Specifically, we first introduce saliency-driven attention redistribution to release attention hijacked by non-semantic sink tokens, thereby recovering critical visual evidence. Second, we identify spatial distortion in the KV cache and propose saliency-driven cache alignment to preserve query-relevant visual features during generation. Finally, we introduce prior-constrained contrastive decoding to penalize unfaithful predictions induced by dominant language priors. Our proposed SDPR is robust against hallucinations due to its holistic alignment of visual awareness across the entire generative trajectory. Extensive experiments across diverse LVLM architectures show that SDPR outperforms state-of-the-art methods on both hallucination and general-purpose benchmarks, requiring no additional training and incurring minimal runtime overhead. The code is available \href{https://github.com/PengSyuChen/SDPR}{\color{blue}{here}}.

</details>


### [85] [Dataset Distillation by Influence Matching](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16859)
*Haoru Tan,Wang Wang,Sitong Wu,Xiuzhe Wu,Yangtian Sun,Chirui Chang,Shaofeng Zhang,Xiaojuan Qi*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文从结果导向的角度重新审视数据集蒸馏，提出Influence Matching（Inf-Match）方法，通过匹配真实数据集与合成数据集在训练收敛后对模型参数的影响，实现更优的性能。该方法引入一个全可微、样本级的影响估计器，利用一阶泰勒近似和优化动态展开，在线性时间内计算数据增删对参数的影响，避免了复杂的逆海森矩阵计算和凸性假设。通过最小化真实数据与合成数据影响之间的差异，实现了对最终训练结果的对齐而非过程模仿。Inf-Match在多个标准分类任务上表现领先，如在Tiny-ImageNet（IPC=10）上达到31.5%准确率，比NCFM高出4.7%；在视觉-语言任务（Flickr30K）中也显著优于现有基线，尤其在低样本量下表现优异。代码将开源。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统数据集蒸馏方法依赖于对训练过程的近似（如梯度或训练轨迹），但这些过程模拟可能偏离最终模型性能目标。本文旨在从最终结果出发，直接对齐真实数据与合成数据在模型参数上的影响，以提升蒸馏效果。

Method: 提出一种全可微、样本级的影响估计器，基于优化动态展开和一阶泰勒近似，在线性时间内高效估算添加或移除样本对模型参数的影响；然后通过最小化真实数据与合成数据的影响差异，学习最优的紧凑合成数据集。

Result: 在标准分类任务（如Tiny-ImageNet）上，Inf-Match在低采样率（IPC=10）下达到31.5%准确率，比NCFM高4.7%；在视觉-语言任务（Flickr30K）中，使用200–1000个合成样本即可实现领先性能，平均指标高于NCFM 2.5%。

Conclusion: Inf-Match通过直接对齐训练结果（即最终参数影响），实现了更有效、更稳健的数据集蒸馏，显著优于依赖过程模仿的现有方法，并具备良好的可扩展性与实用性。

Abstract: We revisit dataset distillation from an outcome-centric perspective. Rather than aligning process surrogates (per-step gradients or training trajectories), Influence Matching (Inf-Match) aligns the final outcome of training: it learns a compact synthetic set whose effect on the converged parameters matches that of the full dataset. Concretely, we introduce a fully differentiable, sample-level influence estimator that quantifies parameter shifts from adding or removing data, without time-consuming inverse-Hessian products or convexity assumptions. The estimator runs in linear time by unrolling the optimization dynamics and applying a first-order Taylor approximation. We then learn the synthetic set by minimizing the mismatch between its influence and that of the real dataset, yielding outcome alignment rather than heuristic process imitation. Inf-Match delivers the best accuracy across standard classification benchmarks. For instance, on Tiny-ImageNet (IPC=10), Inf-Match attains 31.5\%, a +4.7\% improvement over NCFM. Beyond classification, Inf-Match scales to vision-language distillation on Flickr30K, outperforming strong process-matching baselines. For instance, with 200 to 1000 synthetic samples, our method achieved a leading impressive average on image/text retrieval tasks, higher than NCFM by 2.5\%. The code will be released via https://github.com/hrtan/infmatch.

</details>


### [86] [InLiER: Learning-Free Heterogeneous LiDAR Place Recognition via Intermediate Mixed-Radix Structural Keypoint Tokenization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16862)
*Nikolaos Stathoulopoulos,George Nikolakopoulos*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: InLiER是一种无需学习的激光雷达场景识别方法，通过高度切片的关键点生成紧凑的混合基数标记ID，编码高度、径向距离、局部形状和方位信息，实现旋转不变的快速筛选、偏航估计与重排序、以及6-DoF位姿估计。该方法在HeLiPR数据集和实际野外实验中表现优于现有手工设计方法，并在多数跨传感器配置下超越基于学习的基线模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着机器人平台集成具有不同视场、分辨率和扫描模式的激光雷达，传统描述子因紧密耦合于传感器特定特性而性能下降，亟需一种不依赖训练且能适应多传感器配置的鲁棒场景识别方法。

Method: InLiER采用中间分词步骤：从结构元素提取高度切片的关键点，生成包含高度、径向距离、局部形状和方位信息的混合基数标记ID；通过三阶段检索流程实现高效匹配——高度上限直方图交集用于快速旋转不变短列，二进制位掩码对齐用于偏航估计与重排序，标记引导的几何验证用于6-DoF位姿估计。

Result: InLiER在HeLiPR数据集上达到当前最优性能，在真实野外实验中表现优异，优于大多数现代手工设计方法，并在多数跨传感器配置下超越学习型基线模型。

Conclusion: InLiER为多传感器激光雷达场景识别提供了一种高效、鲁棒且无需训练的解决方案，特别适用于异构传感器环境下的回环检测、重定位和多智能体地图管理。

Abstract: LiDAR place recognition supports loop closure, relocalization, and multi-agent map management. As robotic platforms increasingly combine LiDARs with different fields of view, resolutions, and scanning patterns, existing descriptors degrade because they are tightly coupled to sensor-specific characteristics. We present InLiER, a learning-free pipeline based on an intermediate tokenization step. Height-sliced keypoints from structural elements receive mixed-radix token IDs encoding height, radial distance, local shape, and azimuth from local 3D geometry, in a compact sub-2KB representation. The same vocabulary is reorganized across three retrieval stages: height-ceiling histogram intersection for fast rotation-invariant shortlisting, binary bitmask alignment for yaw estimation and reranking, and token-guided geometric verification for 6-DoF pose estimation. InLiER achieves state-of-the-art performance on the HeLiPR dataset and in real-world field experiments, among modern handcrafted methods and outperforms the learning-based baseline on most cross-sensor configurations.

</details>


### [87] [InfoDense: Density-Aware Regional Decisive Replay for Memory-Efficient Incremental Face Forgery Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16873)
*Jikang Cheng,Hao Shen,Xueyi Zhang,Guangcheng Wang,Zhongyuan Wang,Renye Yan,Baojin Huang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出InfoDense策略，通过关注伪造特征密集区域，实现高效存储与高保真伪造证据保留，有效缓解灾难性遗忘并提升跨域泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统基于回放的增量人脸伪造检测方法在有限存储下难以兼顾细微伪造线索的保留与领域偏差的控制，导致模型学习能力下降。

Method: 提出InfoDense策略，包括：InfoDense Cut（基于CLIP嵌入定位关键片段）、InfoDense Select（结合潜在空间代表性与关键补丁数量排序候选片段）、InfoDense Fuse（自适应融合存储片段与当前任务样本以重建无偏训练输入）。

Result: 在多个具有挑战性的增量深度伪造基准测试中，InfoDense显著缓解了灾难性遗忘，并提升了跨域泛化性能。

Conclusion: InfoDense通过密度感知的区域决策回放机制，在降低存储开销的同时有效保留伪造特征，为应对持续演化的伪造威胁提供了高效且鲁棒的解决方案。

Abstract: The rapid evolution of face forgery techniques has introduced an increasing variety of manipulations. Incremental Face Forgery Detection (IFFD), which incrementally adds new forgery data to fine-tune previously trained models, has emerged as a promising approach to handle evolving forgery threats. However, conventional replay-based IFFD methods suffer from catastrophic forgetting. Storing full historical images under limited memory often either fails to preserve subtle forgery cues or introduces domain bias, reducing the model's ability to learn intrinsic and transferable manipulation characteristics. In this paper, we propose a Density-Aware Regional Decisive replay strategy, termed InfoDense, to address these challenges. InfoDense prioritizes artifact-dense and forgery-critical regions, significantly reducing storage requirements while maintaining high-fidelity forgery evidence. We first introduce InfoDense Cut to localize decisive patches using CLIP-based embeddings. Then, InfoDense Select ranks candidate segments by combining latent-space representativeness and decisive patch counts, ensuring both diversity and information density in the replay buffer. Finally, InfoDense Fuse reconstructs unbiased training inputs by adaptively merging stored segments with current-task samples, enhancing knowledge retention and generalization. Extensive experiments on challenging incremental deepfake benchmarks demonstrate that InfoDense effectively mitigates catastrophic forgetting while improving cross-domain generalization.

</details>


### [88] [Transferable Low-Rank Convolutional Bases for Onboarding Unseen Medical Imaging Modalities](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16888)
*Ranat Das Prangon,Istiaque Ahmed,Shajid Hasan Naim,Waseem Mustak Zisan,Hossain Md Shakhawat*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文研究在冻结预训练卷积主干网络（基于肾CT和脑MRI）的情况下，如何高效地将一个未见过的模态（胸片X-ray）接入系统，即‘onboarding’问题。提出一种基于低秩卷积基的参数高效微调方法，仅使用0.78%全量微调参数即可实现接近全量微调的性能，且对已有模态精度无损。实验表明，源域学习到的卷积基可有效迁移，而决策层基则无法可靠转移。同时，适配器方法能完全保留源域性能，而全微调会严重损害原有性能。通过马氏距离检测可有效识别新模态，作为触发上车的实用机制。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在医疗影像模型部署中，需不断接入从未见过的新成像模态（如胸片X-ray），但重新训练共享表示成本高且破坏已有模态性能。因此需要一种高效、安全的‘上车’机制，使模型在不干扰已服务模态的前提下适应新模态。

Method: 采用严格的留一域外协议：冻结在肾CT和脑MRI上预训练的卷积主干，仅对目标模态（胸片）进行参数高效微调。比较了线性探测、全连接LoRA、卷积LoRA及基于适配器的方法。核心创新在于利用源域学习到的低秩卷积基，并仅训练其上投影部分，实现极小参数量下的有效迁移。同时引入马氏距离分析冻结特征，用于检测未知模态。

Result: 卷积LoRA显著优于线性探测与全连接LoRA；所提出的低秩卷积基迁移方法仅用0.78%参数达到比随机基高6.11个百分点的准确率；适配器方法保持源域性能不变（Δ=0.00pp），而全微调虽提升目标性能却严重损害源域性能；马氏距离可在严格保留源域性能下高灵敏度检测新模态。所有结果均在三组种子上验证，具统计可靠性。

Conclusion: 在冻结主干前提下，通过迁移源域学习到的低秩卷积基并仅训练其上投影，可实现极小参数量、高性能且零源域性能损失的模态上车。该方法为医疗影像系统动态扩展提供了高效、安全的解决方案。

Abstract: Deploying a medical imaging model that must later accommodate a modality it has never seen is a recurring practical problem: retraining the shared representation is expensive and destroys performance on the modalities already in service. We study this \emph{onboarding} problem under a strict leave-one-domain-out protocol, in which a convolutional backbone is pre-trained on source modalities (Kidney CT and Brain MRI), frozen permanently, and then required to accommodate an unseen modality (Chest X-ray). Under this protocol we establish three findings. First, decision-layer parameter-efficient fine-tuning is insufficient when the backbone has never observed the target modality: a linear probe and fully-connected LoRA both fall well short, whereas convolutional LoRA recovers most of the achievable accuracy, showing that adaptation must reach the convolutional features. Second, and centrally, the low-rank convolutional \emph{basis} learned on the source modalities \emph{transfers}: freezing that basis and training only its up-projections onboards the unseen modality using just $0.78\%$ of full fine-tuning's parameters, at an accuracy $6.11$ percentage points above a random basis of identical size, while an equivalent decision-layer basis exhibits no reliable transfer. Third, adapter-based onboarding leaves source-modality accuracy exactly unchanged ($Δ= 0.00$ pp), whereas full fine-tuning reaches the highest target accuracy only by catastrophically degrading the source modalities. A Mahalanobis score on frozen backbone features detects the unseen modality with high sensitivity at a strict source-retention threshold, providing a practical trigger for when onboarding is required. All results are reported over three seeds with paired bootstrap confidence intervals.

</details>


### [89] [Pedestrian Archetypes Extension -- More Pedestrian Models for Autonomous Vehicle Safety Testing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16922)
*Taorui Huang,Namita Gaidhani,Ritvik Bansal,S M Jubaer,Regina Lim,Rhett Zhao,Gavin Rafael Selin,Sunnie Deng Gao,Hasnain N Syed*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文在先前提出的12种行人原型基础上，通过进一步标注YouTube行车记录仪视频，识别出7种新的行人行为原型。这些新原型描述了此前分类体系无法充分解释的行为模式，每种原型均定义了其核心与可选行为，并通过视频帧证据展示其实际表现，强调了其与原有原型的差异性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有行人行为分类体系（如先前提出的12种原型）不足以涵盖真实交通场景中观察到的所有行人行为模式，尤其是一些具有显著行为特征但未被充分识别的类型。因此需要扩展原有分类体系以更全面、自然地描述行人行为的多样性与复杂性。

Method: 通过对大量YouTube行车记录仪视频进行人工标注，识别出在行为模式上具有显著差异的新行人行为类型；基于观察结果，定义每个新原型的核心与可选行为特征，并与已有原型进行对比分析，辅以视频帧实例进行验证。

Result: 成功识别并定义了7个新的行人原型，这些原型在行为模式上与原有12种原型存在明显区别，能够更准确地反映现实交通中行人行为的多样性，为行人行为建模与交通安全研究提供了更丰富的分类基础。

Conclusion: 本研究扩展了原有的行人原型分类体系，引入7个新原型，增强了对复杂行人行为的理解与描述能力，有助于推动智能交通系统中行人行为预测与风险评估的准确性提升。

Abstract: In our prior work, Pedestrian Archetypes, we defined pedestrian archetypes as collections of behaviors that uniquely identify a specific type of pedestrian. The first paper proposed 12 pedestrian archetypes, including the Wanderer, Drunk, Distracted, Flash, Indecisive, Blind, Flock, Jaywalker, Elderly, Kid, Eventful, and Parked Pedestrian. These archetypes were introduced to move beyond single behavior labels and provide a more natural way to describe how dangerous pedestrians actually behave progressively in real-world traffic scenarios. However, upon further annotation of YouTube dash-cam videos, we identified 7 additional pedestrian archetypes with observable and significant behavioral differences from the previously proposed ones. These new archetypes capture pedestrian behavior patterns that could not be fully explained by the original taxonomy. In this pre-print, we introduce each new archetype, define its essential and optional behaviors, explain how it differs from previously proposed archetypes, and provide video-frame evidence showing the archetype in action.

</details>


### [90] [Splat-based 3D Scene Reconstruction with Extreme Motion-blur](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16926)
*Hyeonjoong Jang,Dongyoung Choi,Donggun Kim,Woohyun Kang,Min H. Kim*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出一种基于高斯点阵的3D场景重建方法，针对低光环境下因长曝光导致的严重运动模糊问题。通过结合相机位姿估计与图像去模糊，利用高斯点阵框架和深度输入提升场景表示能力。方法首先通过光流和ICP对齐连续的RGB-D帧，再通过调整高斯点位置优化深度对齐，从而精修相机位姿和3D几何结构。为处理运动模糊，建模曝光期间相机运动，并通过对比输入图像与一系列清晰渲染帧实现去模糊。在新构建的极端运动模糊RGB-D数据集上实验表明，该方法优于现有方法，可在恶劣条件下实现高质量3D重建。代码与数据集已公开。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在低光环境下，由于长曝光时间导致的严重运动模糊使传统相机位姿估计方法失效，进而影响3D重建质量。现有3D重建技术如神经辐射场和高斯点阵依赖准确的相机轨迹，但在快速运动或光照不足时难以实现。此外，快速运动与深度传感器视场限制导致点云重叠少，ICP算法效果受限。因此亟需一种能同时处理位姿估计与去模糊的新方法。

Method: 结合高斯点阵框架，利用RGB-D输入进行联合相机位姿估计与图像去模糊。先通过光流与ICP对齐相邻帧，再通过优化高斯点位置以实现最佳深度对齐，同时建模曝光期间相机运动，通过比较输入图像与多幅清晰渲染帧来实现去模糊。

Result: 在自建的极端运动模糊RGB-D数据集上，所提方法显著优于现有方法，在低光、高速运动等挑战性条件下仍能生成高质量3D重建结果。实验验证了其在相机位姿估计与去模糊方面的有效性。

Conclusion: 本文提出的方法有效解决了低光环境下由运动模糊引起的3D重建难题，通过联合优化位姿估计与去模糊，在复杂条件下实现了鲁棒且高质量的3D重建。该方法对机器人、自动驾驶和增强现实等应用具有重要意义。代码与数据集已开源。

Abstract: We propose a splat-based 3D scene reconstruction method from RGB-D input that effectively handles extreme motion blur, a frequent challenge in low-light environments. Under dim illumination, RGB frames often suffer from severe motion blur due to extended exposure times, causing traditional camera pose estimation methods, such as COLMAP, to fail. This results in inaccurate camera pose and blurry color input, compromising the quality of 3D reconstructions. Although recent 3D reconstruction techniques like Neural Radiance Fields and Gaussian Splatting have demonstrated impressive results, they rely on accurate camera trajectory estimation, which becomes challenging under fast motion or poor lighting conditions. Furthermore, rapid camera movement and the limited field of view of depth sensors reduce point cloud overlap, limiting the effectiveness of pose estimation with the ICP algorithm. To address these issues, we introduce a method that combines camera pose estimation and image deblurring using a Gaussian Splatting framework, leveraging both 3D Gaussian splats and depth inputs for enhanced scene representation. Our method first aligns consecutive RGB-D frames through optical flow and ICP, then refines camera poses and 3D geometry by adjusting Gaussian positions for optimal depth alignment. To handle motion blur, we model camera movement during exposure and deblur images by comparing the input with a series of sharp, rendered frames. Experiments on a new RGB-D dataset with extreme motion blur show that our method outperforms existing approaches, enabling high-quality reconstructions even in challenging conditions. This approach has broad implications for 3D mapping applications in robotics, autonomous navigation, and augmented reality. Both code and dataset are publicly available on https://github.com/KAIST-VCLAB/gs-extreme-motion-blur.

</details>


### [91] [Pediatric Bone Age Prediction Using Deep Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16936)
*Al Zadid Sultan Bin Habib,Md. Ekramul Islam,Md Asif Bin Syed,Md Younus Ahamed,Tanpia Tasnim*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的儿童骨龄预测方法，采用EfficientNet结合加性注意力机制（Additive Attention），利用超过12,000张手部X光片数据进行训练。通过图像预处理与三通道转换，模型自动提取手骨图像特征，相比EfficientNetB0，EfficientNetB4及其加性注意力变体（EN-AA）在预测精度上表现更优，且训练与验证损失曲线表明无过拟合或欠拟合现象，验证了该方法在儿科内分泌疾病诊断中的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统骨龄预测方法依赖人工判读，耗时且需专业放射学知识，难以满足临床高效、准确的需求，因此亟需自动化、智能化的替代方案。

Method: 采用EfficientNetB0、EfficientNetB4及加入加性注意力机制的EfficientNetB4（EN-AA）三种模型，对预处理后的手部X光图像进行训练，通过卷积神经网络自动学习骨结构特征，实现骨龄回归预测。

Result: 实验结果显示，EfficientNetB4和EN-AA模型在多数情况下比EfficientNetB0更接近真实骨龄，预测误差更小；学习曲线表明模型训练稳定，无过拟合或欠拟合问题，整体性能显著提升。

Conclusion: 所提出的基于EfficientNet与加性注意力机制的深度学习方法能够有效、准确地进行儿童骨龄预测，为儿科内分泌疾病的早期诊断提供有力支持，具有良好的临床应用前景。

Abstract: Pediatric bone age prediction is a crucial task in clinical practice that can help diagnose endocrine disorders and provide insight into a child's growth and development. However, conventional bone age prediction methods are often labor-intensive and require specialized radiological expertise. This paper presents a Deep Learning (DL)-based approach to pediatric bone age prediction using EfficientNet with Additive Attention, a state-of-the-art neural network architecture for image classification and regression tasks. The method utilizes over 12,000 X-ray images from the RSNA bone age dataset. It involves image preprocessing, transforming them into three-channel images, and training a Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) to automatically learn the features of hand bone images. This approach provides a more effective and accurate solution for predicting bone age, which is critical in diagnosing pediatric endocrine diseases. This work uses two variations of the EfficientNet model (B0 and B4), where EfficientNetB4 is also finetuned with the Additive Attention mechanism. These three models predict the age for the original age, and their comparison is shown in curves. The predicted ages depict that in most cases, EfficientNetB4 and EfficientNetB4 with Additive Attention (EN-AA) successfully predicted the bone ages more accurately regarding the original age, and their performance was better than the EfficientNetB0. Specific performance metrics are provided to underscore this improvement. Learning curves for training and validation loss confirm effective learning without overfitting or underfitting, further validating our approach's efficacy in pediatric endocrine disease diagnosis.

</details>


### [92] [What Do They See? Interpreting Complex Road Scenarios Through the Eyes of Vision-Language-Action Models for Safe and Trustworthy Autonomous Vehicle Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16938)
*Kalpana Panda,Wesley Maia,Vinti Agarwal,Ross Greer*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出CVAA框架，通过生成式修复移除图像中的物体，构建反事实数据集以分析模型行为的因果影响。实验发现车辆、行人对模型决策影响显著，交通灯虽占图像面积小但影响大，且模型有时对人类认为无关的物体反应强烈，揭示其内部表征可能不同于人类可理解的场景元素。结合机制可解释性分析，从行为审计走向表征理解，提升自动驾驶系统的可解释性与人机信任。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前端到端自动驾驶模型在复杂场景中表现优异，但其决策逻辑因交通场景复杂而难以解释。为提升安全关键系统透明度，需量化单个物体对模型行为的因果影响，进而理解其内部表征是否对应人类可理解的场景要素。

Method: 提出反事实视觉动作分析（CVAA）框架，利用高保真生成式修复技术从前视摄像头图像中移除检测到的物体，生成反事实图像对；结合原图与修复图对比模型输出差异，评估各物体的因果影响；进一步使用机制可解释性方法分析中间层表示变化，探究模型内部表征机制。

Result: 在nuScenes数据集210个场景中验证，车辆和行人对路径预测有主导性影响；交通灯虽图像占比小，但影响远超预期；部分情况下模型对人类认为无关的物体响应强烈，表明其内部表征可能不完全对应人类可识别的语义对象。

Conclusion: CVAA框架有效实现对自动驾驶模型的因果行为审计，并通过表征分析揭示其潜在内部机制。该方法推动从行为可解释向表征可解释演进，为构建可信、可解释的自动驾驶系统提供新路径。

Abstract: End-to-end autonomous driving models are now able to navigate complex road scenarios, mapping raw sensor observations directly to observed paths for open-loop evaluation and often effective driving in closed-loop evaluation. Yet the internal logic of these safety-critical systems remains largely opaque, due to the complexity of traffic scenes. We propose a counterfactual ablation framework called Counterfactual Vision Action Analysis (CVAA) that systematically removes individual detected objects from front-camera images using photorealistic generative inpainting to prepare counterfactual sets to evaluate the difference in the model's response. This isolates the causal effect of each object's presence on the model's planning behaviour. Applied to the Alpamayo 1 trajectory predictor across 210 nuScenes driving scenes, we create a dataset Counter -nuScenes, using which we see that vehicles and pedestrians within the model's 'path' dominate causal influence as expected, while traffic lights, as expected, exert disproportionate effect relative to their image footprint. However, we also find cases where the model responds strongly to objects a human driver would consider irrelevant. This brings forth a deeper question: does the model itself view the scene as a sum of individual objects influencing the outcome, or does it encode an entirely different set of internal features that do not correspond to human-legible scene elements? To further understand this, we compare intermediate representations of original and inpainted image pairs using mechanistic interpretability techniques and examine the effect of the removal through the various model layers. Together, these two stages offer a path from behavioral auditing to representational understanding, creating explainable driving systems and solidifying human-AI trust.

</details>


### [93] [When Physical Preferences Meet Semantic Constraints: Physical and Semantic Direct Preference Optimization for Text-to-Video Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16947)
*Siwei Meng,Yawei Luo,Shu Zhang,Ping Liu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出PSDPO方法，通过联合优化物理真实性和语义一致性，解决文本到视频生成中物理与语义之间的冲突问题。该方法在标准DPO框架内实现，无需额外模型或损失项，显著提升物理合理性（最高达2倍）并保持强语义一致性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有文本到视频生成模型在追求物理真实性时容易导致语义偏离输入文本，因为传统基于动态对比的偏好学习未考虑视频是否忠实于提示内容，从而引发系统性物理-语义冲突。

Method: 将问题建模为约束偏好优化，提出物理与语义直接偏好优化（PSDPO），根据物理与语义信号的一致性动态调节每对偏好贡献，并采用分阶段优化策略控制累积语义漂移。

Result: 在VideoPhy-2上物理合理性提升最高达2倍，在VBench上保持强语义一致性，优于现有基于偏好学习的方法，实现了更可靠的平衡。

Conclusion: PSDPO在不引入额外组件的情况下，有效缓解了物理与语义间的冲突，提升了文本到视频生成的质量与可靠性。

Abstract: Text-to-video (T2V) generation models have achieved strong visual realism, but improving physical plausibility can come at the cost of semantic consistency with the input text. This tension arises because physical preference is typically determined by comparing dynamics between two videos, without accounting for whether either video faithfully depicts the scene specified by the prompt, making physical-semantic conflict a systematic tendency under this supervision paradigm. We formulate this challenge as a constrained preference optimization problem and propose Physical and Semantic Direct Preference Optimization (PSDPO), which modulates each preference pair's contribution based on the agreement between its physical and semantic signals. A gradient-level analysis shows that PSDPO bounds the semantic drift from conflicting pairs to a controllable residual, and further motivates a staged optimization protocol that provably reduces cumulative drift. The resulting method operates entirely within the standard DPO framework, requiring no auxiliary models or additional loss terms. Experiments show that PSDPO improves physical plausibility by up to $2\times$ over the baseline on VideoPhy-2, while maintaining strong semantic consistency on VBench, achieving a more reliable balance than existing preference-based methods.

</details>


### [94] [Automated Cardiac Adipose Tissue Segmentation in Computed Tomography: A Literature Review](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16992)
*Andreas W. Aspe,Jonas Jalili Pedersen,Andreas Ohrt Johansen,Klaus Fuglsang Kofoed,Kristine Aavild Sørensen,Rasmus Reinhold Paulsen,Josefine Vilsbøll Sundgaard*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该综述概述了近年来在计算机断层扫描（CT）中自动分割心脏脂肪（包括心外膜脂肪组织EAT和心包脂肪组织PAT）的进展。由于这些脂肪与心血管疾病相关且解剖结构复杂，手动量化耗时且存在较大观察者间差异。自动化方法有效解决了这些问题，提供了更高效、一致的解决方案。研究涵盖人工智能及非人工智能方法，并指出仍需更大规模标注的公开数据集和优化对比增强CT的衰减阈值等挑战。结果表明，自动化方法可达到与人工标注相当的分割质量，具有作为临床工具发现新生物标志物并改善患者预后的潜力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 手动量化心脏脂肪组织（如EAT和PAT）耗时且受观察者间差异影响大，亟需更高效、一致的自动化方法以支持心血管疾病研究和临床应用。

Method: 系统综述了基于AI与非AI的自动化分割方法，涵盖多种技术路线，并分析其在CT图像中的表现与局限性。

Result: 自动化分割方法能达到与人工标注相当的精度，具备作为临床工具的潜力，有助于发现新生物标志物并提升患者管理效果。

Conclusion: 尽管面临数据集规模和参数优化等挑战，自动化分割技术已展现出显著优势，未来有望成为心血管影像分析的重要工具。

Abstract: This review provides an overview of recent advancements in automated segmentation methods on Computed Tomography (CT) for two types of cardiac fat: Epicardial adipose Tissue (EAT) and Pericardial Adipose Tissue (PAT). These fat deposits, separated by the pericardium, have been linked to various cardiovascular diseases, with EAT receiving the most research attention. Their complex anatomical context makes manual quantification highly time-consuming and prone to considerable inter-observer variability. Automated methods effectively address these complications, offering a more efficient and consistent solution. This study encompasses a broad range of methods, spanning AI as well as non-AI approaches. Additionally, it presents the remaining challenges, including the need for larger annotated public datasets and optimized attenuation thresholds for contrast-enhanced CT. It is demonstrated that automated methods are able to achieve segmentation results comparable to the quality of human annotation, proving their potential as a clinical tool for discovering new biomarkers and enhancing patient outcomes.

</details>


### [95] [EvoGUI: An Evolution-Aware Benchmark for GUI State-Transition Understanding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17050)
*Yaohan Yang,Minglei Shi,Borui Zhang,Jie Zhou,Jiwen Lu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: EvoGUI introduces a diagnostic framework that evaluates GUI agents' understanding of state transitions using three visual question answering probes derived from normalized GUI trajectories. It enables zero-shot evaluation on 3,000 instances across 120 domains without additional annotations. Despite model scale and specialization, performance remains limited (max 60.4 EvoGain), revealing significant room for improvement in reasoning about interface changes.


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Existing end-to-end evaluations of GUI agents conflate state-transition reasoning with perception, grounding, planning, and recovery, making it hard to isolate and assess the core ability to understand how actions transform interface states. A diagnostic tool is needed to measure this specific capability independently.

Method: EvoGUI converts normalized GUI trajectories into three probes: temporal ordering, inverse action/value prediction, and contrastive one-step successor discrimination. Labels are automatically generated from trajectory order and logged actions, eliminating the need for manual annotation.

Result: The strongest vision-language model achieves only 60.4 EvoGain on EvoGUI-Bench, which is built from Mind2Web and WebLINX. Model size and GUI-specific training do not consistently predict better performance, indicating substantial room for improvement in state-transition reasoning.

Conclusion: EvoGUI-Bench provides a scalable, annotation-free diagnostic benchmark for evaluating GUI agents' state-transition understanding, offering a complementary approach to end-to-end evaluation and highlighting major gaps in current models' reasoning capabilities.

Abstract: GUI agents must reason about how actions transform interface states, but end-to-end success rates entangle this ability with perception, grounding, planning, and recovery. We introduce EvoGUI, a diagnostic framework that converts normalized GUI trajectories into three complementary visual question answering probes: temporal ordering, inverse action/value prediction, and contrastive one-step successor discrimination. Their labels are derived from trajectory order and logged actions, requiring no additional task-label annotation after trajectory normalization. We instantiate EvoGUI-Bench from Mind2Web and WebLINX, yielding 3,000 instances across 120 domains, and evaluate 28 vision-language model configurations zero-shot. The strongest model reaches only 60.4 EvoGain, while model scale and GUI specialization do not reliably predict performance. These results establish EvoGUI-Bench as a scalable diagnostic complement to end-to-end GUI-agent evaluation while exposing substantial headroom in state-transition understanding. The source code is publicly available at https://github.com/Yyhhh6/EvoGUI.

</details>


### [96] [Searching for Task-Specific Vision Paths: Evolutionary Block Pruning Across Vision-Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17052)
*Tarun Tomar*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该研究探讨了在视觉-语言模型中，是否可以在不进行微调的情况下跳过固定预算的视觉模块组合。提出共享K-block路径和基于能力的K-block策略，通过源平衡进化搜索进行比较。实验表明，组合搜索能可靠提升路径构建效果，但能力标签无法定义通用的视觉路径。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视觉-语言模型对每个问题都执行相同的完整视觉编码器，即使某些查询（如OCR、计数、物体、属性、空间）并不需要相同计算量。为提高效率，研究探索能否在不微调的前提下跳过部分视觉块。

Method: 引入源平衡进化搜索，对比独立排序、连续移除和随机路径等方法，在相同预算下评估共享K-block路径与能力特定的K-block策略的表现。

Result: 在SmolVLM2上，搜索得到的共享四块路径比独立构建高出4.91个百分点；在Qwen上，六块能力特定策略比共享路径高2.17点，尤其在OCR任务上提升7.10点；但在IIIT5K数据集上，能力特定路径反而落后共享路径13.6点。

Conclusion: 组合搜索能有效改进路径构建，但能力标签并不能定义普遍适用的视觉处理路径，其效果具有依赖性。

Abstract: Vision-language models normally execute the same complete vision encoder for every question, even when OCR, counting, object, attribute, and spatial queries may not require identical computation. We study whether fixed-budget combinations of vision blocks can be skipped without fine-tuning. A shared K-block route skips one searched set of exactly K blocks for every question, while a capability-specific K-block policy selects one same-size route using a known capability label. We introduce a source-balanced evolutionary search and compare it with independent ranking, contiguous removal, and random routes at matched budgets. Experiments use Qwen2.5-VL-3B-Instruct, SmolVLM2-2.2B-Instruct, and an 876-example image-disjoint selection split. Search transfers across architectures: on SmolVLM2, the searched shared four-block route beats independent construction by 4.91 percentage points. Capability specialization is less stable. On Qwen, the six-block capability policy beats the shared route by 2.17 points, driven by a 7.10-point OCR gain. On sealed IIIT5K, however, the SmolVLM2 OCR-specific route trails its shared route by 13.6 points. Combinatorial search reliably improves route construction, but capability labels do not define universally transferable vision pathways.

</details>


### [97] [High-Capacity Robust Watermarking Technology for High-Resolution Images](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17056)
*Shaowu Wu,Wei Lu,Qing Qian,Mingsen Deng*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出一种高容量、鲁棒的高分辨率图像水印方法，可将4 KB（32,768位）水印嵌入1024×1024分辨率图像中，实现0.0313 bpp的嵌入率。采用分块策略提升局部区域嵌入效率，设计对称的卷积-反卷积编码器与解码器结构，结合全局与局部加权损失函数，增强视觉不可感知性与抗噪鲁棒性。实验验证该方法在高分辨率场景下具有高效性与强鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有水印技术多针对低分辨率图像，且嵌入容量固定，难以满足实际高分辨率、大容量水印需求。

Method: 采用分块嵌入策略，使用对称的三卷积三反卷积网络结构，结合全局与局部加权损失函数，实现水印的高效嵌入与提取。

Result: 可在1024×1024图像中嵌入4 KB水印，嵌入率达0.0313 bpp，具备良好的视觉不可感知性与对各类噪声攻击的强鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 所提方法有效解决了高分辨率图像中大容量水印嵌入难题，在保持图像质量的同时显著提升了鲁棒性，适用于实际应用。

Abstract: Most existing watermarking techniques are primarily designed for low-resolution images, with few methods tailored for high-resolution images. Moreover, the embedding capacity is often limited to fixed lengths (e.g., 30, 100, 256 bits, etc.), which struggles to meet practical demands. To address these issues, this paper proposes a high-capacity robust watermarking method for high-resolution images, capable of embedding a watermark of 4 KB (32,768 bits) into images with a resolution of 1024*1024, achieving an embedding rate of 0.0313 bpp. Specifically, this paper adopts a block-wise strategy to effectively embed the watermark into local regions, enabling the network to train and learn normally even under low-resource conditions. The encoder and decoder structures respectively employ a reversible symmetric architecture with three convolutional and three deconvolutional layers, ensuring consistency in the coupling and decoupling of the watermark and image features. Additionally, the loss function combines global and local losses with weighted contributions. By incorporating constraints on the visual quality and robustness of local block regions, the overall imperceptibility and robustness of the image are further enhanced. Extensive experimental results verify that the proposed method is effective and feasible in high-resolution image scenarios with high-capacity watermarking, while demonstrating strong robustness against various noise attacks.

</details>


### [98] [AdvSerial: Physical Adversarial Attacks on Infrastructure-mounted Pedestrian Detectors via Semantic Feature Suppression](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17069)
*Yuanhao Huang,Yilong Ren,Jinlei Wang,Xuesong Bai,Jinchuan Zhang,Haiyang Yu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: AdvSerial提出一种动态2D-3D联合优化框架，用于生成针对基础设施场景中行人检测器的连续高角度物理对抗补丁。通过在3D服装上进行边界感知的拼接纹理映射，结合2D数字攻击与3D稀疏及连续帧渲染，并抑制特定人物语义特征同时保证时间连续性。采用特征平滑拼接策略减少补丁边界可见性，串行帧损失鼓励长时间检测失败。物理实验显示，该方法在YOLO-v5上实现74.8%攻击成功率，将平均检测置信度从84.30%降至39.38%，且对八种不同架构检测器具有强迁移性，甚至在YOLO-v2上达到89.71%成功率，并有效规避NapGuard和Sparse4D-v3等防御机制。结果揭示了高角度监控下的持续、时序一致的失效模式，推动设计更注重运动与3D感知的防御方案。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: AI视觉感知系统在交通基础设施监控中的广泛应用使其面临物理对抗攻击的安全威胁，尤其在高角度监控场景下，现有方法难以生成连续、隐蔽且高转移性的对抗补丁，亟需更有效的攻击框架以暴露系统脆弱性并推动安全防御升级。

Method: 提出动态2D-3D联合优化框架AdvSerial，包括：1）基于边界感知的拼接纹理映射至3D服装；2）融合2D数字攻击与3D稀疏/连续帧渲染；3）显式抑制人特异性语义特征；4）引入特征平滑拼接策略降低补丁边界可见性；5）设计串行帧损失函数确保长时间检测失败序列。

Result: 在物理世界实验中，AdvSerial在YOLO-v5上实现74.8%攻击成功率，检测置信度由84.30%降至39.38%；在八种不同检测器上表现出强迁移能力，其中对YOLO-v2达89.71%成功率；可有效绕过NapGuard（patch-detection防御）和Sparse4D-v3（3D-temporal感知防御）。

Conclusion: 研究揭示了高角度监控系统中存在的持续性、时序一致的检测失效模式，表明当前基础设施部署的视觉系统存在显著安全漏洞，亟需发展面向运动与3D感知的新型防御机制以保障关键基础设施的可靠性与安全性。

Abstract: AI-based visual perception systems are increasingly deployed in infrastructure surveillance, including roadside monitoring units, highway cameras, and smart-city pedestrian management systems. The security vulnerability of these systems to physical adversarial attacks poses a direct threat to the reliable operation of transportation infrastructure. We propose AdvSerial, a dynamic 2D--3D joint optimization framework for generating continuous high-angle physical adversarial patches against pedestrian detectors in infrastructure-based scenarios. We UV-map a boundary-aware quilted texture onto 3D garments, combine 2D digital attacks with 3D sparse- and continuous-frame rendering, and explicitly suppress person-specific semantic features while enforcing temporal continuity. A Feature Smooth Quilting strategy reduces visible patch boundaries and bounds cross-seam feature discontinuities. A serial-frame loss encourages long uninterrupted sequences of detection failures. In physical world experiments, AdvSerial achieves a 74.8% attack success rate on YOLO-v5 and degrades mean detection confidence from 84.30% to 39.38%. Experiments spanning eight detectors with different architectures demonstrate strong transferability. Notably, it achieves an $89.71%$ attack success rate on YOLO-v2 and resists both patch-detection defenses (NapGuard) and 3D-temporal perception (Sparse4D-v3). The results reveal persistent, temporally consistent failure modes under high-angle surveillance, and motivate the design of motion-aware and 3D-aware defenses for security-critical infrastructure deployments.

</details>


### [99] [ALLUDE: A Unified Evaluation System for Configurable Attacks in Differentiable Environments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17077)
*Mansi Phute,Alexander Greenhalgh,Matthew Hull,Haoran Wang,Alec Helbling,ShengYun Peng,Elliott Faa,Willian Lunardi,Martin Andreoni,Wenke Lee,Duen Horng Chau*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: ALLUDE 是一个统一的、跨平台的系统，用于在多样化的真实世界条件下对视觉模型（如目标检测器）的对抗攻击进行端到端、可微分的评估。它支持多种场景、物体、天气条件、相机轨迹和优化器配置，通过拉丁超立方采样覆盖5400种配置，并对现有攻击方法（CAMOU, RAUCA, FCA）在动态环境中的表现进行压力测试，揭示了以往评估的不足。该系统实现了对真实部署条件的鲁棒性优化，代码开源。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前对抗攻击评估多限于有限条件，缺乏对复杂真实场景（如变化天气、连续相机运动）下攻击性能的全面分析，且缺少一个统一、易用的工具支持多场景、多参数的可微分评估。

Method: 采用端到端可微分渲染技术，结合拉丁超立方采样从大规模配置空间中选取代表性样本，实现对多种场景-物体组合、天气、优化器、相机轨迹和检测模型的系统性评估；通过持续动态环境测试攻击鲁棒性。

Result: 揭示了现有攻击在不同天气和连续相机轨迹下的成功率普遍下降，暴露出此前评估体系的局限性；验证了ALLUDE在跨平台、多条件评估中的有效性与全面性。

Conclusion: ALLUDE 提供了首个全面、可定制、跨平台的对抗攻击评估框架，支持在真实世界动态条件下进行端到端优化，显著提升了对抗攻击评估的可信度与实用性，其开源代码将促进后续研究。

Abstract: Adversarial attacks against vision models like object detectors are often evaluated under limited conditions, leaving their performance under-characterized. Bridging simulation and differentiable rendering enables more robust, end-to-end evaluation of these adversarial attacks, yet there is no easy-to-use, unified system that offers a rich set of customizable configurations for adversarial attacks across multiple scenes, objects, environmental and lighting conditions, and camera trajectories. We present ALLUDE, which addresses these gaps, offering first-of-its-kind evaluation capabilities across Linux and Windows. We comprehensively demonstrate ALLUDE's evaluation breadth through a two-pronged strategy: (1) using Latin Hypercube Sampling, we draw a representative subset from 5,400 configurations spanning 10 scene-object pairs, 9 weather conditions, 4 optimizers, 5 camera trajectories, and 3 detection models; (2) we stress-test existing attacks (CAMOU, RAUCA, FCA) under diverse weather conditions and continuous camera trajectories, revealing degradation of attack success across every attack, exposing evaluation gaps in prior work. Through ALLUDE's end-to-end differentiable rendering, adversarial attacks can be optimized against shifting real-world deployment conditions. Our cross-platform code is open source.

</details>


### [100] [Autoregressive B-Rep Shape Generation with Parametric Surfaces](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17093)
*Dafei Qin,Rui Xu,Zeyu Shen,Kaichun Qiao,Hongyang Lin,Qixuan Zhang,Huaijin Pi,Lan Xu,Jingyi Yu,Wenping Wang,Taku Komura*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: ParaCAD 是一种基于点云条件的自回归框架，用于直接操作原生参数化曲面的边界表示（B-Rep）生成。它通过表面中心化的标记化方法，显式编码每个面的精确曲面类型和连续参数，保留了CAD几何的内在语义。模型首先生成具有约束UV域的参数化曲面，再通过全局相交恢复边和顶点以构建有效的B-Rep。该方法在点云对齐精度、几何保真度、鲁棒性、封闭性和下游可用性方面优于现有基于点的方法，适用于用户引导重建和与现有3D生成流程无缝集成。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有B-Rep生成方法依赖于均匀采样的点或网格表示，牺牲了原生曲面类型和参数，导致几何保真度和下游可用性受限。需要一种能直接处理参数化曲面、保留几何语义的新方法。

Method: 提出ParaCAD框架，采用表面中心化标记化，将每个面的曲面类型和连续参数显式编码；先生成带约束UV域的参数化曲面，再通过全局相交恢复边与顶点，构建有效B-Rep。

Result: ParaCAD在几何精度、鲁棒性、封闭性及下游可用性方面显著优于点基基线方法，能实现高保真的点云对齐与用户引导重建，支持与现有3D生成流程无缝集成。

Conclusion: ParaCAD实现了从点云到高保真B-Rep的直接生成，通过保留参数化曲面的内在语义，提升了生成质量与实用性，为未来智能CAD建模提供了新范式。

Abstract: Generative CAD modeling has broad design and application potential.
