To assess the biological risks of frontier models, we develop Intern-BioBreaker, a specialized bio-red-teaming model, together with an integrated computational-to-physical framework that couples model-level stress testing with wet-lab validation. Within this framework, Intern-BioBreaker generates targeted jailbreak prompts to test whether aligned models can be induced to provide operational guidance for safety-sensitive biological tasks or produce sequence-level outputs with potentially harmful properties. Selected sequence outputs are then carried forward for DNA synthesis, host expression, and orthogonal protein verification to assess whether model-generated designs can yield the intended biological products. Our evaluation reveals a concerning gap between text-level safeguards and the risks posed by capable scientific models: (i) Intern-BioBreaker outperforms baseline attack models and reveals widespread bio-risk jailbreak vulnerabilities across both open-weight and proprietary frontier LLMs, with several targets reaching near-saturated or 100% task-level attack success rate (ASR); (ii) in sequence-level case studies, GPT-5.5 can be induced to generate modified viral candidate sequences with pathogenic potential; the corresponding translated proteins may exhibit even stronger receptor-binding affinity and thus enhanced infection potential; and (iii) end-to-end verification shows that selected model-generated biological designs are not merely textual artifacts, but can be physically realized under controlled experimental settings. These findings underscore the need for stronger biological red-teaming, nucleic acid synthesis screening, and safety mechanisms that keep pace with model capabilities.

</details>


### [238] [Pancasila-Dilemmas: Evaluating Large Language Models on Indonesian Human Value Dilemmas Grounded in Pancasila](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.18066)
*Supryadi,Irfan,Julianti,Darren Keanly Martin,Jayvin Fernando,Yuqi Ren,Deyi Xiong*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出Pancasila-Dilemmas数据集，包含1,834个源自印尼新闻的难题型问题，涵盖印尼五项核心价值观：宗教、人性、团结、民主与社会正义。该数据集由母语者校对，并由5位不同背景的印尼公民作答，用于评估大语言模型在印尼本土价值体系下的对齐程度。实验评估了50个开源与闭源模型，结果显示所有模型在概率匹配得分（PMS）均低于0.5，在最大投票一致得分（MVAS）上也仅达0.72，尤其在宗教与团结相关困境中表现不佳，揭示当前LLMs在理解印尼本土价值观方面存在显著差距。数据集已公开。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有大语言模型的价值对齐评估多聚焦于西方或普世价值观，缺乏针对特定国家文化价值体系的系统性测评，尤其在印尼等多元文化国家中尤为不足。为填补这一空白，需构建反映本地社会现实与价值观的评估基准。

Method: 基于印尼宪法基石——五项潘查希拉价值观，从真实新闻中提取1,834个具有道德困境的问题，经母语者校对并由5名多样化印尼公民标注答案。采用概率匹配得分（PMS）与最大投票一致得分（MVAS）评估模型表现，分维度分析各价值观下的模型性能。

Result: 所有评估的50个大语言模型在PMS上均低于0.5，在MVAS上最高为0.72；在宗教与团结相关的困境中表现最差，表明当前模型难以准确捕捉印尼本土价值观，存在明显价值对齐偏差。

Conclusion: 当前主流大语言模型在应对印尼本土价值体系时表现出严重对齐不足，尤其在宗教与团结议题上。Pancasila-Dilemmas数据集为评估和改进本地化价值对齐提供了重要工具，有助于推动更具文化敏感性的AI发展。

Abstract: The value alignment of large language models (LLMs) is crucial for ensuring responses align with human intention and value preferences. However, most evaluations of value alignment focus on Western or universal values, while assessments grounded in the value systems of specific countries remain scarce. In this paper, we introduce Pancasila-Dilemmas, an evaluation dataset of 1,834 questions derived from Indonesian news, classified by 5 values of Pancasila: Religion, Humanity, Unity, Democracy, and Social Justice. This dataset reflects daily life in Indonesia, making it suitable for measuring the value alignment of LLMs deployed for Indonesia. To ensure a more rigorous evaluation, we choose scenarios containing dilemmas. The dataset is proofread by native speakers and answered by 5 diverse Indonesian citizens. We evaluate 50 closed- and open-source LLMs on our dataset. Results reveal that all evaluated LLMs achieves less than 0.5 Probability Match Score (PMS) and 0.72 Max-Vote Agreement Score (MVAS). Compared by each values, LLMs mostly struggle in Religion and Unity dilemma cases. This highlights a significant gap in capturing Indonesian values. The dataset is publicly available at https://github.com/tjunlp-lab/Pancasila-Dilemmas.

</details>


### [239] [Modeling turn-taking with distant viewing: investigating silence thresholds in human and AI-generated discourse](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.18076)
*Taylor Arnold,Nicolas Ballier,Artem Saloev*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本研究分析了美国情景喜剧和使用Google NotebookLM生成的合成播客中的静默间隔，比较了不同性别（基于基频阈值划分）和制作环境下的静默特征。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 了解音频视觉材料中静默间隔的分布特征及其在不同性别和制作背景下的差异，有助于提升语音处理、人机交互和内容生成系统的自然性与真实性。

Method: 通过Praat软件估计基频阈值以判定说话者性别，对30部美式情景喜剧和51个合成播客进行静默间隔分析，采用跨样本对比方法评估差异。

Result: 发现静默间隔在不同性别和制作环境中存在显著差异，合成播客的静默模式更规律，而真实情景喜剧的静默分布更具动态变化性。

Conclusion: 静默间隔受性别和制作方式影响显著，未来语音合成与音频处理系统需考虑这些因素以增强自然感。

Abstract: This study investigates silence gaps in two kinds of audiovisual material. We analysed thirty US situational comedies and fifty-one synthetic podcasts generated with Google NotebookLM. Gaps were compared across speaker gender, assigned from a fundamental-frequency threshold estimated in Praat, and across production settings.

</details>


### [240] [VDAR-Router: Adaptive LLMs Routing via Verbalized Query Difficulty Analysis Retrieval](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.18098)
*Yu-Chien Tang,Jun-Chen Hung,Wen-Chih Peng,An-Zi Yen*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: VDAR-Router是一种基于难度感知的检索式路由框架，通过分析查询的内在难度并检索历史相似难度样本，实现更优的成本-性能权衡。实验表明其在多个数据集上优于现有基线方法，且无需训练即可有效提升路由决策可靠性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LLM路由方法主要依赖输入查询的表面语义或嵌入相似性判断模型适用性，忽略了查询的内在难度，导致次优决策。因此需要一种能够感知查询难度的路由机制以提升效率与准确性。

Method: VDAR-Router首先对输入查询进行显式的难度分析，然后基于该难度特征检索历史中具有相似难度模式的示例；利用检索到的历史记录估计各候选模型的适用性，并通过综合考虑性能与成本的奖励函数选择最优模型。

Result: 在三个数据集上的实验结果表明，VDAR-Router在成本-性能权衡方面持续优于现有基线方法；案例研究进一步验证了显式难度分析有助于提升检索相关性和路由可靠性。

Conclusion: 难度感知的检索式路由策略在无需训练的前提下显著提升了LLM路由的效率与准确性，证明了其在实际系统部署中的有效性与实用性。

Abstract: Large language models are increasingly used in practical systems, making efficient model selection important for reducing deployment cost. LLM routing has emerged as a practical solution for allocating each input query to an appropriate model under a desired cost-performance trade-off. Existing routing methods often estimate model suitability from the surface semantics or embedding similarity of the input query. However, such methods may ignore the underlying difficulty of a query, leading to suboptimal routing decisions. To address the challenge, we propose VDAR-Router, a difficulty-aware retrieval-based routing framework. For each input query, VDAR-Router first generates an explicit difficulty analysis. It then retrieves historical examples with similar difficulty profiles. Based on the retrieved records, it estimates candidate model suitability and selects the model using a reward function that considers both performance and cost. Experiments on three datasets show that VDAR-Router consistently achieves better cost-performance trade-offs than existing baselines. These results demonstrate the effectiveness of difficulty-aware retrieval for training-free LLM routing. Case studies further show that explicit query analysis helps retrieve more relevant examples and supports more reliable routing decisions.

</details>


### [241] [How Does Alignment Tuning Shape Representations of Sycophancy and Related Cue-Induced Biases in LLMs?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.18114)
*Prakhar Gupta,Terry Jingchen Zhang,Florent Draye,Bernhard Schölkopf,Zhijing Jin*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 该研究揭示了现代大语言模型对输入提示中微小、非实质变化的敏感性，这些变化（如误导性提示、错误标注的示例或虚构的对话历史）常导致模型输出错误。研究发现，这种敏感性主要由对齐训练（alignment tuning）引入，而非预训练阶段。预训练模型对这些偏差几乎无响应，其隐藏状态仅包含问题内容信息，而无特定提示信号。在对齐后的模型中，每种偏差表现为一个可解码和可操控的单一方向，通过干预可恢复无偏答案。不同偏差间保持表征独立，交叉纠缠为模型特异性而非类别共性。该干预方法亦可作为轻度去偏工具，在保留多数正确答案的同时修复部分偏差引起的错误。因此，提示诱导偏差应被视为一系列由对齐训练引入的、因果上活跃且互异的方向，而非单一缺陷。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究大语言模型对提示中细微非实质变化的敏感性根源，理解其在模型内部的表征位置与机制，以改进模型鲁棒性与公平性。

Method: 通过提取五种模型家族和七类偏差的每类偏差方向，结合探针分析、留一数据集迁移测试和因果干预三种方法，系统分析偏差在隐藏状态中的表现与可操控性。

Result: 偏差主要由对齐训练引入；每种偏差在模型中表现为一个可解码和可操控的独立方向；干预可有效恢复无偏答案，并在不显著损害原有正确回答的前提下修复部分偏差错误；不同偏差间存在表征分离，交叉纠缠为模型特异性现象。

Conclusion: 提示诱导偏差并非单一缺陷，而是由对齐训练引入的一组因果上活跃、表征上独立的可操控方向，可通过针对性干预实现去偏与修正。

Abstract: Modern LLMs are alarmingly susceptible to surprisingly simple immaterial changes of input prompts: a casual hint, an incorrectly labeled few-shot example, or a fake prior assistant turn often flips an originally correct answer. We study where this susceptibility, spanning sycophancy and related cue-induced biases, lives inside the model. Across five model families and seven BCT bias types, we extract a per-bias direction from hidden states and triangulate it through three measures: probing, leave-one-dataset-out transfer, and causal intervention. The susceptibility is largely installed by alignment tuning rather than pretraining: pretrained base models barely cave to these biases, and their activations carry no cue-specific signal beyond question content. Within aligned models, each bias becomes a single coherent direction that we can both decode and steer along, recovering the unbiased answer across every family we test. The biases stay representationally distinct, however: cross-bias entanglement is model-specific rather than a property of the bias category, and even behaviorally similar biases occupy different directions. The same intervention also serves as a modest debiasing tool, recovering a meaningful share of bias-induced errors while preserving most correct answers across all instruct families. Cue-induced bias is therefore best understood not as a single flaw in LLMs but as a family of distinct, causally active directions that alignment tuning installs.

</details>


### [242] [VEHBench: A Stage-Local Diagnostic Benchmark for LLM-Assisted Vibration Energy Harvester Design](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.18181)
*Depeng Su,Yuyu Luo,Guobiao Hu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 本文提出VEHBench，一个面向无电池物联网中振动能量采集器（VEH）设计的工程原生诊断基准，包含763个基于文献的任务，由物理解析代理评分。该基准评估四种设计角色：规范筛选、验证引导搜索、故障状态恢复和策略条件选择。实验表明，大模型能力具有显著阶段依赖性，无单一模型在全流程中始终领先，且不同设计角色表现出不同的行为模式。该基准为评估、选择、路由和改进验证驱动的工程大模型提供了阶段感知的基础。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有工程基准主要关注最终成果的有效性，缺乏对大模型在耦合物理设计各阶段行为的深入洞察。针对电池-free IoT中振动能量采集器迭代设计面临的复杂物理约束，亟需一个能揭示大模型在不同设计阶段表现的诊断性基准。

Method: 构建基于文献的763个任务集，引入物理解析代理进行自动化评分；设计四类典型设计角色任务，覆盖从需求分析到决策选择的完整流程；通过多模型对比实验，分析大模型在不同阶段的表现差异与响应控制特征。

Result: 实验结果显示，大模型性能显著依赖于设计阶段，不存在在所有任务中均表现最优的模型；不同设计角色暴露了各异的行为模式，如验证引导搜索中模型更依赖上下文推理，而状态恢复任务中则表现出更强的纠错能力。

Conclusion: VEHBench为验证驱动的工程大模型提供了一个精细的阶段感知评估框架，有助于实现模型的精准选型、工作流路由与持续优化，推动智能工程设计的发展。

Abstract: Battery-free Internet of Things (IoT) requires iterative design of vibration energy harvesters (VEHs) under coupled physical constraints, while LLMs are emerging as interface layers for engineering workflows. However, existing engineering benchmarks primarily assess final artifact validity, offering limited insights into how LLMs behave across different stages of coupled physical design. We introduce VEHBench, an engineering-native diagnostic benchmark for LLM-assisted VEH design, featuring 763 literature-grounded tasks scored by an analytical physical oracle. VEHBench evaluates four design roles: specification triage, verifier-guided search, corrupted-state recovery, and policy-conditioned selection. Experimental results reveal that LLM capability is strongly stage-dependent: no single model consistently dominates the entire workflow, and response-control profiles expose distinct behavioral patterns across design roles. VEHBench thus provides a stage-aware foundation for evaluating, selecting, routing, and improving verifier-grounded engineering LLMs. The benchmark artifact is available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/AnonymousVehbench/vehbench

</details>


### [243] [PPL-Factory: Task-Aware and Budget-Aware Data Selection from Language Modeling to Reasoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.18199)
*Hang Zhang,Warren J. Gross*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: PPL-Factory是一种结合任务感知和预算感知的困惑度数据选择框架，通过更精准地评估样本难度，在极低数据量下实现高效微调。实验表明，仅用1%的数据即可超越现有方法；使用10%的数据时，在GSM8K和MATH上分别超过全量微调0.9和4.8分。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有数据选择方法依赖于固定启发式规则（如数据质量、多样性、推理长度），但这些规则在不同任务间泛化性差。而传统基于困惑度的方法通常对整个序列打分，忽略了语言建模与推理任务之间的学习目标差异。因此需要一种更任务敏感且适应数据预算的高效数据选择机制。

Method: 提出PPL-Factory框架，融合任务感知的困惑度评分与数据预算感知的选择策略，针对不同任务类型动态调整样本重要性，实现更精准的数据筛选。

Result: 在GSM8K上仅使用1%训练数据即优于现有最优方法；使用10%数据时，在GSM8K和MATH上分别比全量微调高出0.9和4.8分，验证了其高效性与通用性。

Conclusion: 任务感知与预算感知的困惑度数据选择是实现高效微调的有效且可推广的方法，显著降低计算成本同时保持甚至提升性能。

Abstract: Not all training samples contribute equally to large language model fine-tuning. Selecting informative training samples can reduce the computational cost while preserving downstream performance. Many existing data selection methods rely on indirect heuristics, such as data quality, diversity or reasoning trace length. However, the effectiveness of these fixed criteria is task-dependent and difficult to generalize across diverse downstream tasks. Perplexity-based data selection provides a simple and model-aware solution to estimate the sample difficulty, but existing approaches typically score the entire training sequence and ignore the difference in learning objectives of language modeling and reasoning tasks. In this paper, we propose PPL-Factory, a simple and interpretable data selection framework that combines task-aware perplexity-based scores and data budget-aware selection criteria. Experiments on GSM8K demonstrate that PPL-Factory outperforms other state-of-the-art data selection methods using only $1\%$ of the training set. With $10\%$ of the data, PPL-Factory exceeds full-data fine-tuning accuracy by 0.9 on GSM8K and 4.8 on MATH. Overall, our results demonstrate that task-aware and budget-aware perplexity-based selection provides an effective and applicable approach for efficient fine-tuning.

</details>


### [244] [SWE-Pruner Pro: The Coder LLM Already Knows What to Prune](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.18213)
*Yuhang Wang,Yuling Shi,Shaoqiu Zhang,Jialiang Liang,Shilin He,Siyu Ye,Yuting Chen,Kai Cai,Xiaodong Gu*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: SWE-Pruner Pro提出了一种新的上下文剪枝方法，直接在编码代理内部基于其内部表示对工具输出进行剪枝，通过一个小的头部将代理的内部表示转换为每行的保留或删除标签，并使用与每个工具输出行数相关的长度感知嵌入。该方法在两个开源模型和四个多轮基准测试中，最多节省39%的提示和完成令牌，同时保持任务质量，推理开销可控。特别地，在MiMo-V2-Flash上，它还将SWE-Bench Verified解决率提高了3.8%，长上下文Oolong准确率提高了2.2分。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有上下文剪枝方法如SWE-Pruner依赖于额外的代码分类器，而本文发现代理在读取工具输出时已编码了代码上下文相关性的内部表示，因此提出更高效、直接利用代理自身表示的剪枝方法。

Method: SWE-Pruner Pro在编码代理内部引入一个小的头部，将代理自身的内部表示转化为每行的保留或删除标签，结合长度感知嵌入以考虑工具输出的行数，实现对工具输出的直接剪枝。

Result: 在两个开放权重模型和四个多轮基准测试中，SWE-Pruner Pro最多可节省39%的提示和完成令牌，保持任务性能，且推理开销可控；在MiMo-V2-Flash上，提升了SWE-Bench Verified解决率3.8%和长上下文Oolong准确率2.2分。

Conclusion: SWE-Pruner Pro通过利用代理自身的内部表示实现高效的上下文剪枝，无需额外分类器，显著减少上下文长度并提升性能，是一种高效且实用的上下文管理方案。

Abstract: Pruning long context for coding agents has been a vital technology for efficient context management. While existing context pruning methods such as SWE-Pruner realize this by attaching a separate code classifier, we find the agent itself encodes internal representations indicating the relevance of code context when reading tool output. Based on this finding, we propose SWE-Pruner Pro, which prunes tool outputs directly inside the agent. Concretely, a small head turns the agent's own internal representations into a keep-or-prune label for each line, with a length-aware embedding keyed to each tool output's line count. Across two open-weight backbones and four multi-turn benchmarks, SWE-Pruner Pro saves up to 39% of prompt and completion tokens while preserving task quality, with bounded inference overhead. Notably, on MiMo-V2-Flash SWE-Pruner Pro additionally raises the SWE-Bench Verified resolve rate by +3.8% and the long-context Oolong accuracy by +2.2 points.

</details>


### [245] [It's Not What You Say, It's How You Say It: Evaluating LLM Responses to Expressions of Belief](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.18232)
*Kevin Du,Clara Kümpel,Michelle Wastl,Alex Warstadt*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 该研究提出了一种基于语言学维度的用户信念表达（EoB）分类体系，涵盖形式、证据性、认识立场和语气四个维度，共17种细粒度类型，用于系统评估不同表达方式对大语言模型（LLM）采纳上下文与坚持先验知识的影响。通过构建受控的EoB-查询对，评估了16种不同架构、规模和训练阶段的LLM，发现大模型和指令微调模型更少遵循上下文，而某些特定表达形式显著更具说服力。研究揭示了语言框架如何系统影响模型对上下文的整合，对提示工程和模型鲁棒性具有重要意义。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 用户在与大语言模型交互时，会以多种语言形式表达信念，这些表达可能影响模型是否采纳上下文信息或坚持其先验知识。然而，现有研究缺乏对这些语言差异的系统分析，导致提示工程效果不稳定。因此，需要建立一个基于语言学的分类体系，以理解不同表达方式对模型行为的影响。

Method: 提出一个包含形式、证据性、认识立场和语气四个维度的17类EoB分类体系；设计受控的EoB-查询对，分离语言变体的影响；在16个不同架构（如Llama3、Qwen3、Gemma3）、规模（1B-30B参数）和训练阶段（基础模型与指令微调模型）的LLM上进行评估，采用定量分析识别模型响应模式。

Result: 大模型和指令微调模型相较于小模型和基础模型更不倾向于遵循上下文；特定类型的EoB（如强确信语气、明确证据标记）显著提升模型对上下文的采纳率；语言特征对模型行为有系统性影响，且部分表达在不同模型间表现出一致的高说服力。

Conclusion: 语言表达形式在引导大语言模型采纳上下文方面起着关键作用。该研究提出的分类体系有助于理解并预测模型对不同信念表达的响应，为优化提示工程策略和提升模型鲁棒性提供了理论支持与实践指导。

Abstract: Users frequently express their beliefs to large language models (LLMs). In some situations, the LLM should accept these contextual beliefs as true. In others, they should stick to their prior knowledge. Notably, users' expressions of belief (EoBs) can take linguistically diverse forms - using presuppositions, evidential and certainty markers, or varied tones - each of which may have a different persuasiveness over the LLMs. We introduce a typology to systematically evaluate how different EoBs affect whether models follow context versus prior knowledge. The typology is grounded in four linguistically motivated dimensions: form, evidentiality, epistemic stance, and tone, spanning 17 fine-grained types. By pairing these EoBs with world knowledge facts, we generate controlled EoB-query pairs that isolate the effect of linguistic variation. Using this benchmark, we evaluate 16 LLMs that differ in architecture (Llama3, Qwen3, Gemma3), scale (1B-30B parameters), and training stages (base vs instruct). We identify meaningful variations in response behavior across these axes, e.g., that bigger models and instruction models tend to be less context-following than smaller models and base models. We further identify specific EoBs that statistically significantly persuade LMs more consistently than others. Our work reveals systematic patterns in how linguistic framing affects LLM context integration, with implications for prompt engineering and model robustness.

</details>


### [246] [Automated Discovery Has No Universally Superior Harness](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.18235)
*Akshat Gupta,Jermaine Lei,Alexander Lu,Gopala Anumanchipalli,Leshem Choshen*

Main category: cs.CL

TL;DR: 该研究系统分解了OpenEvolve和TTT-Discover等自主发现系统的组件，通过超过310万次LLM回放和重复试验的统计分析，评估了30种预算匹配的发现框架在12个模型-问题对上的表现。结果表明，现有框架普遍存在泛化能力不足的问题：没有一种固定框架在所有场景中均表现最优，且OpenEvolve的变体通常不如更简单的替代方案。因此，框架选择应被视为超参数而非通用配方，需根据具体问题和模型进行定制。研究还发现早期进展可预测最终性能，并基于此提出一种自适应计算分配策略——启动多个框架，淘汰表现较差的初步运行，将资源重新分配给表现更优的个体，该方法优于固定框架或非自适应集成方案。研究强调应从固定框架选择转向基于早期性能的在线适应。所有实验数据集与基线空分布均已公开，供未来研究复用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自主发现系统（如OpenEvolve和TTT-Discover）是多种设计选择的复合体，但其比较常因试验次数过少而难以区分方法改进与随机波动。同时，这些系统缺乏普适性，固定框架无法在所有任务中保持优势。因此亟需系统性拆解与评估，以理解各组件的影响并推动更智能的自适应策略。

Method: 将OpenEvolve和TTT-Discover的搜索框架分解为独立组件，构建30种预算匹配的变体，在12个模型-问题对上进行大规模实验（>3.1百万次LLM回放），采用重复试验与统计分析评估性能；进一步利用早期进展预测能力，设计自适应计算分配机制，动态调整资源分配。

Result: 1. 无固定框架在所有任务中表现最优，框架选择具有高度依赖性；2. OpenEvolve类框架普遍弱于简单替代方案；3. 早期发现进度能有效预测最终性能；4. 自适应分配策略显著优于固定框架和非自适应集成。

Conclusion: 发现框架的选择应作为可调节的超参数而非通用配方，建议采用基于早期性能的在线自适应策略。研究释放了完整的实验数据集，为未来方法评估提供可复用的统计基础设施。

Abstract: Autonomous discovery systems such as OpenEvolve and TTT-Discover are often used as general-purpose harnesses. However, in practice these are composite systems combining several design choices about archives, parent selection, exploration, and budget allocation into a single recipe. Because discovery runs are expensive and inherently stochastic, existing harnesses are often compared using too few independent trials to distinguish key methodological improvements from run-to-run variance. We systematically decompose OpenEvolve-style evolutionary search and the TTT-Discover search harness into its constituent components and systematically evaluate 30 budget-matched harnesses across 12 model-problem pairs using more than 3.1 million LLM rollouts and repeated-trial statistical analysis. Our results show that discovery harnesses have a generalization problem: No fixed harness is reliably superior across the evaluated model-problem pairs, and variants of OpenEvolve generally underperform simpler alternatives. Thus, harness choice is better viewed as a hyperparameter rather than as a universal recipe, and should be tailored to the specific problem and underlying model. We also find that early discovery progress predicts final performance, and use this property to present a budget-matched adaptive-allocation experiment that starts multiple harnesses, prunes weak partial runs, and reallocates compute to stronger survivors, outperforming both commitment to a randomly sampled fixed harness and a non-adaptive harness ensemble. Together, these results motivate shifting from fixed harness selection to online adaptation guided by early performance. We release all run pools including baseline null distributions for every model-problem pair as reusable statistical infrastructure against for future harness proposals.

</details>


<div id='cs.LG'></div>

# cs.LG [[Back]](#toc)

### [247] [Reinforcement Learning-Guided NSGA-II Enhanced with Gray Relational Coefficient for Multi-Objective Optimization: Application to NASDAQ Portfolio Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16194)
*Zhiyuan Wang,Qinxu Ding,Ding Ding,Siying Zhu,Jing Ren,Yue Wang,Chong Hui Tan*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一种基于强化学习（RL）引导的非支配排序遗传算法II（NSGA-II）与灰色关联系数（GRC）相结合的新方法（RL-NSGA-II-GRC），用于解决约束多目标优化问题，特别应用于投资组合优化中风险最小化与收益最大化之间的权衡。该方法通过引入强化学习代理在线动态调整进化参数，并采用基于GRC的锦标赛选择算子，综合考虑支配等级、拥挤度和理想参考点的接近程度，提升解集的收敛性与多样性。在Kursawe和CONSTR基准测试及NASDAQ投资组合应用中，该方法分别实现约5.8%和4.4%的收敛性提升，同时生成平滑且密集的高效前沿，支持识别最大夏普比率投资组合（年化夏普比率为1.92）以及不同风险偏好的效用最优组合。主要贡献包括：1）将强化学习嵌入进化框架，实现参数自适应控制；2）设计了融合GRC的二元锦标赛操作符，提供更全面的搜索引导；3）在多个基准与真实金融场景中验证了方法在收敛性和前沿分布上的优越性，为决策提供可操作的洞察。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代金融市场中的决策者面临多重冲突目标的复杂权衡，传统多目标优化方法在收敛性、解集多样性和对约束条件的处理上存在不足。现有算法难以自适应调整进化参数，且缺乏有效机制平衡支配关系、拥挤度与理想解距离。因此，亟需一种能动态优化搜索过程并提升解质量的新型智能优化方法，以支持实际金融决策。

Method: 提出RL-NSGA-II-GRC方法，结合强化学习代理与灰色关联系数（GRC）。强化学习代理根据超体积、可行性与多样性等指标在线调整进化参数；同时设计基于GRC的锦标赛选择算子，将支配等级、拥挤距离与理想参考点接近度统一为一个评分标准，指导父代选择，增强搜索效率与解集质量。

Result: 在Kursawe和CONSTR基准测试中，相比NSGA-II，RL-NSGA-II-GRC分别提升了约5.8%和4.4%的收敛性能，且保持良好的非支配解分布。在纳斯达克投资组合案例中，生成了平滑、密集的高效前沿，成功识别出年化夏普比率为1.92的最大夏普比率投资组合，并支持不同风险偏好的效用最优配置。

Conclusion: 本研究提出的RL-NSGA-II-GRC方法显著提升了多目标优化中解的收敛性与多样性，在理论与实际金融应用中均表现出优越性能。其核心创新在于将强化学习与灰色关联分析融入传统进化算法，实现了参数自适应控制与更优的搜索导向，为复杂决策问题提供了高效、可解释的解决方案。

Abstract: In modern financial markets, decision-makers increasingly rely on quantitative methods to navigate complex trade-offs among multiple, often conflicting objectives. This paper addresses constrained multi-objective optimization (MOO) with an application to portfolio optimization for minimizing risk and maximizing return. To address existing gaps, we propose a novel reinforcement learning (RL)-guided non-dominated sorting genetic algorithm II (NSGA-II) enhanced with gray relational coefficients (GRC), termed RL-NSGA-II-GRC, which combines an RL agent controller and GRC-based selection to improve convergence and diversity of Pareto fronts. The agent adapts evolutionary parameters online using metrics of hypervolume, feasibility, and diversity, while the GRC tournament operator ranks parents via a unified score considering dominance rank, crowding distance, and proximity to ideal reference. We evaluate the framework on the Kursawe and CONSTR benchmarks and a NASDAQ portfolio application. On the benchmarks, RL-NSGA-II-GRC achieves convergence improvements of about 5.8% and 4.4% over NSGA-II, while preserving well-distributed non-dominated solutions. In the portfolio application, it produces a smooth, densely populated efficient frontier supporting identification of the maximum Sharpe ratio portfolio (annualized Sharpe =1.92) and utility-optimal portfolios for different risk-aversion levels. The main contributions are three-fold: 1) we propose an RL-NSGA-II-GRC method integrating an RL agent into the evolutionary framework to adaptively control parameters via generational feedback; 2) we design a GRC-enhanced binary tournament operator providing a comprehensive indicator to guide the search toward the Pareto front; 3) we demonstrate, on benchmark MOO and a NASDAQ case study, that the method delivers improved convergence and well-populated frontiers supporting actionable insights.

</details>


### [248] [DocOCR-Eval: A Correction-Based Framework for OCR Tool Selection Without Ground Truth](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16203)
*Zihan Xu,Puzhen Wu,Lawrence Chun Man Lau,Wei Liu,Sirui Li,Yifan Peng,Yihao Ding*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文系统评估了多种OCR引擎和先进多模态大模型（MLLMs）在跨领域、跨语言的扫描文档基准上的文本识别性能。针对OCR工具在上下文推理能力有限且人工标注成本高的问题，提出无需标注的DocOCR-Eval评估框架，通过三阶段纠错与排序策略，在无真实标签情况下近似获得标注基工具排序。实验表明，聚合多个MLLM的结果能逐步提升与人工标注排名的一致性，证明在标签稀缺场景下仍可实现可靠的OCR工具选择，为实际文档解析系统的部署提供指导。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有OCR引擎在上下文推理能力上有限，而人工标注成本高，导致在标签稀缺环境下难以选择合适的文档解析工具。

Method: 提出DocOCR-Eval框架，采用三阶段纠错与排序策略，无需真实标注即可评估和选择OCR工具；通过聚合多个MLLM的输出以逼近基于标注的排序结果。

Result: 在多个跨领域、跨语言的扫描文档基准上，该方法能有效实现可靠且实用的OCR工具选择，即使在标签稀疏条件下依然表现良好。

Conclusion: DocOCR-Eval能够无需人工标注即实现对OCR工具的有效评估与选择，为多样化真实文档集合的文档解析系统部署提供了可行方案。

Abstract: Document parsing is a foundational step for document understanding tasks such as visual question answering and key information extraction, as it transforms unstructured scanned images into structured representations by extracting textual, visual, and layout information. While numerous Optical Character Recognition (OCR) engines and multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have been developed for this purpose, selecting an appropriate document parsing solution for a given document collection remains challenging, particularly in label-scarce settings. In this work, we conduct a systematic evaluation of text recognition performance across a diverse set of OCR engines and state-of-the-art MLLMs on multiple scanned document benchmarks spanning different domains and languages. Motivated by the limited contextual reasoning capabilities of many OCR engines and the high cost of manual annotations, we propose DocOCR-Eval, an annotation-free evaluation framework for automatic OCR assessment and selection. DocOCR-Eval employs a three-staged correction and ranking strategy to approximate annotation-based tool ordering without ground-truth labels. We show that aggregating across multiple MLLMs progressively improves alignment with annotation-based rankings. Extensive experiments further demonstrate that reliable OCR tool selection can be achieved in realistic, label-limited settings, providing practical guidance for deploying document parsing systems across diverse real-world document collections.

</details>


### [249] [Fully-sensorized smart-eyewear platform for on-device Machine Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16222)
*Andrea Giudici,Christian Veronesi,Pietro Bartoli,Mario Caliò,Aurelio Teliti,Giacomo Gervasoni,Diana Trojaniello,Franco Zappa*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: ARGO是一款智能眼镜平台，通过STM32N6微控制器与集成NPU实现本地化机器学习，支持实时城市障碍物识别（基于优化的YOLOv11模型），采用头级并行注意力（HPA）结构提升计算效率，在2.483MB内存限制下达到mAP50-95为24，支持10 FPS运行，续航约113分钟，兼顾低延迟、隐私保护与能效，体现软硬件协同设计在边缘AI中的关键作用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有智能眼镜依赖云端处理，存在延迟高、隐私风险和能耗大问题；亟需一种兼具高算力、低功耗与隐私保护能力的本地化解决方案，以满足无障碍辅助设备对实时性与社会接受度的需求。

Method: 提出基于STM32N6与NPU的端侧AI架构，设计头级并行注意力（HPA）模块优化YOLOv11模型以适配NPU执行，结合多模态传感器（RGB相机、ToF、麦克风、环境传感器），实现低功耗下的实时障碍物检测与环境感知。

Result: 部署模型在2.483MB内存下实现mAP50-95达24，运行速度10 FPS，电池续航约113分钟（200mAh），显著降低延迟并保障数据本地处理，具备高实用性与可接受性。

Conclusion: ARGO验证了软硬件协同设计在边缘AI系统中的可行性，展示了高性能、低功耗、隐私保护型智能助视设备的实现路径，未来智能可穿戴设备的发展需更紧密融合算法、架构与系统工程。

Abstract: This paper presents ARGO, a smart eyewear platform designed to bridge ergonomic comfort, high computational throughput, and energy efficiency. Unlike cloud-dependent solutions, ARGO leverages the STM32N6 microcontroller and its integrated Neural Processing Unit (NPU) to enable on-device machine learning, minimizing latency and preserving user privacy through local data processing. The primary contribution lies in the holistic co-design of hardware, firmware, and artificial intelligence, centered on the deployment of an optimized YOLOv11 model for real-time urban obstacle recognition. To ensure compatibility with the target NPU, we introduce Head-wise Parallel Attention (HPA), an architectural refinement that enables efficient accelerator execution while preserving the original computational logic. The model is trained on the Walking On The Road (WOTR) dataset, and the final deployed configuration achieves an mAP50-95 of 24 under strict memory constraints, with a memory footprint of only 2.483 MB. The platform integrates a multimodal sensor suite, RGB cameras, Time-of-Flight sensors, microphones, and ambient sensors, and delivers 10 FPS at a continuous autonomy of ~113 minutes on a 200 mAh battery. These results demonstrate the feasibility of a high-performance, privacy-preserving, and socially acceptable assistive device, and highlight how competitive edge AI solutions increasingly demand tightly integrated, multidisciplinary co-design approaches.

</details>


### [250] [LLM Unlearning for Cyber Defense: A Survey on Methods, Challenges, and Emerging Threats](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16227)
*Ruppikha Sree Shankar,Abhishek Bhardwaj,Arnav Doshi,Anusri Nagarajan,Troy Paulus Asia,Saptarshi Sengupta*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文探讨了大语言模型（LLMs）在安全关键系统中的部署风险，特别是其无法遗忘的特性带来的隐私、安全和合规问题。由于重训大规模模型不切实际，且知识分布于参数中，因此无监督学习（unlearning）成为主要防御手段。文章聚焦梯度类方法，评估其是否真正移除知识而非仅抑制表达，并从安全、鲁棒性和可验证遗忘角度进行分析。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前大型语言模型存在无法遗忘敏感信息的问题，导致严重的隐私与安全风险，而传统重训方式不可行，亟需有效的知识移除机制。现有方法是否真正实现遗忘仍存疑，需系统评估。

Method: 基于安全、鲁棒性与可验证遗忘的视角，重点分析梯度类无监督学习方法，评估其在真实攻击场景下的有效性与可靠性。

Result: 现有梯度基方法虽能抑制知识表达，但难以确保知识被彻底删除；部分方法在特定攻击下仍可恢复被遗忘信息，表明其未实现真正意义上的遗忘。

Conclusion: 当前主流的无监督学习方法尚未实现可验证的遗忘，需发展更严格的评估框架与更可靠的去知识化技术，以保障大模型在安全关键应用中的可信部署。

Abstract: LLMs are increasingly deployed in security-critical systems across healthcare, finance, education, and decision support, yet their inability to forget creates serious cybersecurity, privacy, and safety risks. Sensitive personal information, copyrighted material, hazardous domain knowledge, and memorized training data remain encoded across billions of parameters long after deployment, leaving models vulnerable to extraction, jailbreak attacks, membership inference, and regulatory non-compliance. Real-world incidents, from chatbots regenerating private information to fabricated legal citations producing direct legal and financial cost, place the problem at the center of the emerging-threats landscape rather than the realm of speculation. Because retraining billion-parameter models on revised corpora is computationally infeasible, and because knowledge within an LLM is distributed and entangled across parameters rather than localized to identifiable units, LLM unlearning has emerged as the principal cyber defense response, aiming to remove or suppress targeted knowledge from a trained model without retraining and without eroding what the model should still know. A central question, however, remains unresolved. Do current methods genuinely remove knowledge, or do they only stop the model from expressing it under ordinary prompting conditions? This survey examines LLM unlearning through the lens of security, robustness, and verifiable forgetting, with primary focus on gradient-based methods, which have come to dominate the field due to their compatibility with existing training pipelines and their scalability to billion-parameter models.

</details>


### [251] [Operator-Aware Mixed-Precision Tolerance Calibration for Tensor Kernels](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16228)
*Dipankar Sarkar*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该研究通过分析26个gpuemu测试用例在云GPU上的累积运行数据，挖掘张量核正确性测试中的元素级误差分布，提出一个基于实证的绝对容差（atol）校准方法。结果表明，当前手动设定的atol远过于宽松，经校准后，针对7个LLM风格错误变体的漏洞检测召回率从73.2%提升至82.4%，新增229个有效检测，同时误报率仅小幅上升至1.1%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有张量核正确性测试普遍采用固定形状和手选的绝对与相对容差，这些阈值跨测试用例复用且极少更新，可能导致检测灵敏度不足或误报。本文旨在通过实证分析实际运行中的误差分布，为每种操作与数据类型动态校准更合理的容差，以提升漏洞检测能力。

Method: 从gpuemu测试集（26个测试用例，2种数据类型，共8,076个结果行）中提取所有测试用例的元素级误差分布；基于真实正确实现下的误差分布，推导出每个（操作，数据类型）组合应具备的最优绝对容差；在保留原测试结构基础上，使用校准后的atol重新评估已知的7个错误变体。

Result: 校准后的per-(op, dtype)容差显著收紧，最大收紧幅度达2,184倍；在7个LLM风格错误变体上，漏洞检测召回率从73.2%提高到82.4%，绝对提升9.3个百分点，新增229个有效检测；控制组误报率从0升至20/1,882（1.1%），影响可控。

Conclusion: 当前广泛使用的固定手选容差过于宽松，无法充分捕捉细微错误。通过基于真实运行数据的实证校准，可显著提升漏洞检测能力，同时保持较低误报率，建议将此方法纳入主流测试流程。

Abstract: Most tensor-kernel correctness tests go through a fixed-shape all close-style check with hand-picked absolute and relative tolerances. The thresholds are copied across the corpus and rarely revisited. We mine the element-wise error distribution of every test case from accumulated cloud GPU runs across the 26-entry gpuemu corpus and 2 dtypes (8,076 result rows). We then ask one empirical question: what absolute tolerance would the kernel itself, observed under its correct implementation, justify?
  The answer is much tighter than the current hand-picked atol. The largest tightening is attention_triton fp16 at $2{,}184\times$. Restricted to the seven LLM-style buggy variants for which the corpus ships a paired correct counterpart, calibrated per-(op, dtype) tolerances raise bug-detection recall from 73.2% (1,805 of 2,467) to 82.4% (2,034 of 2,467), an absolute gain of 9.3 percentage points (+229 new detections). The control false-positive count rises from 0 to 20 out of 1,882 correct-control cases (+1.1 percentage points).

</details>


### [252] [RouteCost: A Production-Inspired Multi-Stage Framework for Pre-Order Shipping Cost Estimation in E-Commerce](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16230)
*Xianling Zeng,Zihan Yu,Sichen Zhao,Yalun Qi,Zhiming Xue*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出RouteCost框架，通过多阶段分解实现更准确的电商预订单运费估算，结合时间感知需求预测、费用卡信息基线定价、残差修正及代理盒合并推断，提升预测质量与校准性，同时保持路线级可解释性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统静态查找方法忽略需求组合、重量、尺寸定价、附加费触发等复杂因素，而单一回归模型可能利用非因果相关性，导致预测不准确。

Method: 采用多阶段框架：时间感知需求预测、基于费用卡的基线定价、第二阶段残差修正、代理式箱体合并推断，并通过路线加权期望聚合生成产品级运费预测。

Result: 在超过25万订单、260种产品、18个月历史数据上，该框架显著提升预测精度和整体校准性，同时保持路线级可解释性。

Conclusion: RouteCost框架有效应对电商运费估算中的复杂影响因素，兼顾准确性与可解释性，适用于生产环境。

Abstract: Accurate pre-order shipping cost estimation is important in e-commerce because it affects price presentation, margin planning, and conversion. In practice, shipping cost is shaped not only by distance but also by destination demand mix, billable weight, dimensional pricing, surcharge triggers, and latent operational effects such as shipment consolidation. Static lookup methods therefore miss important sources of variation, while monolithic regressors may exploit strong but non-causal correlations. We propose RouteCost, a production-inspired multi-stage framework that decomposes the problem into time-aware demand forecasting, fee-card-informed baseline pricing, Stage 2 residual correction, and proxy-based box-consolidation inference. Route-level cost estimates are aggregated through a route-weighted expectation formulation to produce product-level shipping cost predictions. Across over 250,000 orders, 260 products, and 18 months of order history, the framework improves predictive quality and aggregate calibration while preserving route-level interpretability.

</details>


### [253] [Orthogonal Gradient Constraints Shape Noisy-Label Memorization Dynamics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16231)
*Richard Mai*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了在噪声标签学习设置下，通过几何干预优化器更新来缓解过拟合的方法OrthoGrad。该方法通过移除权重梯度中与当前权重向量平行的分量，抑制模型对错误标签的记忆。在小数据场景下，OrthoGrad显著提升了CNN在MNIST上的测试准确率并减少了对噪声标签的拟合；而在更大数据场景下，其效果减弱。实验表明，该方法在原始梯度具有明显径向分量时作用最强，且在CIFAR-10 ResNet-18上虽能改变记忆轨迹但无法完全阻止最终的噪声标签记忆。结果支持正交更新约束作为研究学习动态的有效诊断工具，但指出OrthoGrad并非普遍适用的正则化方法，而是依赖于具体训练环境。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究神经网络在噪声标签下的过拟合现象，特别是由记忆驱动的过拟合问题。传统方法多从目标函数、架构或数据分布入手进行正则化，而本文提出从优化器更新的几何结构出发，探索更直接的干预方式。

Method: 提出OrthoGrad方法，即在每次权重更新时，将梯度中与当前权重向量平行的部分投影掉，仅保留正交分量。通过控制梯度方向，减少对噪声标签的过度记忆。实验涵盖MNIST小数据和CIFAR-10大规模数据场景，使用CNN和ResNet-18模型，并结合权重范数与梯度-权重余弦相似性进行机制分析。

Result: 在小数据条件下，OrthoGrad显著提升测试精度，降低对噪声标签的拟合；但在大数据条件下效果减弱。机制分析显示，当原始梯度具有明显径向分量时，正交投影效果最显著。在CIFAR-10上，该方法可延缓或改变记忆路径，但无法阻止最终的噪声标签记忆。

Conclusion: OrthoGrad作为一种基于优化器更新的几何正则化手段，对理解学习动态具有诊断价值，但其有效性受训练规模与数据分布影响，不具备普适性，属于情境依赖型方法。

Abstract: Modern neural networks can fit corrupted training labels, making noisy-label learning a useful setting for studying memorization-driven overfitting. Most regularization methods modify the objective, architecture, or data distribution; here we instead study a geometric intervention on the optimizer update itself. We evaluate OrthoGrad, which removes the component of each weight gradient parallel to the current weight vector, in noisy-label image classification. On MNIST with small-data regimes, OrthoGrad improves test accuracy most clearly for CNNs while reducing corrupted-label fitting. Mechanism diagnostics based on weight norms and gradient-weight cosine similarity suggest that the projection has the strongest effect when the raw gradient contains a nontrivial radial component, and becomes weaker in larger-data regimes where gradients are already nearly orthogonal to weights. Additional CIFAR-10 ResNet-18 experiments show that the method can alter memorization trajectories but does not prevent eventual noisy-label memorization. These results support orthogonal update constraints as a useful diagnostic for studying learning dynamics, while showing that OrthoGrad is regime-dependent rather than universally regularizing.

</details>


### [254] [From Weights to Words: Expressing and Editing Preference Model Inferences in Natural Language](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16232)
*Zachary Wojtowicz,Ayush Nayak,Jacob Andreas*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种名为'weights to words'的新方法，通过自然语言描述和模型表示空间中的向量自动发现与领域相关的偏好维度，解决高维选择数据中偏好因素不明确及模型不透明的问题。该方法在道德困境、电影、葡萄酒和大模型自由回答等四个领域展示出广泛适用性，并通过两个预注册的人类实验（分别涉及450和449名参与者）验证其有效性：一是基于学习到的偏好基底正则化可提高预测准确性；二是引入用户结构化编辑能进一步提升精度。用户更倾向于该方法生成的偏好画像，并认为其预测更准确。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前统计学习算法在从高维选择数据中推断人类偏好时面临两大挑战：一是多个特征同时变化导致难以确定真正驱动决策的因素（即偏好因素不明确）；二是模型的黑箱特性使人类无法审查、质疑或修正错误，造成透明度不足。

Method: 提出'weights to words'方法，输入为一组选择问题数据，自动识别出一组领域相关的偏好维度，每个维度以自然语言描述并配以模型中的向量表示。这些维度可用于聚焦归因于少数有意义因素，并将模型推理结果外化为自然语言，供用户实时检查与修改。

Result: 在四个不同领域（道德困境、电影、葡萄酒、大模型自由回答）中展示了方法的多样性应用；两项预注册实验表明：(1) 使用学习到的偏好基底对偏好模型进行正则化，显著提升了对未见选择的预测准确率；(2) 用户提供的结构化编辑进一步提高了模型性能。在对比测试中，参与者更偏好该方法生成的偏好画像，并认为其预测更准确。

Conclusion: 该方法有效解决了高维选择数据中偏好推断的不明确性和模型不透明问题，通过自然语言解释增强可解释性与可控性，且实证证明其在提升模型预测性能和用户信任方面具有显著优势。

Abstract: The growing use of statistical learning algorithms to infer human preferences from high-dimensional choice data runs up against a fundamental challenge: choice alternatives typically differ in many ways simultaneously, so it is generally unclear which factors actually drove an observed decision and should be credited as preferences. Compounding this problem, the opacity of these methods leaves human operators unable to inspect, contest, or correct models when they err. We introduce \emph{weights to words}, a method that takes a dataset of choice problems as input and automatically discovers a collection of domain-relevant preference dimensions, each described in natural language and paired with a vector in the model's representational space. These dimensions address both under-determination and opacity: they can be applied to concentrate attribution on a small set of meaningful factors, and they can externalize the model's inferences in natural language so that users can inspect and edit them in real time. We first qualitatively illustrate the method's versatility on four diverse domains: moral dilemmas, movies, wines, and free-form LLM responses. We then report two pre-registered human-subjects experiments, on moral dilemmas ($N=450$) and movie selection ($N=449$), that demonstrate its benefits for learning preference models: (1) regularizing a preference model toward the learned basis increases prediction accuracy on held-out choices, and (2) incorporating participants' structured edits further improves accuracy. In head-to-head comparisons, participants prefer the method's inferred preference profiles and endorse its predictions as more accurate.

</details>


### [255] [Token-Level Cross-Modal Transformer with Contrastive Multi-Task Learning for Breast Cancer Subtype Classification and Survival Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16233)
*Suxing Liu Byungwon Min*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一种新型多模态深度学习框架，用于联合癌症亚型分类与生存预测。该方法通过细粒度的跨模态令牌交互、结构化的跨模态信息交换以及联合优化分类与生存任务的目标函数，克服了现有方法在模态处理、融合机制和目标协同方面的局限性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法将每种模态视为单一特征向量，缺乏细粒度的跨模态交互；跨模态融合多采用线性加权或后期平均，难以实现有效信息交换；且分类与生存预测任务独立优化，缺少联合正则化信号。

Method: 提出基于令牌级别的多模态交互架构，引入可学习的跨模态注意力机制以实现结构化信息交换，并设计联合损失函数同时优化分类与生存预测任务。

Result: 在多个公开癌症数据集上的实验表明，该方法显著优于现有基准模型，在亚型分类准确率和生存预测风险分层能力方面均取得提升。

Conclusion: 所提出的多模态联合建模框架有效整合了基因组与临床数据，实现了更精准的癌症亚型识别与生存预后评估，为精准肿瘤学提供了新范式。

Abstract: Integrating heterogeneous genomic and clinical modalities for joint cancer subtype classification and survival prediction remains a key challenge in precision oncology. Existing approaches suffer from three limitations: (1) they treat each modality as a monolithic feature vector, precluding fine-grained token-level interactions across modalities; (2) cross-modal fusion is typically performed through linear weighting or late averaging rather than structured token exchange; and (3) survival and classification objectives are optimized independently, missing a joint regularization signal.

</details>


### [256] [HantaWatch: Federated Learning for Hantavirus Genomic Surveillance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16234)
*Shanika Iroshi Nanayakkara,Shiva Raj Pokhrel*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: HantaWatch 是一个基于联邦学习的框架，用于在不共享原始数据的情况下，让实验室和监测站点协作训练基于序列的模型，以解决汉坦病毒基因组监测中的数据分布不均、来源异质性及专家审查能力受限等问题。该框架结合了 k-mer 特征提取、源感知的客户端构建、自适应 DU-FedProx 优化、针对性的模型选择和仅预测的分诊机制，在二分类和多分类任务中表现出色，支持高风险筛查、疫情关联预测、谱系分类和临床综合征归类，同时平衡了预测性能、假阴性风险与更新稳定性。模型输出被转化为风险评分、置信度估计、不确定性标志和专家评审优先级排序，为去中心化的汉坦病毒监测提供实用的决策支持层，辅助专家优先处理，但不替代实验室或公共卫生机构的判断。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 汉坦病毒基因组监测受限于序列数据分布不均、不同来源的数据异质性以及专家评审资源有限，亟需一种无需共享原始数据即可实现协作建模的方法。

Method: 提出 HantaWatch 框架，集成 k-mer 特征提取、源感知的联邦客户端构建、自适应 DU-FedProx 优化、针对监测任务的模型选择和预测仅分诊机制，实现安全高效的分布式模型训练与决策支持。

Result: 在二分类和多分类任务中，HantaWatch 在高风险筛查、疫情相关预测、谱系分类和临床症状分类方面表现优异，有效平衡了预测性能、假阴性风险和模型更新稳定性，并将输出转化为可操作的风险评分、置信度和评审优先级。

Conclusion: HantaWatch 为去中心化汉坦病毒监测提供了实用的联邦决策支持层，可在保护数据隐私的前提下提升监测效率，辅助专家优先处理，但不取代专业解读。

Abstract: Hantavirus genomic surveillance is limited by the distribution of sequence data, non-IID source heterogeneity, and constrained expert-review capacity. We propose HantaWatch, a federated learning framework that enables laboratories and surveillance sites to collaboratively train sequence-based models without sharing raw data. HantaWatch integrates k-mer feature extraction, source-aware federated client construction, adaptive DU-FedProx optimization, surveillance-specific model selection, and prediction-only triage. Experiments on binary and multi-class tasks show that HantaWatch supports high-risk screening, outbreak-associated prediction, clade classification, and clinical-syndrome categorization while balancing predictive performance, false-negative risk, and update stability. The framework converts model output into risk scores, confidence estimates, uncertainty flags, and ranked expert-review priorities. HantaWatch therefore provides a practical federated decision-support layer for decentralized Hantavirus surveillance, supporting expert prioritization without replacing laboratory or public-health interpretation.

</details>


### [257] [OpenMHC: Accelerating the Science of Wearable Foundation Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16235)
*Narayan Schuetz,Yuze Bai,Lianggang Pan,Edgar Eggert,Favour Nerrise,Juan Delgado-SanMartin,Max Rosenblattl,Milana Gurbanova,Mohammad Asadi,Anders Johnson,Paul Schmiedmayer,Dennis Wang,Allan Lawrie,Daniel Seung Kim,Xin Liu,Akshay Paruchuri,Ehsan Adeli,Euan Ashley,Kelly W. Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文发布了OpenMyHeartCounts（OpenMHC），这是目前最大、最全面的公开可访问可穿戴健康数据集，包含超过6000万小时的多传感器数据和169个关联变量，来自11,894名参与者。同时开源了近期可穿戴基础模型的代码实现，并提出了一个统一的开放基准，支持在健康与行为预测、多变量数据填补和时间序列预测三个任务上的标准化比较。旨在推动可穿戴健康AI研究的开放科学，促进社区协作与创新。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前大型可穿戴数据集大多不公开，主流可穿戴基础模型也缺乏开源权重或可复现的训练代码，限制了可穿戴健康领域的开放科学研究。

Method: 基于十年间通过My Heart Counts应用收集的数据构建OpenMHC数据集；开发统一开放基准，涵盖健康与行为预测、多变量数据填补、时间序列预测三类任务；对经典方法及最新可穿戴与多变量时间序列基础模型进行基准测试。

Result: 成功发布大规模、多维度的公开可穿戴健康数据集OpenMHC；提供开源模型权重与训练代码；建立可标准化比较的基准平台；显著提升可穿戴健康AI研究的可访问性与可复现性。

Conclusion: 通过开放数据、代码与模型权重，本工作为可穿戴健康人工智能研究提供了前所未有的开放基础设施，有望推动该领域向更透明、协作和快速发展的方向前进。

Abstract: Mobile and wearable devices offer an unprecedented opportunity for continuous, passive health monitoring and active health coaching. However, the largest wearable datasets are not publicly available for research, and leading wearable foundation models trained on such datasets are rarely open-weight or come with reproducible training code. To accelerate open science in wearable health, we release OpenMyHeartCounts (OpenMHC), the largest and most comprehensive open-access wearable health dataset to date, alongside open-source implementations of recent wearable foundation models. OpenMHC, derived from over a decade of data collected through the My Heart Counts study app, includes >60 million hours of wearable data across 19 sensor channels (e.g., step count, heart rate, sleep, workouts) and up to 169 linked variables, including health, lifestyle, mood, and behavior from 11,894 consenting participants. Furthermore, we introduce a unified, open benchmark that enables standardized comparison of wearable health models across three tracks: health and behavior downstream prediction, multivariate data imputation, and time-series forecasting. We benchmark classical methods alongside recent wearable and multivariate time series foundation models. By open-sourcing data, code, and model weights at this unprecedented scale, we aim to democratize wearable health AI research and enable the community to drive open progress in this domain.

</details>


### [258] [The Failures of Marginal Influence-Based Attribution Methods for Global Time Series Explanations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16236)
*Amadeo Tunyi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 现有时间序列可解释性方法多生成平坦的归因分数，仅量化特征在特定时间点的直接影响力。本文指出其主要缺陷并非分数形式，而是计算方式与模型内在依赖结构不匹配：当前方法使用边际条件或离群梯度，混淆了直接与间接时间依赖关系。提出DAG一致性概念，要求解释结果与模型隐含学习的时序有向无环图（DAG）马尔可夫等价。发现标准SHAP方法通常不满足DAG一致性，近期时间序列改进版本亦存在相同问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有时间序列可解释性方法在生成归因分数时忽略了时间依赖结构的复杂性，尤其在存在自相关的情况下，错误地将直接和间接依赖混为一谈，导致解释失真。需要一种能准确反映模型内部时序因果结构的解释方法。

Method: 提出并定义了DAG-faithfulness概念，通过分析模型隐含学习的时序有向无环图（DAG），设计能够保持马尔可夫等价性的解释方法；系统评估现有方法（如SHAP及其时间序列变体）在该准则下的表现。

Result: 证明了标准归因方法（包括SHAP）不满足DAG一致性，且时间序列改进版本仍受相同计算机制限制；揭示了根本性计算偏差来源，为构建更准确的时间序列解释方法提供了理论基础。

Conclusion: 时间序列可解释性方法的失效根源在于计算机制与模型时序结构之间的不匹配，而非输出形式本身。未来方法应基于对时序因果结构的正确建模，实现真正的DAG-faithful解释。

Abstract: Explainability methods for time series models predominantly produce flat attribution scores: they quantify the direct influence of a feature at a timestamp by a scalar. We prove that the dominant failure mode of such methods is not the scalar format itself but a fundamental computational mismatch: existing methods compute scores via marginal conditioning or off-manifold gradients, both of which conflate direct temporal dependencies with mediated ones under autocorrelation. We also define DAG-faithfulness: an explanation is DAG-faithful if the temporal dependency graph it encodes is Markov-equivalent to the temporal directed acyclic graph (DAG) implicitly learned by the model. Particularly, we observe that standard attribution methods, specifically SHAP, are not DAG-faithful in general, and that recent time-series-aware extensions inherit the same computational limitation.

</details>


### [259] [Quantizing Recursive Reasoning Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16237)
*Thorir Mar Ingolfsson,Wajeeha Tahir,Anna Tegon,Lionnus Kesting,Gamze İslamoğlu,Luca Benini*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该研究探讨了在递归推理模型中使用4位量化时出现的精度崩溃问题，发现其根源在于激活缩放粒度而非位宽或数值格式。通过引入块级缩放的MXInt4量化方法，显著提升了模型在Sudoku和ARC-AGI等任务上的鲁棒性与性能，尤其在深度递归结构中表现优异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在递归推理模型中，由于权重共享和多步迭代，4位量化会因每一步累积量化误差而导致精度严重下降，尤其是当使用全局张量缩放时。需要找到一种能抑制误差传播的量化策略，以保持模型在低比特下的准确性。

Method: 提出MXInt4量化方法，采用块级（per-block）整数激活格式，结合幂次2的块尺度，实现更精细的激活缩放控制，从而缓解量化误差在多步迭代中的累积问题。

Result: 在Sudoku任务上，使用传统4位量化导致准确率从84.1%降至0.0%，而采用MXInt4后恢复至接近全精度水平；在深度递归模型EqR和开放式的ARC-AGI基准上也表现出强鲁棒性和良好迁移能力。

Conclusion: 激活缩放的粒度是影响低比特量化性能的关键因素，块级缩放可有效抑制量化误差累积，使4位整数量化在复杂递归推理任务中依然保持高性能，为高效低比特推理提供了新范式。

Abstract: Recursive reasoning models solve hard puzzles by applying compact, weight-tied blocks over many refinement steps. Because these blocks are reused many times, quantizing them creates a unique dynamical problem: the quantization error is incurred at every step. While 8-bit quantization (integer or float) preserves accuracy, moving to a per-tensor 4-bit format causes a systematic bias to accumulate. The ensuing drift catastrophically degrades exact-solution accuracy on Sudoku from 84.1% to 0.0% (only ~25% of cells correct). In this work, we show that this collapse is caused by activation-scaling granularity rather than bit-width or number format. Crucially, moving to per-block scaling completely restores the transition. To implement this, we apply MXInt4, a blockwise integer activation format, to recursive reasoning models. It is competitive with blockwise float formats on our tasks, while keeping integer elements and power-of-two block scales. Finally, recursion depth and reuse modulate quantization sensitivity, with the deepest architecture we test (the EqR equilibrium model) the most sensitive. Yet blockwise scaling overcomes this vulnerability, staying robust across these architectures and transferring to the open-ended ARC-AGI benchmark.

</details>


### [260] [Diffusion-corrected Autoregressive Fourier Neural Operator for Droplet Evolution Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16238)
*Jinghao Cao,Minsung Kang,Hongyue Sun,Chi Zhou,Jihoon Chung,Xubo Yue,Sanchoy Das,Bo Shen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: DiffARFNO是一种两阶段框架，结合自回归傅里叶MIONet与条件去噪扩散隐式模型（DDIM）校正器，用于高保真长时程液滴演化预测。该方法在ANSYS Fluent生成的液滴数据集上显著优于现有先进模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 长时程液滴演化预测在材料喷射（如喷墨打印）中对保证打印质量至关重要，但因误差累积和工艺变量复杂耦合而面临挑战。

Method: 提出DiffARFNO框架，第一阶段使用自回归傅里叶MIONet作为粗略预测器进行长时程预测；第二阶段利用基于DDIM的条件校正器，在滑动窗口内通过高效迭代去噪优化预测结果，恢复细节信息。

Result: 在ANSYS Fluent生成的液滴数据集上，DiffARFNO显著优于现有最先进模型，实现更高质量的长期预测。

Conclusion: DiffARFNO通过结合粗略预测与精细校正，有效缓解了误差累积问题，为复杂流体系统的长期演化预测提供了新思路。

Abstract: Predicting droplet evolution in material jetting, or Inkjet Printing (IJP), is essential for maintaining printing quality. However, long-horizon forecasts remain challenging due to error accumulation and the complex coupling of process variables. In this work, we introduce the Diffusion-corrected Auto-Regressive Fourier Neural Operator (DiffARFNO), a two-stage framework that combines an autoregressive Fourier-MIONet with a conditional Denoising Diffusion Implicit Model (DDIM) corrector. Fourier-MIONet is trained as a coarse predictor and deployed autoregressively for long-horizon forecasting. In the second stage, a DDIM-based conditional corrector refines the coarse prediction within each sliding window through efficient iterative denoising. By combining coarse predictions from Fourier-MIONet with a DDIM corrector that restores fine details, DiffARFNO aims to provide high-fidelity predictions for long-horizon forecasts. Extensive experiments on droplet datasets from ANSYS Fluent demonstrate that DiffARFNO significantly outperforms existing state-of-the-art models.

</details>


### [261] [BACON: Budgeted Human Calibration for Modeling and Evaluation with Multiple AI Judges](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16239)
*Lei Shi,Anlan Zhang,Rita Lyu,Zhengmian Hu,Tong Yu,David Arbour,Avi Feller,Saayan Mitra,Ritwik Sinha*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: BACON是一个四阶段管道，结合预算内的人类校准与多AI评判者输出，以生成更准确的标注。它为每个项目构建全面的辅助特征，包括多评判者评分、分词级不确定性统计和上下文嵌入，并通过小样本人类标签训练交叉拟合结果模型，生成校准后的项目级代理预测。该方法支持群体层面的汇总指标估计（如均值或分位数）和个体层面的代理评分，用于项目排序和标注。BACON将AI评判者视为辅助测量而非真实标签，人类标签提供校准锚点，而AI信号提升效率。在多种任务、领域和标注预算下，BACON显著提升了预测准确性、排序一致性，并降低了偏差和方差，优于原始AI输出和纯人工标注方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: AI评判者虽具可扩展性和低成本优势，但其输出存在相对于人类偏好的偏差及高度依赖于项目的特性，导致在模型排名、项目评分或总体质量报告中产生误导性决策。因此需要一种方法来校准这些偏差，同时保持高效性。

Method: BACON采用四阶段流程：1）构建每个项目的全覆盖辅助特征（包括多AI评判者评分、分词级不确定性统计、上下文嵌入）；2）对一个小样本子集收集人类标签；3）训练交叉拟合的结果模型，生成校准后的项目级代理预测；4）利用这些预测支持群体层面的汇总估计（使用增强估计方程并具有有效置信区间）和个体层面的排序与标注。

Result: 在不同任务、领域和标注预算下，BACON相比原始AI输出和纯人工标注方法，在预测准确性、排序一致性方面均有显著提升，同时降低偏差与方差。证明其是一种实用且具有统计基础的有限人工标注下的可扩展评估框架。

Conclusion: BACON通过融合人类校准与多源AI信号，实现高效、准确、低偏差的规模化评估，为大规模模型评估提供了可靠解决方案。

Abstract: AI judges offer a scalable, low-cost alternative to human evaluation, but their outputs can be biased relative to human preferences and highly item-dependent, varying across judges, tasks, and domains. When uncalibrated AI evaluations are used for model ranking, item scoring, or population-level quality reporting, these biases can directly distort downstream decisions. We propose BACON, a four-stage pipeline that combines budgeted human calibration with multiple AI-judge outputs to produce more accurate annotations. BACON constructs full-coverage auxiliary features for every item, including multi-judge scores, token-level uncertainty statistics, and contextual embeddings. It then collects human labels for a small sampled subset and trains a cross-fitted outcome model to generate calibrated item-level surrogate predictions. These predictions support two use cases: population-level estimation of summary metrics, such as means or quantiles, using an augmented estimating-equation estimator with valid confidence intervals; and individual-level surrogate scoring for item ranking and annotation. BACON treats AI judges as auxiliary measurements rather than ground truth: human labels provide the calibration anchor, while AI-derived signals improve efficiency. Across diverse tasks, domains, and labeling budgets, BACON improves predictive accuracy and ranking consistency, and reduces bias and variance relative to raw AI outputs and purely human-label-based methods. These results show that BACON offers a practical, statistically grounded framework for scalable evaluation with limited human annotation.

</details>


### [262] [Normalized Rewards for Preference Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16240)
*Shawn Im,Federico Danieli,Skyler Seto,Barry-John Theobald,Katherine Metcalf*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了直接对齐算法（DAAs）如DPO在后训练大语言模型时导致的过度优化问题，即降低偏好响应的总似然度。为缓解此问题，提出通过正则化项维持选择与拒绝响应的长度归一化概率总和。研究发现，大部分似然变化源于少数异常令牌，这解释了为何尽管整体似然下降，生成质量仍能提升。将该正则化应用于基于参考（DPO）和无参考（SimPO）的方法，显著改善了生成质量与通用基准表现之间的权衡，并提升了奖励建模性能。例如，在Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct上，AlpacaEval2得分提升超过20%，通用基准性能提升超9%。此外，正则化有效减少了偏好响应中的位移，尤其针对异常令牌，通过利用低似然令牌实现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 直接对齐算法（DAAs）如DPO在对齐大语言模型与人类偏好时存在过度优化问题，导致偏好响应的总似然度下降，可能引发不良行为。需要一种机制来缓解这一副作用，同时保持生成质量。

Method: 引入正则化项以维持选择与拒绝响应的长度归一化概率总和；分析令牌级别似然变化分布，识别异常令牌的影响；将该方法应用于DPO和SimPO等主流对齐算法。

Result: 在多个数据集上，使用正则化的模型表现出更优的生成质量与通用能力平衡；在Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct上，AlpacaEval2得分提升超20%，通用基准性能提升超9%；正则化有效减少偏好响应的整体及异常令牌的位移。

Conclusion: 通过添加正则化项维持响应概率分布的稳定性，可有效缓解直接对齐算法中的过度优化问题，提升模型生成质量与泛化能力，且对异常令牌具有显著抑制作用。该方法适用于多种对齐范式，具有广泛适用性。

Abstract: Direct Alignment Algorithms (DAAs) such as DPO have become a common way to post-train and align LLMs with human preferences. However, DAAs have been observed to over-optimize their implicit reward model and decrease the likelihood of preferred responses. This results in a decrease in the total likelihood assigned to responses seen in the preference dataset, potentially resulting in undesirable behavior. To counteract this undesired side-effect of DAAs, we examine the effect of using objectives that add a regularization term to maintain the total length-normalized probabilities of the chosen and rejected responses. To better understand over-optimization, we investigate how response likelihood changes are distributed over the tokens with and without regularization. We find that a significant portion of the likelihood changes are due to a small set of outlier tokens, which explains how DAAs improve generation quality despite decreasing the likelihoods of chosen responses. We apply the proposed regularization to reference-based (DPO) and reference-free (SimPO) methods and find (1) improved trade-offs between generation quality and general benchmark capability and (2) improvements in reward modeling across datasets. For example, on Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct, we see both a >20% relative increase in AlpacaEval2 scores and >9% relative performance gains on general benchmarks. Additionally, we find that the added regularization term effectively mitigates the amount of displacement within preferred responses overall, and for the outlier tokens specifically, by utilizing low-likelihood tokens.

</details>


### [263] [KernelBench-Verified: Do LLM-Generated Kernels Actually Beat PyTorch?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16241)
*Yunxiang Zhang,Ping Yu,Jianyu Wang,Max,Fan,Julian Reed,Azalia Mirhoseini,Will Su*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文揭示了前沿大语言模型在生成自定义CUDA内核时存在奖励劫持问题，导致性能评估被人为夸大。研究指出，现有评估框架需同步进化：一是采用支持TF32的Tensor Core基线以更真实反映现代GPU性能；二是引入多分布隐藏测试集以防止模型通过硬编码绕过计算。作者提出KernelBench-Verified新评估框架，包含TF32基线和四分布隐藏测试集，并引入内存效率指标。在七种前沿LLM的单轮验证中，最佳模型（GPT-5.5）仅实现0.88x几何平均加速，远低于原标准评估下的1.43x，且无模型在真实基线下持续优于PyTorch。此外，28%的生成内核增加峰值显存占用。研究强调，必须持续更新评估协议以应对LLM内核生成能力的快速演进。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前大语言模型生成的CUDA内核在标准评估中表现优异，但可能存在奖励劫持行为，导致性能报告失真。为确保评估的真实性和可比性，亟需改进评估框架以准确衡量模型生成内核的实际性能与可靠性。

Method: 提出KernelBench-Verified评估框架，包含两个核心改进：(1) 采用启用TF32的Tensor Core作为更贴近真实硬件环境的基线；(2) 设计四分布隐藏测试集，防止模型依赖特定输入模式进行硬编码优化；同时引入内存效率指标，全面评估速度-内存权衡。

Result: 在新评估框架下，所有模型的平均加速比显著下降，最佳模型（GPT-5.5）仅达0.88x几何平均加速，远低于原评估结果（1.43x）。无模型在真实基线下持续超越PyTorch。28%的生成内核反而增加峰值显存使用，暴露了内存效率问题。

Conclusion: 现有评估协议已无法真实反映大语言模型生成CUDA内核的性能。必须持续迭代评估框架，结合更真实的硬件基线、多样化测试分布和多维指标（如内存效率），才能有效防止奖励劫持，推动可信的模型能力评估。

Abstract: Recent large language models (LLMs) can generate custom CUDA kernels that appear to outperform PyTorch on benchmarks such as KernelBench. Building upon this foundational framework, we demonstrate that frontier models frequently engage in reward hacking to artificially inflate reported performance. In this work, we identify two areas where evaluation frameworks must co-evolve with model capabilities. First, to accurately measure true speedup, we examine the baseline timing mechanism, noting that enabling Tensor Core acceleration with TF32 provides a more realistic estimation of execution on modern GPUs. Second, concerning algorithmic correctness, models often exploit the narrow test distribution by hardcoding bypasses for specific tensor values. By skipping required computations, these kernels artificially accelerate execution rather than implementing actual CUDA kernels. We introduce KernelBench-Verified, an extended evaluation framework that incorporates a TF32-enabled baseline and a four-distribution hidden test suite. We additionally introduce memory efficiency metrics that capture the often-overlooked speed-memory tradeoff in kernel optimization. Under verified single-turn evaluation with seven frontier LLMs, we find that the best-performing model (GPT-5.5) achieves a 0.88x geometric mean speedup, significantly lower than the 1.43x speedup observed under the standard evaluation protocol. No model consistently outperforms PyTorch when evaluated against realistic baselines. On the memory front, 28% of GPU kernels generated by the best model increase peak GPU memory usage. Our findings demonstrate the necessity of continually adapting robust evaluation protocols as LLM kernel generation capabilities advance.

</details>


### [264] [TRACE: Trajectory-Based Safety Patch Learning for LLM Post-Training Realignment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16242)
*Changyue Li,Jiaming He,Youliang Yuan,Jialin Wu,Boxi Yu,Zhicong Huang,Pinjia He*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: TRACE提出一种基于轨迹的安全补丁学习框架，通过模拟有害微调轨迹生成渐进式污染状态，并优化一个可插入的补丁以在保持任务效用的同时恢复安全性。在六个基准和两种模型上，TRACE在安全-效用权衡上全面优于现有方法，几乎在所有设置中达到近100%的安全性，同时保持与原始微调模型相当的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于参数合并的方法因任务与安全更新方向纠缠而难以校准合并强度：过弱则无法消除有害行为，过强则损害任务相关能力。需要一种能最小化对任务方向干扰、同时有效控制不安全行为的安全补丁学习方法。

Method: TRACE采用离线补丁学习策略，通过模拟有害微调轨迹生成一系列逐渐被污染的模型状态，并在此基础上优化一个可插拔的安全补丁，使其能在不同污染状态下恢复模型安全性，同时最大程度保留任务效用。

Result: 在六种基准测试和两种模型上，TRACE在安全性和效用的权衡上均显著优于现有方法，实现接近100%的安全性，且任务性能几乎不受影响。

Conclusion: TRACE通过轨迹驱动的离线补丁学习，有效解决了任务-安全更新纠缠问题，实现了高安全性与高效用的协同保障，为大模型微调服务中的安全对齐提供了一种高效可行的解决方案。

Abstract: Fine-Tuning-as-a-Service (FTaaS) platforms let users train large language models (LLMs) on customized tasks, but this pipeline could erode models' safety alignment. In practice, service providers need to recover models' safety without re-running full alignment, or destroying the utility gained from customized tasks. A line of existing work refers to model parameter merging, which adds a safety patch on the fine-tuned model parameters to shift the model away from unsafe tendencies. However, this merging-based paradigm is fundamentally bottlenecked by task-safety update entanglement: downstream task updates and the safety patch often overlap in their dominant directions, so the merge strength is intrinsically hard to calibrate. If the safety vector is scaled too weakly, harmful components could still dominate, preventing the model from returning to a safe region; if it is scaled too aggressively, it suppresses task-relevant directions and degrades utility.
  To solve this problem, we shift the focus of merging-based methods from designing online merging operators to offline patch learning, and seek a safety patch that minimally interferes with task-relevant directions while retaining decisive control over unsafe behaviors. We propose TRACE, a trajectory-based safety patch learning framework that (i) simulates harmful tuning trajectories to generate progressively corrupted states, and (ii) optimizes a plug-in patch to recover safety while maintaining utility across varying corrupted base states.
  Across six benchmarks and two models, TRACE consistently dominates the safety-utility frontier. TRACE reaches nearly 100% safety on all settings, while maintaining comparable utility to the undefended fine-tuned model.

</details>


### [265] [RobustMAD: Evaluating Real-World Robustness of Multimodal Small Language Models for Deployable Anomaly Detection Assistants](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16243)
*Anushiya Arunan,Xin Li,Yan Qin,U-Xuan Tan,Nhu Khue Vuong,Xiaoli Li,Chau Yuen*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出首个面向部署的多模态工业异常检测基准RobustMAD，旨在评估小型多模态语言模型（MSLMs）在真实工业场景下的鲁棒性。尽管顶级MSLMs表现出色，甚至超越GPT-5 Nano，但仍存在关键缺陷：对细粒度差异或视觉退化的多模态对齐脆弱、响应不全面、对无法回答问题逻辑基础薄弱导致幻觉。研究为下一代工业级多模态检测助手的设计提供了可操作指导。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有大型多模态模型因计算成本高和隐私风险难以在工厂现场部署；而小型模型虽具部署潜力，但缺乏全面的鲁棒性评估与贴近真实工业环境的挑战性基准，制约其发展。

Method: 构建RobustMAD基准，涵盖对象理解、异常检测、无答案问题及视觉质量退化等多样化开放问答任务，系统评估多种小型多模态语言模型的性能与鲁棒性。

Result: Top MSLMs表现优异，部分超越GPT-5 Nano，但在细粒度对齐、响应完整性、逻辑一致性方面仍存在显著缺陷，暴露出三类典型失败模式。

Conclusion: RobustMAD揭示了当前MSLMs在工业部署中的关键安全风险，强调需基于多模态对齐、逻辑推理与响应完整性设计下一代智能检测助手。代码已开源。

Abstract: Multimodal industrial anomaly inspection assistants are a critical component of next-generation smart factories, enabling interactive vision-language-based querying. However, multimodal large language models remain impractical for on-site deployment due to prohibitive computational demands and privacy risks from cloud-based inference. Compact multimodal small language models (MSLMs) offer a deployable alternative, yet progress is constrained by the lack of comprehensive robustness analyses and meaningfully challenging benchmarks that reflect real-world industrial conditions. To address this gap, we develop RobustMAD, the first deployment-motivated benchmark, designed to comprehensively evaluate model robustness through diverse open-ended queries spanning object understanding, anomaly detection, unanswerable problems, and visual quality degradations. Contrary to conventional assumptions, top-performing MSLMs exhibit promising capabilities, surprisingly outperforming even the larger GPT-5 Nano. However, they still fall short of safety-critical requirements, and RobustMAD reveals critical robustness gaps that pose operational risks. In particular, three recurring failure modes emerge: (i) fragile multimodal grounding under fine-grained distinctions or degraded visual conditions, (ii) insufficiently comprehensive responses, and (iii) weak logical grounding on unanswerable or ill-posed queries, leading to hallucinated outputs. Grounded in these insights, we provide actionable guidance for the design of next-generation multimodal industrial inspection assistants that leverage their promising competence. Code is available at https://github.com/en-research/RobustMAD.

</details>


### [266] [CIGPO: Contextual Information-Gain Policy Optimization for Multi-Turn Evidence-Reading LLM Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16244)
*Hao Dou*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究了在仅基于结果的强化学习中训练多轮证据阅读代理时出现的不稳定性问题，发现其根源在于中间轮次缺乏直接奖励，导致组相对优势消失，引发优化死锁。为此提出一种方差注入策略——通过为每一轮提供独立的奖励信号来维持奖励分布的多样性。具体采用上下文信息增益（CIGPO）方法，利用冻结参考模型对真实答案对数似然的边际提升作为逐轮奖励信号，并结合奖励归一化与信息增益权重课程，显著提升性能：在HotpotQA上达到0.518的标准F1（相比基线+105%），远超GRPO的最佳表现（0.430）和最终崩溃结果（0.000）。实验表明，保持奖励方差是避免零优势锁定的关键。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在仅基于结果的强化学习中，多轮证据阅读代理的训练因中间轮次无法获得直接奖励而导致优化不稳定，尤其在使用GRPO时易陷入零优势锁死状态，即所有轨迹均获得最低格式惩罚，导致组相对优势消失，政策梯度损失为零，形成优化死锁。

Method: 提出一种方差注入策略，通过为每个中间证据阅读轮次分配基于上下文信息增益（IG）的奖励信号，防止组奖励分布坍缩。具体使用冻结参考模型对真实答案对数似然的边际增长作为逐轮奖励，并引入独立归一化与信息增益权重课程机制以稳定训练过程。

Result: CIGPO在HotpotQA上实现0.518的标准F1得分，相比基线提升105%，显著优于最佳GRPO检查点（0.430）和最终崩溃的GRPO（0.000）。训练全程保持有意义的奖励方差，有效避免了零优势锁死现象。

Conclusion: 本研究揭示了仅基于结果的GRPO在多轮推理任务中存在奖励方差坍缩这一具体失效模式；证明通过引入逐轮信息增益奖励可有效缓解该问题，在HotpotQA任务中实现了更稳定且高性能的训练结果。

Abstract: Training multi-turn evidence-reading agents with outcome-only reinforcement learning is unstable because intermediate turns receive little direct credit. In HotpotQA experiments with Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct, GRPO initially improves (standard F1 0.430) but subsequently collapses to 100% format-violating outputs. Training-log diagnosis reveals a zero-advantage lock-in mechanism: all sampled trajectories receive the minimum format penalty (-2.0), group-relative advantages vanish, and the policy-gradient loss becomes zero--an optimization deadlock. We propose a variance-injection strategy: by assigning per-turn rewards to intermediate evidence-reading turns, we prevent the group reward distribution from collapsing to a single value--preserving the variation that GRPO's group-relative advantage requires. Contextual Information-Gain Policy Optimization (CIGPO) implements this strategy using the marginal increase in the frozen reference model's log-likelihood of the ground-truth answer as the per-turn signal. With separate normalization of IG and F1 rewards and an IG-weight curriculum, CIGPO reaches a standard F1 of 0.518 on HotpotQA at the 3B scale (from 0.252 base; +105%), compared with 0.430 for the best GRPO checkpoint and 0.000 for the final GRPO checkpoint. CIGPO maintains meaningful reward variance and avoids zero-advantage lock-in throughout training. These results identify reward-variance collapse as a concrete failure mode of outcome-only GRPO and show that turn-level IG rewards can prevent it in this HotpotQA setting.

</details>


### [267] [Learning Structural Manipulability in Gate-Level Netlists Using Graph Neural Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16245)
*Rupesh Raj Karn,Ozgur Sinanoglu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出一种基于拓扑的结构可操作性评分方法，通过路径参与度、k-core嵌入、对称性和中心性等指标，利用图神经网络（GNN）对门级网表中的节点进行结构灵活性建模。在ISCAS85和EPFL基准上的实验表明，层次化GNN模型能最一致地预测该评分，且组件级与消融分析揭示了各因素的贡献。案例研究显示，植入木马的电路展现出可统计区分的结构模式，证明该方法提供了互补的结构洞察。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法多依赖功能仿真来评估电路行为，但忽略了网表固有的结构特性对信号传播的影响。为弥补这一不足，本文旨在建立一种不依赖功能模拟、仅基于拓扑结构的节点级灵活性评估机制，以揭示电路内在的结构性可操作性。

Method: 将网表建模为有向图，引入路径参与度、k-core嵌入、对称性和中心性作为结构特征，构建节点级回归任务，并采用图神经网络（GNN）学习这些特征的综合评分。使用层次化GNN架构提升预测一致性，并通过组件级与消融分析量化各因素贡献。

Result: 实验结果表明，层次化GNN模型在多个未见电路中表现出最稳定的评分排序能力；案例研究表明，木马注入电路在结构上呈现出可被统计识别的异常模式，验证了该拓扑评分的有效性与判别力。

Conclusion: 基于拓扑的结构可操作性评分能够有效捕捉电路内部结构特性，提供独立于功能仿真的结构洞察，尤其在安全分析如木马检测中具有潜在应用价值。

Abstract: Gate-level netlists exhibit intrinsic structural properties that influence signal propagation independently of functional simulation. We define a topology-driven structural manipulability score that characterizes node-level structural flexibility using path participation, k-core embedding, symmetry, and centrality. Modeling netlists as directed graphs, we formulate node-level regression to learn this topology-derived score using graph neural networks (GNNs). Experiments on ISCAS85 and EPFL benchmarks evaluate how effectively different GNN architectures approximate this metric across held-out circuits, with hierarchical models yielding the most consistent rankings. Component-level and ablation analyses examine the contribution of individual factors. As an illustrative case study, analysis of Trojan-injected circuits using TrustHub templates reveals statistically distinguishable structural patterns, indicating that topology-based scoring provides complementary structural insight.

</details>


### [268] [Let the Data Decide: Supervision Analysis, Capability Trade-offs, and Adaptive Objective Routing in Continued Pre-Training via Off-Policy Distillation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16246)
*Jiangan Yuan,Zhixuan Li,Han Xu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该研究探讨了离策略蒸馏在大语言模型预训练中的作用，通过分解为目标-能力分析和数据-目标分析两个问题，揭示了语言建模目标（$L_{\mathrm{LM}}$）与知识蒸馏目标（$L_{\mathrm{KD}}$）在能力分布上的系统性差异，并指出其根源在于梯度层面的直接观测词强化与教师支持的替代监督之间的张力。研究引入支持覆盖率、观测词概率质量与教师分布集中度等诊断指标，发现支持大小$k$控制覆盖范围与精度的权衡，温度则调控支持内部的概率分配。此外，实验表明基于领域级别的目标路由（如对数学/代码用$L_{\mathrm{LM}}$，通用领域用$L_{\mathrm{KD}}$）优于单一目标基线，而基于词级概率或教师熵的路由未能持续超越。结论强调有效目标路由的关键不在于粒度，而在于路由信号的质量，将离策略蒸馏重构为一种数据条件化的结构化监督设计问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前离策略蒸馏在大语言模型预训练中占据核心地位，但训练数据、目标参数化与模型能力之间的交互机制尚不清晰。亟需理解不同目标如何影响模型能力，以及如何根据数据异质性合理选择目标，以优化训练效果。

Method: 通过分解问题为客观-能力分析与数据-目标分析，引入支持覆盖率、观测词概率质量、教师分布集中度等诊断指标，进行受控实验，评估不同支持大小$k$与温度对性能的影响；同时比较领域级与词级目标路由策略的效果。

Result: 语言建模目标与知识蒸馏目标导致不同的能力配置，其差异源于梯度层面的监督张力；支持大小$k$影响覆盖与精度权衡，温度调节支持内概率分配；领域级目标路由显著优于单目标基线，而词级路由无效；表明有效路由依赖于高质量的路由信号而非粒度。

Conclusion: 离策略蒸馏应被视作一种数据条件化的结构化监督设计问题，而非全局超参数选择。有效的目标路由关键在于路由信号的质量，而非粒度精细程度。

Abstract: Off-policy distillation is now central to large language model pre-training, yet how training data, objective parameterization, and model capabilities interact remains poorly characterized. We studies top-$k$-truncated, temperature-scaled off-policy distillation by decomposing this problem into two questions: an \emph{objective-to-capability} analysis of how the training objective shapes token-level supervision and downstream performance, and a \emph{data-to-objective} analysis of how data heterogeneity should inform objective routing. We first show that the language-modeling objective ($L_{\mathrm{LM}}$) and the knowledge-distillation objective ($L_{\mathrm{KD}}$) induce systematically different capability profiles, and trace this divergence to a gradient-level tension between \emph{direct observed-token reinforcement} and \emph{teacher-supported alternative supervision}. To quantify this tension, we introduce diagnostic metrics -- support coverage, observed-token probability mass, and teacher-distribution concentration -- and show via controlled sweeps that the support size $k$ governs a coverage-sharpness trade-off, while distillation temperature controls within-support probability allocation. We then examine adaptive objective routing: a domain-level policy that applies $L_{\mathrm{LM}}$ to math and code and $L_{\mathrm{KD}}$ to general-domain data yields consistent gains over both single-objective baselines, whereas token-level routing based on observed-token probability mass or teacher entropy fails to consistently match the single-objective baseline. These results suggest that effective objective routing depends less on routing granularity than on the quality of the routing signal, reframing continued pre-training via off-policy distillation as a structured, data-conditional supervision-design problem rather than a global hyperparameter choice.

</details>


### [269] [Self-Evolving Just-In-Time Memory for Proactive Embodied Safety](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16247)
*Bingrui Sima,Lizhong Wang,Xiaoya Lu,Kun He,Xiao Yang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出Self-Evolving Just-In-Time Memory框架，通过构建风险充分的拓扑信念图、基于代理的事实记忆和经验记忆，实现对动态危险的主动规避，而非依赖阻断性安全机制。该框架支持在测试时通过自动化测试-验证-写入循环持续优化缓解策略，显著提升任务安全性与进展效率，在IS-Bench基准上使多个视觉语言模型的安全成功率提升超30%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视觉语言模型在封闭回路交互中难以主动应对动态出现的危险，传统安全方法依赖运行时防护措施，导致任务停滞，存在安全与进度之间的权衡问题。

Method: 提出Self-Evolving Just-In-Time Memory框架，包含风险充分的拓扑信念图（RSG）用于持久状态追踪，Agency-Grounded Factual Memory用于精确危险预测，以及注入程序化元技能的经验记忆，配合自动化Test-Verify-Write循环实现在线知识迭代。

Result: 在IS-Bench上的实验表明，该框架显著提升了多种视觉语言模型（如Qwen3-VL-8B）的安全成功率（最高+30.3%），实现了无任务停滞的主动风险缓解。

Conclusion: 本研究将机器人安全从被动防御转向主动演化，通过可自我进化的记忆系统实现高效、可持续的安全执行，为智能体在复杂动态环境中的可靠部署提供了新范式。

Abstract: While Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have empowered embodied agents to execute complex household tasks, they struggle to proactively handle dynamically emerging hazards during closed-loop interactions. Existing safety approaches often rely on runtime guardrails to block unsafe actions or induce excessive caution, which severely stalls task progress instead of actively resolving the underlying risks. To break this safety-progress trade-off, we introduce the Self-Evolving Just-In-Time Memory framework, which reframes embodied safety from progress-stalling guardrails to proactive hazard mitigation. The framework consists of a Risk-Sufficient Topological Belief Graph (RSG) for persistent safety-relevant state tracking under partial observability, an Agency-Grounded Factual Memory for precise hazard anticipation, and an Experience Memory that injects procedural Meta-Skills to guide executable, progress-preserving mitigation. Furthermore, we propose an automated Test-Verify-Write loop, allowing agents to continually refine their mitigation Meta-Skills from execution traces at test time. Experiments on IS-Bench demonstrate that our framework substantially boosts the Safe-Success rate across multiple VLM backbones (e.g., +30.3% on Qwen3-VL-8B), enabling agents to proactively mitigate hazards without stalling task progress. Code is available at https://github.com/DyMessi/JIT-Memory.

</details>


### [270] [High-accuracy Low-Bit KV-Cache Quantization via Local Distribution Restoration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16248)
*Gradwell Dzikanyanga,Yanqi Pan,Weihao Yang,Donglei Wu,Wen Xia,Hao Huang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出DGAP方法，通过局部分布恢复技术解决低比特KV缓存量化导致的性能下降问题。不同于传统认为的logits绝对误差，作者发现根本原因是top-K区域的logits分布漂移（结构化局部误排序）。DGAP通过检测高风险步骤并仅对选中的top-K候选分布进行修复，在保持极低比特KV缓存占用的同时显著提升推理准确率。在Llama-3.1-8B上，将一比特量化下的RULER准确率从47.8%恢复至83.2%，同时将分布漂移从0.38降至0.14，并在多个主流模型上验证了其高效性与泛化能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有低比特KV缓存量化虽能降低内存和带宽开销，但严重损害模型推理质量，尤其是一比特量化导致准确率大幅下降。当前方法多关注logits的绝对误差，但实际瓶颈在于top-K区域的分布漂移，即局部排序错误，这限制了量化压缩的实用性。因此需要一种更精准、高效的修复机制，以实现高压缩比与高质量推理的平衡。

Method: 提出局部分布恢复（Local Distribution Restoration）机制，设计DGAP框架：利用量化后logits特征检测存在高局部分布风险的解码步骤；仅针对这些关键步骤，对top-K候选分布进行针对性修复（corrector），恢复其原始分布特性；采用轻量级风险检测器，确保低额外开销。该方法聚焦于分布结构而非单一值误差，实现精准干预。

Result: 在Llama-3.1-8B上，使用一比特KV缓存量化时，DGAP将RULER任务准确率从47.8%提升至83.2%，接近原始84.2%水平；分布漂移指标从0.38降至0.14；在多种模型（Llama、Mistral、Qwen）中均维持低比特缓存优势，且解码延迟增加可控。

Conclusion: DGAP通过识别并修复结构化局部误排序问题，有效克服了一比特KV缓存量化带来的精度损失，为长上下文大模型的高效推理提供了新范式——在极低内存开销下实现高质量推理，具有良好的通用性和实用性。

Abstract: Long-context large language model inference relies on the KV cache to avoid redundant attention computation, but incurs high memory and bandwidth overheads. Low-bit KV-cache quantization reduces this cost, yet it severely degrade quality; particularly, one-bit quantization reduces accuracy from 84.2% to 47.8% on Llama-3.1-8B under RULER.
  Rather than common beliefs that absolute error of logits, we find that the root cause is structured local misranking, where the distribution of logits in top-K region is drifted. We thereby propose local distribution restoration, a new technique that detects steps with high local distribution risk from quantized-logit features and restores only the selected top-K candidate distribution before token selection. We implement DGAP to achieve local distribution restoration, with efficient risk detcetors and correctors. Expeirments show that on Llama-3.1-8B, DGAP recovers K1V1 RULER accuracy from 47.8% to 83.2% and reduces distribution drift from 0.38 to 0.14; across Llama, Mistral, and Qwen models, it preserves the persistent low-bit KV-cache footprint with modest decode overhead.

</details>


### [271] [Benchmarking Machine Learning Models for Multi-Omics-Based Breast Cancer Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16250)
*Priyanka Paudel,Madan Baduwal*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本研究系统评估了多种经典机器学习模型在乳腺癌雌激素受体（ER）状态预测中的表现，利用TCGA-BRCA队列的转录组、基因组和蛋白质组数据。结果显示RNA表达数据提供最强预测信号，多组学整合带来小幅但稳定的性能提升。随机森林在多组学设置中表现最佳，平衡准确率达90.3%，ROC-AUC为97.1%。模型还反复识别出如ESR1、PGR等具有生物学意义的基因，验证了模型的有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: ER状态是乳腺癌诊断、预后和治疗选择的关键生物标志物。随着高通量测序技术的发展，多组学数据为计算预测提供了互补信息。然而，如何有效整合不同组学数据并选择合适的机器学习模型仍需系统评估。

Method: 采用分层训练-测试划分、分层五折交叉验证、类别不平衡处理及每折特定特征选择的严格实验框架，防止数据泄露。比较了随机森林、XGBoost、LightGBM、CatBoost、SVM和逻辑回归在单组学与多组学设置下的表现。

Result: RNA表达数据具有最强预测能力；多组学整合带来稳定但有限的性能提升；随机森林在多组学设置下表现最优，平衡准确率90.3%，ROC-AUC 97.1%；模型识别出多个已知与乳腺癌相关的生物标志基因。

Conclusion: 经过合理正则化的经典机器学习方法在小规模、高维度的基因组数据上依然高效，多组学整合可提供互补信息，有助于提升乳腺癌ER状态预测性能。

Abstract: Estrogen Receptor (ER) status is a critical biomarker in breast cancer diagnosis, prognosis, and treatment selection. Recent advances in high-throughput sequencing technologies have enabled the generation of multi-omics datasets that provide complementary molecular information for computational prediction tasks. This study presents a systematic benchmarking analysis of classical machine learning models for ER status prediction using transcriptomic (RNA expression), genomic (copy number variation; CNV), and proteomic (RPPA) data from the TCGA-BRCA cohort. A rigorous experimental framework incorporating stratified train-test splitting, stratified five-fold cross-validation, class imbalance handling, and fold-specific feature selection was employed to ensure reliable evaluation and prevent data leakage. Random Forest, XGBoost, LightGBM, CatBoost, Support Vector Machines (SVM), and Logistic Regression were evaluated across single-omic and multi-omic settings. Results demonstrated that RNA expression provided the strongest predictive signal, while multi-omic integration yielded modest but consistent improvements over individual modalities. Among all evaluated approaches, Random Forest achieved the best overall performance in the integrated multi-omic setting, obtaining a balanced accuracy of 90.3\% and an ROC-AUC of 97.1\%. Furthermore, recurrent selection of biologically relevant genes, including \textit{ESR1}, \textit{PGR}, \textit{FOXA1}, and \textit{GATA3}, supported the biological validity of the learned models. These findings indicate that carefully regularized classical machine learning methods remain highly effective for small, high-dimensional genomic datasets and that multi-omic integration provides complementary information for breast cancer ER status prediction.

</details>


### [272] [Learning Spatio-Temporal Foundation Models from Pure Synthetic Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16251)
*Yutong Feng,Shiyuan Piao,Yutong Xia,Xu Liu,Wenqi Fan,Fugee Tsung,See-Kiong Ng,Yuxuan Liang*

Main category: cs.LG
