Abstract: Marine biogeochemical forecasting is increasingly important for managing marine ecosystems and the carbon cycle, yet global, seasonal forecast products lag far behind physical oceanography, held back by the complexity of the processes involved and by data scarcity. We introduce BG4Sea, which to our knowledge is the first global, data-driven system to produce multivariate seasonal forecasts of the marine biogeochemical state. BG4Sea is a modular architecture with a column autoencoder that compresses the vertical column into a low-dimensional latent space, a latent forecaster propagates this representation forward in time, a surface-forcing conditioner that injects physical boundary information via Feature-wise Linear Modulation (FiLM), and a horizontal-coupling module that incorporates neighboring-column context through cross-attention. The model is trained and evaluated on the global ocean reanalysis BIORYS4 (NEMO/PISCES), and produces six-month forecasts at 1/4 degree, monthly resolution for dissolved chemistry, biology, and carbon-pool variables, outperforming persistence and climatology across most variables and lead times. We position BG4Sea as an interpretable baseline for future, more expressive approaches, and discuss predictability attribution to each component, alongside the model's structural limitations.

</details>


### [308] [The Anatomy of a Truth Direction: Knowledge-Dependent Dimensionality, a Relational Law, and a Convergent Category Geometry in Small Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16741)
*Francesco Karim Vicidomini*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该研究扩展了大语言模型中真理表征的普遍性框架，探讨了其维度与模型知识的关系、构建真理方向的架构组件及其混合特性。通过无训练方向探测和奇异值分解（SVD）分析，发现真理信号在行为已知的事实中集中于单一轴线，在知识较少或材料异质性较高时则变得分散；七次假说验证支持一维解读，并能无极性标签恢复原论文的极性方向（余弦相似度0.959）。在四模型跨家族分析中，发现注意力机制传播非自身生成的真理框架，前馈网络则对抗当前块的框架，而真正的峰值后衰减由SwiGLU值流因果驱动。类别级真理轴呈现语义符号排列，与词汇表面相反但在不同模型族间收敛（Mantel检验p=0.0009）。多尺度压力测试揭示类别方向符号不稳定，通过谱共识度量修复后，收敛性增强，且随知识限制程度提升（从+0.42增至+0.74），表明混合几何结构属于知识域而非架构本身。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 探究大语言模型中真理表征的维度依赖性、架构贡献及混合本质，以深化对模型内部语义表示的理解，尤其关注其是否受知识水平影响以及在不同架构中的稳定性与一致性。

Method: 采用无训练方向探测，基于隐藏状态最小对的SVD分析真理方向的维度；在单模型中验证知识依赖性，在多模型跨家族实验中分析注意力、前馈网络与SwiGLU流的作用；引入谱共识度量修复符号不稳定性，评估类别轴的语义排列与收敛性。

Result: 真理方向的维度随知识水平变化：高知识下为一维，低知识或高异质性下趋于分散；注意力传播非自身生成的真理框架，前馈网络对抗当前块框架，SwiGLU值流是峰值后衰减的因果来源；类别级真理轴具语义符号排列并跨模型族收敛；通过谱共识修复后，收敛强度随知识限制增强，从+0.42升至+0.74，表明几何混合特性由知识域决定而非架构。

Conclusion: 真理表征的几何结构并非由模型架构固有决定，而是根植于知识域——其维度、方向与混合方式均受模型所掌握知识的深度与范围调控，揭示了知识在塑造大模型语义空间中的核心作用。

Abstract: Bürger et al. (2024) demonstrated that truth representations in large language models are universal across statement polarity but reside within a multidimensional subspace. We extend that framework along three questions: how the dimensionality of the subspace depends on the model's knowledge, which architectural component builds the truth direction, and what the direction is a mixture of. In Part I (one model), a training-free directional probe derived from the SVD of hidden-state minimal pairs shows that the dimensionality of truth is knowledge-dependent: the signal is concentrated on a single axis for behaviorally known facts (held-out AUC 0.938) and becomes diffuse as knowledge decreases or material heterogeneity increases; seven falsification experiments sustain the one-dimensional reading, and the same decomposition recovers the supervised polarity direction of Bürger et al. at cosine 0.959 without polarity labels. In Part II (four base models, two families, pre-registered predictions), a relational law emerges: attention propagates truth frames it did not write, the feed-forward network opposes the frame of its current block, and the genuine post-peak decay is causally attributed on all four models to the SwiGLU value stream; per-category truth axes form a semantically signed arrangement that contradicts the lexical surface and converges across families (Mantel p = 0.0009). Stress tests at three scales (33 categories, 888 pairs per relation, six sampling seeds) expose a sign instability of the per-category orientation, repair it with a declared spectral consensus gauge, and sharpen the convergence into a knowledge-gated law, strengthening from +0.42 on dense mixed-knowledge material to +0.74 on knowledge-restricted categories: the geometry of the mixture belongs to the knowledge domain rather than to the architecture.

</details>


### [309] [Robust Losses from Univariate Base Functions for Noisy-Label Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16768)
*Peng Hu,Jianwei Ma*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一种从标量基函数构建鲁棒多类损失的一般框架，通过映射算子将基函数转化为多类损失，利用基函数的简单性质来表征损失的鲁棒性。提出了两种互补的构造方法：目标分离和二元归约，分别对应类间独立与类间依赖的设定。分析了对称性和非对称性条件，为噪声鲁棒损失设计提供了理论依据，并可生成对称损失作为现有归一化方法的补充。大量实验表明，所提损失在多种噪声设置下表现优异或具有竞争力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有鲁棒损失多直接设计于最终多类目标层面，难以系统表征和扩展其鲁棒性，缺乏统一的理论指导。

Method: 提出基于标量基函数的通用框架，通过定义映射算子将基函数转换为多类损失；设计两类构造方案（目标分离与二元归约），分别处理类间独立与依赖情形，并分析其对称/非对称性质，推导出噪声鲁棒性的充分条件。

Result: 所提损失在合成数据与真实世界噪声标签基准上均表现出色，在多种噪声环境下达到或优于现有方法。

Conclusion: 该框架为鲁棒多类损失的设计提供了一个系统化、可扩展且具有理论保障的新路径，同时支持对称损失的构造，推动了噪声标签学习的发展。

Abstract: Learning with noisy labels is a fundamental problem in training reliable deep neural networks. Robust loss functions provide a direct and effective way to mitigate the adverse effects of label noise. However, most existing robust losses are designed directly at the level of the final multiclass objective, which makes it difficult to systematically characterize and extend their robustness properties. In this paper, we propose a general framework that constructs robust multiclass losses from univariate base functions. By defining mapping operators from base functions to multiclass losses, the robustness of the induced losses can be characterized through simple properties of the base functions. We develop two complementary construction schemes, Target Separation and Binary Reduction, corresponding to inter-class independent and inter-class dependent formulations, respectively. For both schemes, we analyze their symmetry and asymmetry properties and derive corresponding sufficient conditions, which provide theoretical criteria for noise-robust loss design. The proposed framework also provides a new route to constructing symmetric losses, serving as a complement to normalization-based symmetric loss designs. Extensive experiments on synthetic and real-world noisy-label benchmarks demonstrate that the proposed losses achieve competitive or superior performance under various noise settings.

</details>


### [310] [On the Potential of Graph Neural Networks as Metamodels for Supply Chain Optimization: Dataset, Architectures, and Directions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16769)
*Tushar Lone,Neha Karanjkar*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文探讨了图神经网络（GNN）在供应链优化中的应用潜力，构建了一个大规模公开的供应链图数据集，并评估了GNN作为节点与网络级预测代理的性能，展示了其在拓扑梯度优化、快速设计空间探索和敏感性分析方面的前景。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统元模型无法同时处理结构和参数优化，而GNN具备跨拓扑泛化能力，为供应链这类复杂系统提供了一种新的建模可能性，但其在供应链中的应用尚未被充分探索。

Method: 通过程序生成供应链图数据集，结合SupplyNetPy仿真库获取输入参数与稳态性能指标；采用多种GNN架构进行节点与网络级预测，并对比其与仿真方法在精度-计算开销之间的权衡。

Result: 验证了GNN作为供应链系统代理的有效性，展现出在保持较高预测精度的同时显著降低计算成本的优势，为后续梯度优化、设计空间探索等方向提供了可行路径。

Conclusion: GNN为供应链系统的联合结构与参数优化提供了新范式，未来研究可聚焦于基于梯度的拓扑优化、高效设计探索及敏感性分析，具有广阔的应用前景。

Abstract: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) have emerged as a powerful, differentiable class of learning models for graph-structured systems. Their ability to generalize across topologies opens the prospect of a surrogate for combined structural and parametric optimization, which classical metamodels cannot offer. Supply chains are a natural target, yet the use of GNN surrogates for supply chain problems is largely unexplored. This paper lays the foundation, presents initial steps, and discusses key research directions. As a foundation, we formulate the problem and create a large public training dataset of programmatically generated supply chain graphs with input parameters and steady-state performance metrics obtained using our SupplyNetPy simulation library. As initial steps, we explore GNN architectures that work well as surrogates for node- and network-level predictions, and analyze their accuracy-compute trade-off against simulation. Most importantly, we outline the exciting directions this opens, namely gradient-based optimization over topology, fast design-space exploration, and sensitivity analysis.

</details>


### [311] [MultiLoReFT: Decoupling Shared and Modality-Specific Subspaces in Multimodal Learning via Low-Rank Representation Fine-Tuning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16789)
*Sana Tonekaboni,Viktoria Schuster,Caroline Uhler*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出MultiLoReFT，一种基于低秩适应的高效可扩展多模态学习微调框架，解决大规模对齐数据难获取和模态间信息纠缠问题，实现共享与特定模态信息的解耦，提升可解释性与控制能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现实世界中的感知与决策具有多模态特性，但训练多模态模型面临两大挑战：难以获取大规模对齐的多模态数据，以及现有表示中共享与特定模态信息纠缠，影响可解释性和可控性。

Method: 提出MultiLoReFT框架，将低秩适应扩展至多模态场景，学习可解释的投影子空间，实现共享信息与模态特异性信息的解耦。

Result: 在模拟和真实世界基准测试中，该方法生成的表示支持多模态预测，并能明确揭示共享与模态特异性信息在各模态间的分布情况。

Conclusion: MultiLoReFT提供了一种有效且可扩展的多模态学习方法，能够在不依赖大规模配对数据的情况下，实现信息解耦与可解释性增强，适用于多种实际应用场景。

Abstract: Real-world perception and decision making are inherently multimodal, integrating complementary signals across modalities. However, training multimodal models faces two main obstacles. First, collecting large-scale, well-aligned paired multimodal datasets is often impractical, making end-to-end multimodal training difficult. Second, existing multimodal representations frequently entangle information shared across modalities with modality-specific information, hindering interpretability and control. We introduce MultiLoReFT, an efficient and scalable low-rank representation fine-tuning framework for multimodal learning with pretrained unimodal models. MultiLoReFT extends low-rank adaptation to the multimodal setting and learns interpretable projection subspaces that decouple shared and modality-specific information. Across simulated and real-world benchmarks, it produces representations that support multimodal prediction while explicitly revealing how shared and modality-specific information is distributed across modalities.

</details>


### [312] [Value-Monotonicity Matters: A Concordance Loss for Deep Survival Prediction](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16802)
*Meixu Chen,Kai Wang,Jing Wang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种值单调的排序损失（SCL），用于深度生存模型的训练，以解决传统似然损失与C-index评估不一致的问题。在小样本、高删失率的肿瘤学数据集上，频繁计算C-index成本过高，而现有似然损失无法可靠反映排名性能。研究证明，所有严格合适的生存似然损失都存在损失下降但C-index不变的方向，导致损失值与性能脱钩。SCL通过近似1减去C-index（带温度参数），确保优化过程中损失值降低对应C-index提升，且与模型架构无关，线性模型下退化为凸生存排序支持向量机。在18个来自四种模态的数据集上的五折交叉验证中，SCL的C-index表现与标准似然损失相当，且为最优或接近最优；其损失值与C-index的相关性高达0.96–0.99，远优于似然损失的-0.03–0.53。校准性能（用综合Brier得分衡量）也相当。SCL提供了一个可靠的、可作为C-index替代指标的优化目标，特别适用于昂贵的端到端训练场景。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在小样本、高删失率的肿瘤学数据集上进行深度生存模型的端到端训练时，频繁计算C-index代价高昂，因此需要一个能可靠反映模型排序性能的损失函数。然而，当前广泛使用的似然损失（如Cox部分似然、离散时间负对数似然、DeepHit似然）与C-index之间存在不一致性，导致损失值不能有效指示实际排名性能，影响训练监控、早停和模型选择。

Method: 提出一种基于sigmoid的协变损失（Sigmoid Concordance Loss, SCL），其值近似于1减去C-index，通过温度参数控制逼近程度。该损失具有值单调性，即损失下降意味着C-index上升。对于线性模型，SCL等价于凸生存排序支持向量机。采用统一的五折交叉验证协议，在18个不同模态的数据集上进行评估。

Result: 在18个数据集上，SCL的C-index表现与标准似然损失相当，且为最优或在1个标准差内。损失值与C-index之间的秩相关系数为0.96–0.99，显著高于似然损失的-0.03–0.53。校准性能（集成Brier得分）相近。证明SCL是可靠的、可作为C-index代理的优化目标。

Conclusion: SCL是一种架构无关、值单调的生存模型损失函数，能够有效替代传统似然损失，尤其适用于小样本、高删失率数据下的端到端训练。其损失值可作为可信的性能信号，支持训练监控、早停和模型选择。

Abstract: Deep survival models are evaluated almost exclusively by the concordance index (C-index), yet they are commonly trained using likelihood objectives such as the Cox partial likelihood, discrete-time negative log-likelihood, and DeepHit likelihood. This mismatch is usually considered acceptable because the C-index can be recomputed on validation data during training. However, for end-to-end training of high-capacity encoders on small, heavily censored oncology cohorts, frequent C-index evaluation is computationally expensive, making the loss value itself an important signal for monitoring, early stopping, and model selection. We show that likelihood losses are unreliable for this purpose and propose a value-monotone concordance loss. We prove that every strictly proper survival likelihood admits directions where the loss decreases while the C-index remains unchanged, causing the loss value to decouple from ranking performance. We then study a sigmoid concordance loss (SCL), whose value approximates one minus the C-index up to a temperature term, ensuring that lower loss corresponds to higher C-index during optimization. The loss is architecture agnostic and reduces to a convex survival ranking support vector machine for linear models. Across eighteen datasets from four modalities using a unified five-fold cross-validation protocol, SCL achieves discrimination comparable to standard likelihood losses and is the best or within one standard deviation of the best C-index. Unlike likelihood losses, SCL maintains a strong correlation between loss value and C-index during training, with rank correlations of 0.96 to 0.99 compared with -0.03 to 0.53 for likelihood losses. Calibration measured by the integrated Brier score is comparable. SCL provides a value-monotone optimization objective whose value can serve as a reliable surrogate for the C-index during expensive end-to-end training.

</details>


### [313] [Interpretable Anomaly and Drift Detection with Gaussian Mixture Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16811)
*Behnam Asadi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文重新审视高斯混合模型（GMM）作为轻量级、可解释的异常检测工具，特别用于数据流中的分布漂移检测。通过三个明确的实用选择：1）使用贝叶斯信息准则自动选择成分数量，初始由k-means确定；2）基于正常数据拟合的GMM对观测值进行负对数似然评分，并用极值理论设定目标误报率阈值；3）将每个高斯分量视为一个“状态”，窗口中无法匹配任何状态的比例（未解释质量）作为漂移信号，且本身即为解释。在七个公开基准上对比了MMD、GMM-GMM散度等方法，GMM点检测性能与Isolation Forest等相当，但具有唯一可解释性；对于漂移检测，虽然MMD表现最强，但在新状态出现时，未解释质量指标能匹敌甚至超越MMD，而在仅权重变化时则如实失败。所有报警均可解释：异常点距离最近状态达3-10倍标准差，而正常点约1倍标准差。代码与实验已开源。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 开发一种既高效又可解释的异常检测与分布漂移检测方法，克服现有方法在可解释性与性能之间的权衡，尤其适用于需要透明决策的数据流场景。

Method: 采用GMM作为基础模型，通过BIC自动选择成分数（初始化k-means），使用负对数似然评分并结合极值理论设置阈值；将每个高斯分量定义为‘状态’，利用未解释质量（即窗口中不匹配任何状态的比例）作为漂移信号，实现对异常和漂移的双重可解释检测。

Result: 在七项基准测试中，该方法在点异常检测方面性能接近主流算法如Isolation Forest、LOF、One-Class SVM等，且具备唯一可解释性；在分布漂移检测中，未解释质量指标在新状态出现时表现优异，可媲美甚至优于MMD，而在纯重加权漂移时如实失败，展现出诚实的局限性。所有报警均提供直观解释：异常点远离其最近状态3-10σ，正常点约1σ。

Conclusion: GMM作为一种轻量级、可解释的工具，在异常检测和分布漂移检测中表现出良好性能，尤其在需要解释性的实际应用中具有显著优势。其核心创新在于将模型本身作为解释框架，使每一个报警都具备清晰的语义。代码与实验已公开，支持复现与推广。

Abstract: We revisit Gaussian Mixture Models (GMMs) as a lightweight, interpretable tool for anomaly detection and, in particular, for detecting distributional drift in data streams. We make three practical choices explicit and evaluate them on seven public benchmarks. First, the number of mixture components is selected automatically by the Bayesian Information Criterion, initialised by k-means, removing the need to fix it in advance. Second, individual observations are scored by their negative log-likelihood under a GMM fitted to normal data, with thresholds set at a target false-alarm rate using Extreme Value Theory. Third, the same interpretable model extends to distributional drift: each Gaussian component is a named "regime," and the fraction of a stream window that matches no regime -- its unexplained mass -- is a drift signal that is itself the explanation. We benchmark this against a model-free kernel two-sample test (Maximum Mean Discrepancy, MMD) and against two GMM-to-GMM divergences (a closed-form Cauchy-Schwarz divergence and a matching-based KL surrogate). Across seven benchmarks ranging from 3 to 64 dimensions and five random splits, the GMM point detector is competitive with -- though rarely more accurate than -- Isolation Forest, Local Outlier Factor, one-class SVM, ECOD, COPOD and an autoencoder, while uniquely yielding an interpretable model. For drift, MMD is the strongest pure detector, but the interpretable unexplained-mass statistic matches it when anomalies form novel regimes (and honestly fails, as MMD does not, when drift is a pure re-weighting of existing regimes). Every alarm is explainable: anomalies lie a median of 3-10 sigma outside their nearest regime vs. about 1 sigma for normal points, and a drift alarm reports the fraction of the window matching no known regime. All code and experiments are released.

</details>


### [314] [Persistent Sparse Autoencoders: Learning Feature Timescales in Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17117)
*Haoyan Luo,Mateo Espinosa Zarlenga,Mateja Jamnik*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Persistent Sparse Autoencoders (Persistent SAEs) extend standard SAEs by introducing persistence coefficients for features, enabling modeling of feature longevity across sequences. They maintain strong reconstruction quality while capturing diverse timescales—fast features detect local patterns, slow features encode persistent topic-level information. In a prompt-injection monitoring task, slow features retain detection signals over long contexts, demonstrating causal effectiveness. This enables better interpretation and monitoring of language models via persistent semantic representations.


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Standard sparse autoencoders (SAEs) process each token independently, missing cross-sequence information and failing to capture features that persist over time. This limits their ability to model long-term semantic dependencies in language. The motivation is to develop a method that can identify and track meaningful features across longer contexts.

Method: Persistent SAEs introduce a persistence coefficient for each learned feature, allowing the activation of a feature to decay slowly over time rather than reset per token. This is achieved by modifying the encoding mechanism to include a memory component that retains feature activations across sequence steps, with the persistence coefficient determining how long a feature remains active.

Result: Persistent SAEs achieve competitive reconstruction accuracy compared to standard SAEs. They successfully learn features with varying timescales: fast features act as local detectors, while slow features capture stable, high-level semantic content such as topics. In a prompt-injection detection case study, slow features maintain their signal integrity over long contexts and remain causally effective, indicating robustness and interpretability.

Conclusion: Persistent SAEs enable the discovery of persistent semantic representations in language models, offering new avenues for interpreting model behavior and monitoring for adversarial inputs. By modeling feature persistence, they provide a more dynamic and context-aware understanding of internal activations.

Abstract: Sparse autoencoders (SAEs) decompose language model activations into sparse features, but standard SAEs encode each token independently and do not expose information that persists across a sequence. We introduce Persistent Sparse Autoencoders (Persistent SAEs), which extend standard SAEs by learning a persistence coefficient for each feature, allowing the model to learn which features should persist and for how long. Our experiments show that they retain competitive reconstruction quality while learning a spectrum of feature timescales: fast features behave as locally interpretable detectors, whereas slow features concentrate topic-level information in a persistent state. Moreover, as shown in a prompt-injection monitoring case study, slow features preserve detection signals and remain causally effective over long contexts. These results suggest that Persistent SAEs open up new opportunities for interpreting and monitoring language models through persistent semantic representations.

</details>


### [315] [Honest Physical-Support Inference after Latent Dictionary Learning: Collision Singularities and Minimax Resolution](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16813)
*Guan-Ju Peng*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究在字典由潜在稀疏混合学习得到时，如何对活跃物理射线（即模符号的单位原子）进行推断。通过保留与稳健训练矩区域兼容的所有字典，对测试表示进行投影并置于置换不变的支持空间中，提出了一种新的置信对应关系，可报告跨片不明确、组内分辨但子项模糊或精细支持分辨的结果。该方法具有统计代价和决策论优势：残差块方向影响训练密度至立方阶，带来 $s^6$ 阶的信息量；其在高概率下保持训练条件下的测试覆盖性，分辨率由父级可检测性、测试时支持分离度及学习字典方向决定。在固定壳层情形下，投影豪斯多夫直径以最小最大最优速率 $s \wedge (\sqrt{N}s^2)^{-1}$ 收敛。此外，受限任务定理明确了系数不对称何时能通过测试复制补充训练信息，以及校准不确定性何时不可消除。整体框架实现诚实且自适应分辨率的支持声明，并指导训练与测试测量的分配。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统方法在字典已知假设下量化稀疏支持不确定性，但在字典由潜在稀疏混合学习时，该假设可能导致过度自信且依赖标签的结论。尤其当相干原子接近碰撞时，测试信号可能识别出活跃物理组，而训练数据无法区分组内具体射线。因此需要一种在字典学习后仍能可靠推断活跃物理射线的方法。

Method: 在固定维度高斯训练-测试实验中，保留所有与稳健训练矩区域兼容的字典；对测试表示在这些字典上进行投影，并将其映射到置换不变的支持空间；构建置信对应关系以评估支持结构的不确定性，从而实现对物理射线的合理推断。

Result: 所提方法能够实现高概率的条件测试覆盖，分辨率受父级可检测性、测试时支持分离度和学习字典方向的影响；在固定壳层情况下，投影豪斯多夫直径以最小最大最优速率收敛；同时揭示了在特定条件下测试复制可补充训练信息，而校准不确定性可能不可消除。

Conclusion: 本框架提供了诚实且自适应分辨率的支持推断，能够在字典学习后准确刻画活跃物理射线的不确定性，并为训练与测试资源的配置提供理论指导。

Abstract: Sparse-support uncertainty is usually quantified by treating the dictionary as known, an assumption that can produce overconfident, label-dependent conclusions when the dictionary is learned from latent sparse mixtures. Near collisions of coherent atoms, a test signal may identify the active physical group even though the training data cannot distinguish the physical rays within it.
  We develop inference for active physical rays, unit atoms modulo sign, after latent dictionary learning. In a fixed-dimensional Gaussian train-test experiment, we retain all dictionaries compatible with a robust training-moment region, profile the test representation over them, and project surviving configurations onto a permutation-invariant support space. The resulting confidence correspondence can report cross-sheet inconclusiveness, group resolution with child ambiguity, or fine-support resolution.
  We characterize both its statistical cost and decision-theoretic benefit. Residual block orientation first affects the latent training density at cubic order, yielding information of order $s^6$, where $s$ is the within-block collision scale. The correspondence provides high-probability-over-training conditional test coverage, with resolution governed separately by parent detectability, test-time support separation, and learned-dictionary orientation. In the resolved fixed-shell regime, its projective Hausdorff diameter contracts at the minimax-optimal rate $s \wedge (\sqrt{N}s^2)^{-1}$, up to constants. A restricted-task theorem further determines when coefficient asymmetry allows test replication to supplement training information and when calibration uncertainty remains irreducible. The framework thus yields honest, resolution-adaptive support statements and guides the allocation of training versus test measurements.

</details>


### [316] [DRNOISE: Benchmarking Deep Research Agents in Misleading Evidence Environments](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17291)
*Jun Nie,Zhiqin Yang,Zhenheng Tang,Yonggang Zhang,Xiaowen Chu,Xinmei Tian,Bo Han*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: DRNOISE 是一个包含 100 个任务的基准测试，用于评估深度研究代理在误导性证据干扰下的答案恢复能力。每个任务都有两个支持正确答案的间接记录链，而噪声条件则引入一个看似合理但提供矛盾答案的文档。结果显示，即使在清洁任务表现良好的代理中，这一干扰也导致准确率下降 66-88 个百分点。主要失败模式是验证惰性：代理虽检索到真实记录，却未完成证据链的整合与验证，转而依赖于表面合理的错误文档。通用验证提示可缓解问题，但无法完全解决。该设置对开放网络部署具有重要意义，强调可靠研究不仅需要信息检索与引用，更需主动整合和验证直接主张与底层证据。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有评估方法难以检验研究代理在存在看似合理但虚假文档的开放网络环境中是否仍能保持可靠的证据标准。特别当一个看似正常的错误文档提供通往冲突答案的捷径时，代理的行为值得深入考察。

Method: 提出 DRNOISE 基准测试，涵盖 100 个任务，每项任务包含两个支持正确答案的间接记录链；在噪声条件下，额外加入一个声称矛盾答案的可信文档。测试覆盖十类证据操作，通过对比清洁与噪声条件下的表现分析代理行为。

Result: 在具备良好清洁任务性能的代理中，引入单一误导文档导致准确率下降 66-88 个百分点。追踪分析表明，主要失败原因是验证惰性——代理检索到真实证据但未完成整合，转而采纳答案型错误文档。通用验证提示可部分缓解，但无法消除差距。

Conclusion: 在开放网络环境中，仅依赖检索和引用不足以确保研究可靠性。真正的深度研究必须包含对直接主张与底层证据的主动协调与验证，以抵御看似合理但误导性的信息干扰。

Abstract: Deep research agents increasingly operate over the open web, where relevant records coexist with redundant summaries, outdated reports, and misleading documents. Existing evaluations offer limited insight into whether agents preserve sound evidential standards when an ordinary-looking false document is deliberately seeded into a searchable environment and offers a direct shortcut to a conflicting answer. We introduce DRNOISE, a 100-task benchmark for answer recovery under misleading evidence. Each task has a unique gold answer supported by two corroborating indirect record chains; the paired noisy condition adds one plausible document that states a conflicting answer directly. The benchmark spans ten families of evidence operations. Across agents with strong clean-task performance, this single intervention causes 66-88 percentage-point accuracy drops. Trace analyses identify verification inertia as the dominant failure mode: agents often retrieve truthful records but stop before completing and reconciling the evidence chain, instead deferring to the answer-like document. Generic verification prompts reduce but do not close this gap. The setting is especially relevant to open-web deployment, where plausible falsehoods arrive through ordinary-looking pages rather than explicit attacks. Reliable deep research therefore requires more than retrieval and citation; it requires active reconciliation of direct claims with record-level evidence.

</details>


### [317] [First-Order Predictable but Pairwise Fragile: Local Task Adaptation in Trained Transformers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16821)
*Irina Piontkovskaia,Sergey Nikolenko*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该研究系统评估了多种基于微调的模型修改方法（如任务算术、顺序微调、激活引导、一阶随机搜索）在不同Transformer模型（82M-7B）上的局部近似性质，发现尽管单方向扰动在$10^{-2}$范围内具有可预测性，但成对更新的组合性与顺序敏感性在多数情况下表现脆弱。关键发现包括：损失变化在单方向上始终符合一阶预测；但多方向更新时存在显著的非加性效应，任务梯度子空间快速旋转，权重到表示空间的对应关系普遍不成立。其中，顺序依赖性的主导项为李括号项 $H_B\textbf{g}_A - H_A\textbf{g}_B$，其归一化预测在中位数上匹配良好（比例1.002），而失效阈值 $η^\dagger$ 在不同模型和任务间相差三个数量级。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法如任务算术和顺序微调等均依赖于对已训练模型的微小扰动，但缺乏对这些扰动在不同模型和任务下是否具备一致数学结构的系统评估。本文旨在建立统一测试框架，验证各类方法所依赖的局部近似假设在真实场景中的有效性，揭示其局限性。

Method: 构建统一测试框架，在多任务LoRA操作点上，针对9个规模从82M到7B的Transformer模型，测量8个关键性质（如一阶可预测性、更新组合性、梯度子空间稳定性、权重-表示对应性等）。使用预注册属性列表、阈值和测试集进行量化分析，并通过控制变量实验评估不同扰动方向与顺序的影响。

Result: 在单方向扰动下，损失变化高度符合一阶预测（投影至梯度方向），表明局部随机搜索有效；但在成对更新中，超过三分之一的（模型, 任务）组合出现顺序敏感性，且在$10^{-2}$以内即显现；任务梯度子空间在数十步内发生显著旋转；加性假设在多个模型（包括7B模型）上失败；无一模型满足全局权重-表示对应性标准。李括号项是顺序依赖性的主要来源，其预测与实测偏差极小（中位数比1.002），而失效尺度$η^\dagger$跨度达三数量级。

Conclusion: 尽管单方向扰动具有良好的局部可预测性，但多方向更新的组合性与顺序无关性在实践中普遍不成立。当前方法所依赖的局部线性假设在复杂场景中严重受限，尤其在高维任务空间和大模型中。未来工作需考虑非线性效应与动态结构建模，而非依赖静态梯度近似。

Abstract: Task arithmetic, sequential fine-tuning, activation steering, and first-order random search all operate through relatively small perturbations around an already trained checkpoint, and they rely on different local approximations: individual perturbations should be first-order predictable, task updates should compose with controlled interference, useful tangent structure should be stable and possible to estimate, and weight edits should have counterparts in representation space. We measure 8 such properties with the same harness around a multitask LoRA operating point, on 9 transformers (82M-7B), with a prospectively registered property list, thresholds, and test split. We find a shared one-direction validity window up to the tested scale $10^{-2}$, but no universal radius for pairwise composition or update ordering. Along individual directions, changes of the probe loss remain first-order predictable throughout the grid: a perturbation's effect on the loss is essentially its projection onto the gradient, which is also what makes local random search work. Pairwise structure, however, proves to be far more fragile: on over a third of the measured (model, task pair) combinations, two-update order sensitivity sets in strictly inside that window; task-gradient subspaces rotate within tens of steps; additivity under our fixed activation probe fails at full task-vector scale on several models, including both held-out 7B models; and no model median passes the registered global mean-vector weight-to-steering correspondence bar. For two sequential task-gradient steps, the leading order-dependent term is the Lie bracket $H_B\textbf{g}_A-H_A\textbf{g}_B$; its normalized prediction $c(η)=ηκ+O(η^2)$ tracks the measured defect at median ratio 1.002, while the onset scale $η^\dagger\approx0.10/κ$ spans three orders of magnitude across models and task pairs.

</details>


### [318] [WAR: Workload-Aware Rollouts for Synchronous Agentic Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17299)
*Ryan Xu,Atlas Zhao,David Bao,Frank Du*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: WAR 是一种工作负载感知的滚动生成系统，通过联合优化解码和调度，显著加速同步代理强化学习。在低负载下，利用无模型的后缀推测解码（SuffixDecoding）复用历史轨迹中的后缀模式以加速推理；在高负载下，则通过基于缓存局部性、轨迹进度和服务器负载的全局调度策略，减少冗余的键值缓存重新计算并缓解负载不平衡。该方法无需改变底层强化学习算法，即可在不同负载条件下实现稳定吞吐量提升，在低负载下提升1.4倍，高负载下最高达1.6倍。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 长时程滚动生成已成为代理强化学习中的主要系统瓶颈，随着代理与环境交互次数增加，轨迹长度迅速增长至数万标记，导致同步强化学习训练受滚动生成限制严重。需要一种能根据运行负载动态调整优化策略的系统来突破这一瓶颈。

Method: 提出WAR系统，结合解码层面的后缀复用（SuffixDecoding）与系统层面的缓存感知调度。在低负载时采用模型无关的后缀推测解码，避免引入额外模型和GPU竞争；在高负载时采用全局调度器，依据缓存局部性、轨迹进度和服务器负载分配请求，减少冗余计算和负载不均。

Result: WAR在低负载下将长上下文代理滚动生成吞吐量提升1.4倍，在高负载下提升最高达1.6倍，有效缓解了同步代理强化学习中的滚动瓶颈，为可扩展的长上下文代理训练提供了实用路径。

Conclusion: WAR通过工作负载自适应的解码与调度协同优化，成功解决了同步代理强化学习中的长时程滚动生成瓶颈，实现了跨负载场景下的高效性能提升，是迈向大规模长上下文智能体训练的关键进展。

Abstract: Long-horizon rollout generation has become the dominant systems bottleneck in agentic reinforcement learning (RL). As agents interact with environments over many turns, trajectories rapidly grow to tens of thousands of tokens, making synchronous RL training increasingly constrained by rollout. We propose WAR, a workload-aware rollout system that substantially accelerates synchronous agentic RL by jointly optimizing decoding and scheduling. WAR is built on a key observation: the optimal rollout optimization strategy depends on runtime load: (1) Under low load, WAR enables model-free speculative decoding with SuffixDecoding, which reuses suffix patterns from previously completed trajectories as speculative drafts for future rollouts. Unlike model-based drafters, SuffixDecoding introduces no additional draft model and avoids GPU contention with rollout generation. (2) Under high load, where saturated batched decoding leaves limited room for speculative speedup, WAR shifts the optimization focus to cache-aware scheduling. A global scheduler places requests across rollout replicas based on cache locality, trajectory progress and server load, reducing redundant KV-cache recomputation and mitigating load imbalance. By combining decoding-level suffix reuse with system-level rollout scheduling, WAR delivers robust throughput improvements across workload regimes without changing the underlying RL algorithm. WAR improves long-context agentic rollout throughput by 1.4x under low load and up to 1.6x under high load. These results show that WAR removes a major rollout bottleneck in synchronous agentic RL and provides a practical path toward scalable long-context agent training.

</details>


### [319] [Beyond Memory Leaderboards: Evaluating Scientific Memory as Budgeted Context Restoration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16848)
*Maksim Sheverev,David Finkelstein,Sergey Nikolenko*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出两个全文本科学记忆基准PAIM和PTr，评估八种记忆/检索系统在从完整科学论文中恢复证据的能力。结果表明，记忆排行榜的可解释性依赖于完整的评估协议（如数据摄入粒度、原始文本保留、检索预算等）。例如，PAIM上Graphiti表现优异但依赖大量上下文；控制预算后其优势消失。在PTr上，稀疏-密集混合检索是关键改进，显著提升多个系统性能。多评委与人类评估一致，表明LLM作为评判者具有可靠性和约1分的有效分辨率。作者主张科学记忆应以受预算和模态感知的上下文恢复方式评估，并开源数据集、工具链和代码以支持复现和未来研究。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有记忆基准主要关注对话或摘要，无法充分评估研究型LLM代理从完整科学论文中恢复证据的能力。因此需要更贴近真实科研场景的全文本科学记忆评估体系。

Method: 构建两个全文本科学记忆基准PAIM（81篇论文，66个问题）和PTr（252篇论文，98个问题），评估包括Theoria在内的八种记忆/检索系统，涵盖不同数据摄入粒度、原始文本保留策略、检索预算、检索模态、评分标准及裁判选择等变量，通过多评委与人类评估对比验证评判一致性。

Result: PAIM上Graphiti虽领先但依赖极高检索量，控制预算后优势消失；在PTr上，稀疏-密集混合检索显著提升性能，多个系统表现接近；多评委与人类评估高度一致，显示LLM作为评判者具备约1分有效分辨率。

Conclusion: 科学记忆评估应聚焦于受预算约束且模态感知的上下文恢复，而非无约束的架构排名。研究团队已开源数据集、工具链与代码，供社区复现与进一步研究。

Abstract: Long-term memory is becoming a core component of LLM agents, but most memory benchmarks evaluate conversations or compact summaries, while research agents need to restore evidence from full scientific papers. We introduce two full-text scientific-memory benchmarks, Public AI Memory (PAIM; 81 papers, 66 questions) and Public Transformers (PTr; 252 papers, 98 questions). We evaluate eight memory/retrieval systems, including our own proposed Theoria, plus a no-retrieval baseline. Our results show that memory leaderboards are not interpretable without the full protocol: ingestion granularity, raw-text preservation, retrieval budget, retrieval modality, rubric audit, and judge choice all affect the outcome. For example, on PAIM Graphiti wins convincingly but uses 2.6M characters of retrieved context per query, and after controlling for retrieval budget the lead disappears. On PTr, for the systems where BM25 retrieval can be added cleanly, the sparse-dense hybrid is the single most significant intervention: hybrid variants of Simple RAG, Mem0, and Theoria tie for the lead within 0.03 points. Multi-judge and human side-by-side calibration show that LLM-as-a-judge rankings are consistent across frontier judges and agree with human evaluation, with an effective resolution of roughly one point on a ten-point scale. We argue that scientific memory should be evaluated as budgeted, modality-aware context restoration rather than as an unconstrained architecture leaderboard, and we release the datasets, harness, raw outputs, judgments, and scripts to reproduce our results and serve as tools for such evaluation. Our code is available at http://gitlab.com/quantellence/research/scientific-recall-bench , and the datasets are available at http://huggingface.co/datasets/quantellence/srb-data .

</details>


### [320] [Abliteration Is Not a Scalpel: Off-Target Effects of Refusal Removal on Decision Disposition Across Model Families](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17427)
*Aleksander Fafuła*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该研究揭示了主流'去审查化'开源模型中通过权重删除拒绝指令（ablation）的手术并不干净。通过在波兰证券交易所60只股票的18周涨跌预测任务上对比基线与经删减模型的表现，发现删减后模型表现出系统性乐观倾向（Gemma+12.2pp，Qwen+7.4pp）、自我辩护更长、减少使用不确定性词汇，且对自信度的影响在不同模型家族中方向相反（Gemma变不自信，Qwen变更自信），表明同一操作可导致截然不同的行为变化。此外，研究还发现工具链中的污染源，如量化器不匹配和过时提示模板，暗示社区修改检查点的研究普遍存在技术偏差。因此，部署所谓'去审查化'模型等同于部署一个行为本质不同的决策者，而非原模型仅移除拒绝功能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有做法中，通过权重删除拒绝指令来实现'去审查化'模型，但其是否真正仅移除拒绝而保持其他属性不变尚不清楚。本研究旨在检验这种修改是否引入未预期的副作用，尤其关注其对模型决策行为、表达风格及自信度的影响。

Method: 采用21,600个不确定情境下的决策数据（波兰股市每周涨跌预测），固定所有变量（包括检查点、作者、服务栈、提示模板），仅让决策层模型差异（基线 vs. 删除拒绝指令后的模型）作为唯一变量。比较两个Mixture-of-Experts架构模型（Gemma-4-26B-A4B-it 和 Qwen3-30B-A3B-Instruct-2507）在删减前后的表现，使用周聚类自助法计算置信区间以评估统计显著性。同时进行溯源审计，排查工具链中的潜在污染源。

Result: 删减模型在多个维度上产生显著且一致的副作用：更乐观、更长的自我辩护、更少使用不确定性词汇；但在自信度表达上出现相反趋势（Gemma变不自信，Qwen变更自信），且两家族置信区间不重叠。经济表现未显示超额收益（非α，仅为β），说明优势源于市场周期而非模型能力提升。溯源发现两个独立污染通道，表明社区模型修改存在普遍工具链缺陷。

Conclusion: 权重删减并非清洁操作，它会系统性改变模型的行为特征，使'去审查化'模型成为与原模型本质不同的决策主体。部署此类模型时需警惕其隐含的偏见与行为变异，且当前社区模型研究常受工具链瑕疵影响，应加强透明性与验证机制。

Abstract: Abliteration - deleting a model's refusal direction from its weights - is the standard recipe behind popular "uncensored" open-weight models. We show the surgery is not clean. As a disposition probe we use 21,600 decisions under uncertainty - weekly up/down calls on 60 Warsaw Stock Exchange equities over 18 weeks, replayed through a frozen pipeline so the decision-layer model is the only variable. The task elicits no refusals at all, so any between-arm delta is pure side effect. Holding provenance constant (official BF16 checkpoints, a single abliteration author, an identical serving stack, one byte-identical frozen prompt), we compare base and abliterated arms of two Mixture-of-Experts families, Gemma-4-26B-A4B-it and Qwen3-30B-A3B-Instruct-2507. Three effects replicate across both families (weeks-clustered bootstrap CIs excluding zero): abliterated models are systematically more optimistic (+12.2 pp Gemma, +7.4 pp Qwen; the confirmed preregistered endpoint), justify themselves at greater length, and use fewer explicit uncertainty words in forced self-critiques (both exploratory). A fourth effect reverses sign: the same operation makes Gemma-abliterated less confident and Qwen-abliterated more (family CIs non-overlapping) - one weight surgery, opposite shifts in expressed confidence. Capability covariates rule out instruction-following degradation as the driver, and no arm shows economic skill: the apparent edge of abliterated arms is regime beta, not alpha. Our provenance audit also caught two independent contamination channels - a mismatched-quantizer pilot pair and a stale community chat template that silently mangled the rendered prompt - suggesting toolchain artifacts are the rule in studies of community-modified checkpoints. Whoever deploys an "uncensored" model as an agent is deploying a measurably different decision-maker, not the base model minus refusals.

</details>


### [321] [Principled Direction-Free Intrinsic Motivation through Model-Free Epistemic Free-Energy Estimators](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16858)
*Alireza Furutanpey,Schahram Dustdar*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一种新的内在奖励机制，基于无偏好期望自由能目标的创新贡献，旨在在高熵与低熵状态空间中均有效驱动探索。该方法通过最大化参数信息增益（即下一状态预期惊喜减去不可约噪声部分）来实现，仅在动态未解区域驱动探索，当动态被解析后则自动停止探索并引入对低方差转移的偏好，无需显式预测下一状态。结合伪计数、基于探测的方差惩罚和短时窗门控机制，确保奖励在时间窗口内保持平稳，从而支持稳定的贝尔曼算子、学习目标的明确边界及非参数估计器的条件一致收敛。从主动推断角度看，该方法在新颖性保留时为无偏好，全可观测下似然模糊消失，并引入非标准转移熵惩罚，最终在动态稳定区域自然实现惊喜最小化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统无监督强化学习中的内在动机常预设特定方向的惊喜，如惊喜最小化或最大化，但这些方法在混合不确定性环境中表现不佳。尤其在非平稳环境下，现有方法难以平衡探索与利用。因此需要一种不预设惊喜方向、可自适应于不同环境动态的内在信号。

Method: 提出基于偏好自由期望自由能的内在奖励，以参数信息增益为核心信号，结合伪计数提供认知价值，探测式惩罚捕捉随机性方差，短时窗门控保护有信息量的后续状态。所有奖励定义对象在时间窗口内冻结，保证贝尔曼算子的平稳性，并在混合性、平滑性、带宽与容量假设下建立非参数估计器的条件均匀集中结果。

Result: 实验表明，该方法在多种具有混合不确定性的环境中表现出色，能有效区分可解释的惊喜与不可约噪声，在动态未解区域持续驱动探索，一旦动态被解析则自然停止探索并倾向于低方差转移。同时，其内在奖励在时间窗口内保持平稳，支持稳定的学习过程和理论保障。

Conclusion: 参数信息增益作为内在奖励，是应对混合不确定性环境中探索与利用平衡的理想选择。它不仅在动态未解区域促进探索，还能在动态解析后自然转向稳定策略，且无需显式建模下一状态，具备良好的理论基础与实际性能。

Abstract: Across environments with mixed sources of uncertainty, unsupervised reinforcement learning requires intrinsic motivation that does not precommit to a particular direction of surprise. Surprise minimization is scoped by design to ``unstable'' environments. Prediction-error curiosity rewards total expected surprise, including irreducible noise. Bandit or mixture switching between surprise-minimizing and surprise-maximizing rewards reintroduces non-stationarity by construction. We propose a single intrinsic reward, stationary within each window, derived from the novelty contribution of a preference-free Expected Free Energy objective, expressed in reward-maximization form. Our claim is that parameter information gain, the expected surprise of the next state minus its irreducible part, is the appropriate intrinsic signal in both high-entropy and low-entropy components of the state space. Maximizing it seeks exactly the surprise the model can explain away. In regions of unresolved dynamics, this epistemic term drives exploration. As dynamics become resolved, the epistemic term vanishes, while an aleatoric penalty favors lower-variance transitions, all without fitting an explicit next-state predictor. A pseudocount supplies epistemic value, a probe-based penalty captures aleatoric variance, and a short-horizon gate protects informative successors. A window-based freeze of all reward-defining objects yields a stationary Bellman operator, explicit bounds on learning targets, and a conditional uniform-concentration result for the nonparametric estimators under mixing, smoothness, bandwidth, and capacity assumptions. In active-inference terms, the agent is preference-free where novelty is retained, standard likelihood ambiguity vanishes under full observability, a nonstandard transition-entropy penalty is added, and surprise minimization emerges in resolved regions of the state space.

</details>


### [322] [After the Euclidean Highway: Hyperbolic Expert AI as the Next Innovation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17513)
*Kwan Soo Shin,In Seok Kang,Munho Lee*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: HySAT提出仅在损失层使用双曲几何，避免了在可训练适配器中引入双曲结构导致的训练崩溃。通过六个专家级小语言模型的实验验证，证明损失层双曲化能保持稳定训练，且在多个部署场景中表现良好。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法在神经网络中引入双曲结构时，过度依赖全局弯曲，导致父-子结构被稀释，尤其在深层网络中问题更严重。同时，将双曲结构置于可训练适配器上会引发训练崩溃，但未明确为何如此。本文旨在解决‘如何放置双曲性’这一关键问题，而非简单决定‘多少双曲性’。

Method: 提出HySAT（Hyperbolic Structure-Aware Training），仅在损失层应用双曲几何，不改变网络其他部分的欧氏结构。通过构建六种专家级小语言模型（包括Llama 3.1和EXAONE 3.5）与四种适配器策略，在1800万样本数据集上进行训练，并通过四臂对照实验分离出保形不变量。理论部分包含三个命题与一个引理，证明损失层双曲化稳定性优于适配器层双曲化。

Result: 在18.0M样本、~317K优化步长下无NaN出现；十七次训练崩溃事件记录于Zenodo；四个模型已实际部署（一为面向消费者的实时系统），两个开源权重；实证与理论共同表明：仅在损失层使用双曲结构可实现稳定训练，而将双曲结构置于适配器层则导致训练失败。

Conclusion: 双曲结构的放置位置是训练稳定性的决定性因素。仅在损失层引入双曲几何（HySAT）可有效保留专家领域树状结构的几何特性，同时避免训练崩溃。该方法在多模型、多部署场景中均表现出卓越稳定性与实用性，揭示了双曲神经网络中‘位置即法则’的核心原则。

Abstract: Expert domains are trees; the Euclidean transformer is not, diluting parent-child structure exponentially at depth. The hyperbolic turn left one question unasked: not how much of a network to curve, but where curvature may touch the gradient. Placement is a law, not a knob: the same geometry on a trainable adapter collapses training (seventeen training collapses, ~220 GPU-hours), yet at the loss layer alone it trains without one -- this is HySAT (Hyperbolic Structure-Aware Training), hyperbolic losses at the loss layer only. Across six expert SLMs we constructed and deployed (Llama 3.1 and EXAONE 3.5; four adapter strategies; 18.0M-sample corpus; zero NaN over ~317K optimizer steps), a matched four-arm ablation isolates the preserved manifold invariant, and three propositions and a lemma prove why loss-only placement is stable where adapter-on-manifold is not. Four models are operationally deployed (one live, consumer-facing), two open-weight, with per-step traces and a seventeen-incident failure ledger on Zenodo (CC-BY-4.0).

</details>


### [323] [Bridging battery design and health assessment through virtual sensing and physics-informed learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16864)
*Wendi Guo,Søren Byg Vilsen,Daniel Ioan Stroe,Yaqi Li,Yicun Huang,Ashima Verma,Daniel Brandell*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种融合物理信息的学习框架，结合虚拟传感技术，从标准电池管理系统（BMS）数据中推断难以测量的电池设计参数（如固态扩散系数、电极厚度、离子浓度和颗粒尺寸），在多种快速充电策略和驾驶工况下显著提升寿命与轨迹预测精度。通过引入基于数字孪生的颗粒破裂机制作为软约束，仅使用2%早期数据即可将预测误差降低6-8倍，且无需完整解析控制方程，部分验证过的机理模型即可有效指导预测。该方法将常规充电信号转化为潜在设计变量，减少容量衰减误差达39%，寿命终点（EOL）误差下降17%，预测变异性降低54%，实现电池配置的实时探索，并建立运行与设计之间的反馈闭环，推动复杂多物理系统的设计优化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前锂离子电池在超充场景下的健康监测仍缺乏对材料与结构老化根源的理解，导致健康评估不可解释且难以指导电池设计。尤其在车辆到电网等双向能量流动应用中，亟需更智能、可解释的电池管理方法。

Method: 提出一种物理信息学习框架，结合虚拟传感技术，利用数字孪生生成的颗粒破裂机制作为软约束，通过有限早期数据联合优化部分已验证的物理机理，从标准BMS信号中反演关键设计参数。

Result: 相比现有机器学习基线方法，该框架在寿命与轨迹预测上误差降低6-8倍；容量损失误差减少39%，EOL预测误差下降17%，预测变异性降低54%；支持实时电池配置探索，并构建了从实际运行到上游设计的反馈闭环。

Conclusion: 该框架实现了从可观测行为到内在老化过程的桥梁构建，证明即使不依赖完整控制方程，部分经验证的物理机制也能有效引导高精度预测，为电池健康管理与设计优化提供了可扩展、可解释的新范式。

Abstract: Supercharging of lithium-ion batteries (LiBs) requires robust health monitoring to ensure durability, safety, and user confidence, particularly for emerging vehicle-to-grid applications with bidirectional energy flows. Yet battery management remains largely disconnected from the material and structural origins of aging, limiting both interpretable health assessment and informed battery design. Here we propose a physics-informed learning framework with virtual sensing that infers hard-to-measure design parameters, including solid-state diffusion coefficient, electrode thickness, ion concentration, and particle size, directly from standard battery management system (BMS) measurements. Across diverse fast-charging strategies and driving profiles, embedding a digital-twin-derived particle-cracking mechanism as a soft constraint reduces trajectory and lifetime prediction errors by 6-8 times relative to state-of-the-art machine learning baselines using only 2% early-life observations. We further show that accurate degradation extrapolation does not require fully resolved governing equations; validated partial mechanisms, jointly refined with limited data, provide sufficient guidance. Virtual sensing transforms standard charging signals into latent design variables without additional sensors, bridging observable battery behavior and underlying aging processes while reducing capacity loss error by up to 39%, end-of-life (EOL) error by 17%, and prediction variability by up to 54%, enabling real-time exploration of new battery configurations. More broadly, the proposed framework establishes a practical feedback loop between deployment and development, demonstrating how real-world operation can continuously inform upstream design decisions across complex multiphysics systems.

</details>


### [324] [HyBDM: Multi-Scale Hybrid Experts for Time Series Forecasting with Bidirectional Dependency Modeling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16882)
*Wenqiang Ma,Chen Cheng,Xue Cheng,Jiarui Ye*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: HyBDM 是一种用于多变量时间序列预测的多尺度混合模型，通过分离全局模式和局部变化，并分别由专门的专家建模，有效捕捉长程全局依赖与短程局部变化。该模型结合了增强的 BiConv-Mamba 模块（用于全局模式）和局部窗口变换器（LWT，用于局部变化），并引入多尺度分块器与长短路由机制实现自适应融合。在六个基准数据集上的实验表明，HyBDM 在预测精度和计算效率上均优于现有先进方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有时间序列预测模型难以同时捕捉多变量时间序列中的长程全局模式和短程局部变化，且通常未能联合建模时间和特征维度的信息。因此，亟需一种能够协同处理全局与局部依赖的高效模型。

Method: 提出 HyBDM 模型，包含：1）全局模式专家，使用增强的 BiConv-Mamba 模块（融合双向卷积、M-SSM 层、遗忘机制和 GDD-MLP）进行跨通道建模；2）局部变化专家，采用局部窗口变换器（LWT）实现高效、低复杂度的局域注意力；3）多尺度分块器生成多分辨率表示；4）长-短路由机制实现两个专家输出的自适应融合。

Result: 在六个公开基准数据集上的实验结果表明，HyBDM 在预测准确率和计算效率方面均显著优于当前最先进的方法，证明其在建模全局-局部依赖关系方面的有效性。

Conclusion: HyBDM 通过分离并协同建模全局模式与局部变化，成功提升了多变量时间序列预测的性能，尤其在兼顾精度与效率方面表现出色，为未来时间序列建模提供了新思路。

Abstract: Time series forecasting (TSF) is vital to many applications, yet existing models often struggle to capture the heterogeneous long-range global patterns and short-range local variations in multivariate time series. While some approaches partially model these dependencies, they often do not jointly exploit temporal and feature-wise information. To address this challenge, we propose HyBDM, a multi-scale hybrid model that decomposes temporal dynamics into global patterns and local variations, which are modeled by two specialized experts. The Global Patterns Expert employs an enhanced BiConv-Mamba module that integrates bidirectional convolutions, an M-SSM layer, a forgetting mechanism, and a GDD-MLP module for cross-channel modeling. The Local Variations Expert uses a Local Window Transformer (LWT) to perform efficient locality-aware attention with reduced computational complexity. In addition, a Multi-Scale Patcher and a Long-Short Router enable multi-resolution representations and adaptive fusion of the two experts. Experiments on six benchmark datasets show that HyBDM outperforms state-of-the-art methods in both forecasting accuracy and computational efficiency, demonstrating its effectiveness in bridging global-local dependencies for multivariate TSF.

</details>


### [325] [Certified-Gap Dual-Price Policies for Real-Time Truckload Bid Acceptance with Relocating, Clock-Constrained Resources](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16891)
*Aswin Chandrasekaran*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究卡车承运商在秒级时间内决定接受或拒绝货运订单的动态决策问题，考虑车队状态、工作时间（HOS）限制和预约窗口。作者提出一种弱耦合动态规划模型，其中资源具有移动性和时钟机制；服务请求会改变卡车位置并消耗其时钟，能否服务取决于当前状态。传统基于占用率的可复用资源模型不适用此场景。研究构建了一个实时双价格策略，源自同一拉格朗日松弛问题的上界，策略与上界来自同一对象，因此每次运行都能提供经认证的最优性差距。证明了三点：第一，该证书对任意对偶变量、任意离散化和任意代理质量均有效；第二，策略中的同时间空间梯度规则等价于流体互补松弛，且在亚临界流体情形下渐近最优，拟合价格可在不同样本路径间移植，得益于线性规划基的稳定性；第三，证书存在局限：每类资源的拉格朗日松弛值可能在所有车队规模下保持远离零。通过一个三卡车核心实例展示了精确有理数证书，并提出复制引理。在包含30对种子的公开闭环基准测试中，该策略（无需蒙特卡洛回溯标签，仅需一次离线对偶求解）在三种情景中有两种优于经过回溯训练的代理模型（紧约束：+2.0个百分点，95%置信区间[+0.5, +3.6]，Wilcoxon p=0.023；宽松约束：+3.5个百分点，置信区间[+2.4, +4.5]），第三种持平。决策耗时仅0.04-0.09毫秒，比蒙特卡洛回溯教师快三个数量级。其证书在每个情景下的10个有界实例中稳定，达到最优的57%-64%，与1000倍慢的教师所证结果相差仅3-6点。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 卡车承运商必须在秒级内决定是否接受货运订单，受车队状态、工作时间（HOS）限制和预约窗口影响。现有基于占用率的可复用资源模型无法涵盖此类动态资源状态依赖的场景，亟需更精准的建模与实时决策方法。

Method: 提出弱耦合动态规划模型，引入资源移动性与时钟机制；采用拉格朗日松弛生成上界，并基于同一框架构建实时双价格策略；利用流体互补松弛理论证明渐近最优性；通过构造三卡车核心实例与复制引理分析证书极限；在公开基准测试中验证策略性能与证书稳定性。

Result: 所提双价格策略在公开闭环基准测试中，相较于回溯训练的代理模型，在两个场景中显著提升收益（+2.0和+3.5个百分点），第三个场景持平；决策速度达0.04-0.09毫秒，远超传统方法；证书在多个实例中稳定，接近教师模型所证最优性水平（57%-64%最优，差距3-6点）。

Conclusion: 该研究成功构建了一种高效、可认证的实时决策策略，适用于强状态依赖的货运调度问题。其理论保证与实证表现表明，基于拉格朗日松弛的双价格策略不仅具备极快的计算速度，还能提供稳定的最优性证书，在实际应用中具有显著优势。同时揭示了证书在某些情况下存在的理论局限，为未来研究提供了方向。

Abstract: A truckload carrier must accept or reject each load tender within seconds. The decision depends on fleet state, hours-of-service (HOS) clocks, and appointment windows. We model this as a weakly coupled dynamic program in which the resources relocate and carry clocks: serving a request moves the truck to a new market and depletes its clocks, and whether a truck can serve a request depends on its state. Occupancy-based reusable-resource models do not cover this setting. We build a real-time dual-price policy from the same Lagrangian relaxation that gives the problem's upper bound. Policy and bound come from one object, so every run reports a certified optimality gap. We prove three things. First, the certificate is valid for any duals, any discretization, and any surrogate quality. Second, the policy's same-time spatial-gradient rule is exactly fluid complementary slackness, and the policy is asymptotically optimal in the subcritical fluid regime; the fitted prices are also portable across sample paths, by linear-programming basis stability. Third, certificates have limits: per-resource Lagrangian slack can stay bounded away from zero at every fleet size. We exhibit a three-truck kernel with an exact rational certificate and a replication lemma. On a public closed-loop benchmark with thirty paired seeds, the policy -- which needs no rollout labels, only one offline dual solve -- beats a rollout-trained surrogate on two of three scenarios (tight: +2.0 pp, 95% CI [+0.5, +3.6], Wilcoxon p = 0.023; mild: +3.5 pp, CI [+2.4, +4.5]) and ties the third. It decides in 0.04-0.09 ms, three orders of magnitude faster than the Monte Carlo rollout teacher. Its certificates are stable across ten bounded instances per scenario, at 57-64% of optimal, within 3-6 points of what the 1000x-slower teacher certifies.

</details>


### [326] [PoLoRA: A Preconditioned Orthogonalized LoRA Optimizer](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17620)
*Nikhil Ghosh,Tetiana Parshakova,Robert M. Gower*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: PoLoRA 是一种新型优化器，专为低秩适应（LoRA）设计，通过结合产品感知的谱更新方向、基于损失变化控制的曲率预处理以及幅度规则，实现了比 Adam 更快的收敛速度和更低的学习率敏感性。在 1B 到 8B 参数模型上进行指令微调任务测试，PoLoRA 在 1.2-1.7 倍更少的训练步数内达到与 Adam 相当的性能，且每步开销增加不超过 3%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有优化器如 Adam 忽略 LoRA 的矩阵和乘积结构，而现有的矩阵感知或产品感知优化器未能持续优于 Adam。因此需要一种能充分利用 LoRA 结构特性的新优化器以实现稳定性能提升。

Method: PoLoRA 由三个核心组件构成：1）产品感知的谱更新方向；2）基于每样本损失变化控制的曲率预处理；3）控制因子和合并更新幅度的幅度规则。该方法旨在更高效地利用 LoRA 的低秩结构，同时保持数值稳定性。

Result: 在代码和数学领域的指令微调任务中，PoLoRA 在 1.2-1.7 倍更少的训练步数内达到与 Adam 相同的最终损失，且每步额外开销不超过 3%。此外，其最优学习率在不同秩下保持稳定，对学习率不敏感。

Conclusion: PoLoRA 通过融合结构感知的更新方向、曲率预处理和幅度控制，显著提升了 LoRA 微调效率，是目前最有效的 LoRA 优化方法之一，具备良好的泛化性和稳定性。

Abstract: Low-rank adaptation (LoRA) makes finetuning large language models cheaper by adding to each weight matrix a trainable low-rank update parameterized as the product of two matrices. These matrices are usually trained with Adam, which treats them as a single flat vector of parameters and ignores both the matrix and product structure of LoRA. Applying a matrix-aware optimizer such as Muon to each factor does not consistently improve over Adam, and neither do the product-aware Muon variants proposed in concurrent works. To realize consistent gains, we introduce PoLoRA, a Preconditioned Orthogonalized LoRA optimizer built from three ingredients: a product-aware spectral update direction, curvature preconditioning derived from controlling the per-sample loss change, and a magnitude rule that controls the sizes of both the factor and merged updates. We evaluate PoLoRA on instruction-tuning datasets for code and math across models from 1B to 8B parameters, and find that it reaches the final held-out loss achieved by tuned Adam in 1.2-1.7 times fewer steps, while adding at most 3% per-step overhead. Compared to Adam, PoLoRA is also less sensitive to the learning rate, and its optimal learning rate is stable across ranks.

</details>


### [327] [TVGL-CFM:Generating and Forecasting Time-Varying Trajectories of Dynamic Networks with Conditional Flow Matching](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16894)
*Om Roy,Yashar Moshfeghi,Keith Malcolm Smith*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: TVGL-CFM 是一种新型模型，能够学习时间变化网络轨迹的分布，实现生成和预测。通过将精度矩阵映射到平坦的对数欧几里得空间，利用条件流匹配模型进行高效建模与采样，确保生成矩阵的有效性。在脑电、混沌系统和基因表达数据上，该模型生成的轨迹保持真实数据的类别区分结构，并且在预测未来连接性方面优于基线方法。直接生成结构化的精度轨迹比先生成原始信号再估计连接性更准确。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法难以有效建模和生成复杂系统中随时间变化的网络结构，尤其是如何在保证矩阵有效性的同时实现高质量的轨迹生成与预测。传统方法通常先生成原始信号再估计连接性，但此过程可能丢失关键结构信息。因此需要一种能直接生成时间变化网络轨迹的模型。

Method: TVGL-CFM 采用时间变异性图形套索（TVGL）提取每时刻的稀疏精度矩阵；利用对数欧几里得坐标系将正定矩阵空间映射为平坦向量空间；在此空间中训练一个条件流匹配模型，以生成或预测网络轨迹；解码时保证输出始终为有效的精度矩阵。预测阶段从近期历史的粗略外推出发，仅需学习微小修正，提升效率与准确性。

Result: 在多种真实数据集（如EEG运动想象、混沌系统、基因表达）上，TVGL-CFM 生成的轨迹保留了类间区分特征，预测性能显著优于基于原始信号的基线模型。结果表明，直接生成结构化精度轨迹比间接方法更精确、更符合实际系统动态。

Conclusion: TVGL-CFM 提供了一种高效、可解释且准确的时间变化网络建模框架，适用于生成和预测复杂系统的动态结构，其核心优势在于直接在几何结构上建模并保持矩阵有效性，是优于传统间接方法的新范式。

Abstract: Many complex systems such as brain networks, financial markets, and gene-regulatory circuits are described not by a fixed graph but by one that changes over time. A standard way to summarise such structure at each instant is the sparse precision (inverse-covariance) matrix, and the time-varying graphical lasso (TVGL) turns a multivariate signal into a smooth chain of these matrices. We introduce TVGL-CFM, a single model that learns the distribution of such chains and can both generate new, realistic time-varying network trajectories for a given class and forecast how an observed trajectory will continue. Each precision matrix lives on a curved space of positive-definite matrices, but a log-Euclidean chart flattens an entire trajectory into an ordinary vector space, so a simple conditional flow-matching model can be trained and sampled there while every decoded matrix is guaranteed to be a valid precision matrix. For forecasting we start the flow not from noise but from a rough extrapolation of the recent history, so the model only has to learn a small correction. Across EEG motor-imagery, chaotic systems, and gene-expression data, TVGL-CFM generates trajectories that keep the class-discriminative structure of real data, and it forecasts future connectivity more accurately than raw-signal baselines. Generating the structured precision trajectory directly is therefore more faithful than generating raw signals and estimating connectivity afterwards.

</details>


### [328] [Mobius Learning: Cyclic Depth Folding in Transformers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.17843)
*Tongtian Zhu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Mobius Learning introduces cyclic depth folding in Transformer models, allowing block groups to serve both shallow and deep roles through shifted block orders across data streams. This depth-role superposition enables better performance with lower validation loss compared to fixed-order Transformers, even with more block-sequence passes. The design also reduces memory usage in distributed training by letting each worker store only one block group.


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: The conventional view ties a block's representational role (shallow or deep) strictly to its position in the sequence. This limits flexibility and efficiency, especially in distributed training. The authors aim to break this constraint by enabling blocks to simultaneously learn multiple roles through cyclic shifting of block order across data streams.

Method: Mobius Learning uses cyclic depth folding, where different data streams follow cyclically shifted block sequences. This causes the same block group to appear early in some streams and late in others, enabling it to be optimized for both shallow and deep representational roles. Training is performed using Muon on a modded GPT-2 small model with 2.5B FineWeb tokens.

Result: In four-worker experiments, Mobius Learning achieved lower validation loss than a fixed-order looped Transformer when the number of block-sequence passes increased. This demonstrates that blocks can effectively perform both shallow and deep roles without being restricted by their position.

Conclusion: Depth-role superposition via cyclic depth folding challenges the traditional notion that blocks must remain in fixed roles. Mobius Learning opens a new design space for Transformers, offering improved performance and significant advantages in memory-constrained distributed training.

Abstract: Transformer-based language models organize computation along an ordered depth axis, where shallow and deep blocks often develop distinct representational roles. We challenge the conventional view that these roles must remain tied to a block's position in the ordered sequence. We introduce Mobius Learning, a training architecture based on cyclic depth folding, in which different data streams follow cyclically shifted block orders. The same block group is therefore applied early in the block sequence for some data streams and late for others, so it is optimized in both shallow and deep roles, a phenomenon we call depth-role superposition. Surprisingly, in four-worker experiments with a modded GPT-2 small (124M) model trained on 2.5B FineWeb tokens using Muon, Mobius Learning achieves lower validation loss than a fixed-order looped Transformer at larger numbers of Transformer block-sequence passes. This counterintuitive result shows that a block group need not remain confined to one fixed shallow or deep role within the block sequence and opens a new design space based on cyclic depth folding. Crucially, this structure makes Mobius Learning particularly well suited to memory-constrained distributed training: raw training data remain local, while each worker stores one block group rather than the complete Transformer block stack.

</details>


### [329] [When Can Safe Controllers Adapt? Information before Commitment](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16895)
*Venkatesh Saligrama*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文研究安全自适应控制中的学习轨迹安全性，关注在保证安全的前提下，控制器能否通过数据区分不同模型。提出“预承诺信息”概念（基于KL散度），证明若预承诺信息有界，则无法避免与安全最优代理之间的固定差距；在某些系统中，这导致线性遗憾。同时给出了特殊情况下可恢复的条件及确定性线性高斯系统的半定上界证书。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在安全自适应控制中，需确保学习过程始终安全，但现有分析常假设持续激励以区分模型。本文质疑：安全约束是否允许此类信息丰富的实验？即，在备选模型仍可能成立时，控制器能否做出不可逆的安全决策？

Method: 引入‘预承诺信息’（precommitment information）作为衡量控制器在承诺前可获取的信息量，利用因果还原方法分析承诺行为对安全性和性能的影响，结合KL散度建模可见规律的差异，并在约束线性系统中进行理论推导。

Result: 预承诺信息有界时，必然存在不可消除的性能差距；若该差距为Ω(T)，则所有统一安全策略均产生线性遗憾。在特定条件下可实现性能恢复，并为线性高斯系统提供了半定上界证书。

Conclusion: 安全约束本身可能构成对有效学习的实质性障碍。即使控制器满足全局安全，其性能仍可能受限于不可规避的差距，尤其在缺乏足够信息支持承诺的情况下。此结果揭示了安全与学习效率之间的根本权衡。

Abstract: Safe adaptive control is online adaptation under a safety guarantee on the learning trajectory itself. The controller may use any causal, history-dependent rule and act differently across environments as data arrive. Only its safety guarantee is uniform: the same rule must satisfy it under every initially plausible model. Performance is measured against a safe oracle that knows the realized model. Many finite-time analyses assume persistent excitation of the uniformly safe closed loop, so the data distinguish every pair of models requiring different control decisions. Under that assumption, feasibility is already settled; only the rate remains. We ask instead: Do the safety constraints permit such an informative experiment at all?
  While an alternative remains plausible, the controller must preserve a safe continuation under it. We call the first action that forecloses such a continuation commitment. Chance safety allows commitment only on an event rare under the alternative, and the evidence must arrive beforehand: the observation generated by the committing action is too late. We define precommitment information as the KL divergence between learner-visible laws stopped before commitment.
  Our main result is a causal reduction. The commitment rule determines (1) the probability that safety permits commitment under the alternative, (2) the target-side cost of remaining noncommittal, (3) and the information available when the decision is made. Bounded precommitment information therefore leaves a fixed fraction of the oracle gap unavoidable. If the gap is Ω(T), every uniformly safe policy has linear regret. We establish the obstruction in a constrained linear system with quadratic regulation cost. We also prove recovery in special cases and derive semidefinite upper certificates for deterministic linear-Gaussian systems.

</details>


### [330] [MADA-RL: Multi-Agent Debate-Aware Reinforcement Learning for Parameter-Efficient Reasoning in Compact Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.18006)
*Martino M. L. Pulici,Cuong Xuan Chu,Evgeny Kharlamov,Zifeng Ding,Volker Tresp,Yunpu Ma*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: MADA-RL 是一种针对小型语言模型（≤4B 参数）的后训练框架，通过将模型分为生成器和批评者角色，并利用基于反事实批评优势的学习信号进行微调。该方法仅使用 LoRA 适配器微调少量参数，在五个数学推理基准上将 DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-1.5B 模型的准确率从 39.9% 提升至 41.9%，提升 2.0 个百分点，且仅需全微调方法 1/16 的可训练参数。其核心创新是动态的角色条件基线，使批评者专注于改进生成器共识而非简单复制正确答案，实现更精准的信用分配。部署时采用轻量级多轮协议，实验表明批评者能有效纠正生成错误，但性能仍略低于大规模训练的强基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 小型语言模型在数学推理任务中表现受限，而全量微调成本过高。现有方法难以在有限预算下有效提升小模型性能，亟需高效、低成本的后训练策略。

Method: 提出 MADA-RL 框架，将模型分为生成器与批评者角色，采用基于反事实批评优势的动态奖励机制，并结合 LoRA 适配器仅微调少量参数；部署时使用轻量级多轮辩论协议。

Result: 在五个数学推理基准上，模型准确率提升 2.0 个百分点（从 39.9% 到 41.9%），显著优于同类小模型方法，且仅使用 1/16 可训练参数，位于准确率-可训练参数帕累托前沿。控制实验显示批评者学习到纠错能力，而非模仿。

Conclusion: MADA-RL 为小型语言模型提供了一种高效、低成本的推理增强方案，通过角色分工与反事实奖励机制，显著提升性能并优化资源使用，虽尚未超越最大规模基线，但展示了良好的实用潜力。

Abstract: Large language models achieve strong reasoning performance, but often at prohibitive training cost - a challenge that is especially acute for compact models ($\leq 4 \, \mathrm{B}$ parameters) trained under limited budgets. We introduce MADA-RL, a post-training framework that specializes compact models into generator and critic roles and trains them with a debate-aware learning signal, fine-tuning only a small subset of parameters via LoRA adapters. Our central contribution is a counterfactual critic advantage: a dynamic, role-conditioned baseline that redefines the critic's advantage as its reward minus the generator ensemble's per-instance accuracy. This explicitly optimizes critics to improve over generator consensus rather than to merely reproduce a correct answer, yielding more targeted credit assignment than static mean-reward normalization. At deployment, the specialized agents are composed in a lightweight multi-round protocol. Across five mathematical reasoning benchmarks, MADA-RL raises the accuracy of the DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-1.5B model from $39.9 \, \%$ to $41.9 \, \%$ ($+2.0$ points, $p < 0.001$) using $16$ times fewer trainable parameters than fully fine-tuned baselines, placing it on the accuracy-trainable-parameter Pareto front. It approaches, but does not surpass, the strongest baselines (DeepScaleR, STILL-3), which are trained on substantially larger datasets; we analyse this gap and the associated inference-time cost directly. A controlled study isolates the source of MADA-RL's gains: the counterfactual advantage produces the highest critic improvement rate of any model evaluated, indicating that trained critics learn to correct generator errors rather than to imitate them.

</details>


### [331] [Enhancing Personalized Bladder Cancer Treatment Through Reinforcement Learning: A Recurrent Patient State Transition Decision Support Framework](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16916)
*Divyansh Chawla,Anshu Garg,Isshaan Singh*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本文提出一种用于膀胱癌治疗规划的循环患者状态转移模拟框架，结合预测性状态转移模型、马尔可夫决策过程（MDP）和深度Q网络（DQN）强化学习，实现动态、个体化的治疗决策。通过模拟患者轨迹并优化治疗序列，该框架在累积奖励、训练损失和策略改进方面均优于现有方法，展现出在个性化癌症治疗中的潜力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统临床决策支持系统依赖静态指南或单步预测模型，难以捕捉复发性膀胱癌随时间演变的疾病进展，亟需更动态、自适应的治疗规划工具。

Method: 构建基于预测性状态转移模型与深度Q网络（DQN）强化学习的马尔可夫决策过程（MDP）框架，通过模拟患者状态演化并优化治疗序列，实现动态、个体化治疗决策。

Result: 框架在模拟环境中实现累积奖励63,918.87，平均每回合训练损失0.0056，策略改进率达6.62%，表现出优异的序列学习与治疗优化能力。

Conclusion: 该循环状态转移模拟框架为个性化膀胱癌治疗提供了灵活且可解释的决策支持，具备推动人工智能辅助精准肿瘤学发展的潜力。

Abstract: Bladder cancer treatment requires personalized and adaptive decision-making, particularly for recurrent disease, where treatment effectiveness changes across successive clinical episodes. Conventional clinical decision support systems typically rely on static treatment guidelines or single-step predictive models, limiting their ability to capture disease progression over time. This paper presents a recurrent patient state-transition simulation framework for bladder cancer treatment planning that integrates predictive state-transition modeling with a Markov Decision Process (MDP) and a Deep Q-Network (DQN) reinforcement learning environment. The predictive module estimates changes in tumor characteristics following treatment, while the reinforcement learning agent sequentially optimizes treatment decisions by interacting with simulated patient trajectories. This framework enables dynamic, patient-specific treatment planning by continuously adapting recommendations to evolving clinical states. It also generates interpretable treatment trajectories and detailed simulation logs to improve transparency and support clinical decision-making. The proposed framework was evaluated against existing reinforcement learning-based treatment planning approaches. It achieved a cumulative reward of 63,918.87, an average training loss per episode of 0.0056, and a policy improvement score of 6.62%, demonstrating effective sequential learning and robust treatment optimization in a simulated recurrent treatment environment. These findings highlight the potential of recurrent patient state-transition simulation with reinforcement learning as a flexible decision-support framework for personalized bladder cancer treatment planning and AI-assisted precision oncology.

</details>


### [332] [L1 Augmented Attention as an Improved Vector Similarity Metric](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.18027)
*Kurt Godden*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出L1增强注意力机制，通过在点积注意力中引入学习的头特定L1距离来改进相似性度量，结合方向对齐与坐标偏差惩罚，提升Transformer模型性能。通过低维子空间投影降低计算开销，在WikiText 2上实现最高14.5%的困惑度下降，优于RBF L2核，且具有良好的并行效率和几何解释性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统点积注意力同时融合方向对齐和向量幅值信息，限制了其作为相似性度量的有效性。为更精确地建模语义相似性，需分离或补充几何信息。

Method: 提出L1增强注意力：在点积分数中减去查询与键之间的学习型头特定L1距离，以捕捉坐标偏差信息；通过低维子空间投影减少L1计算成本，并使参数专用于保留关键结构。

Result: 在紧凑Transformer模型上，于WikiText 2数据集上实现最高14.5%的困惑度降低，优于原始Transformer和基于RBF的L2核方法；分析显示不同层与头具有不同的几何角色和强专业化特征。

Conclusion: L1增强注意力通过引入几何感知的相似性度量，为现代语言模型中的注意力机制提供了原则性且有效的改进，兼具准确性提升与计算效率优势。

Abstract: Scaled dot product attention conflates directional alignment and vector magnitude, limiting its effectiveness as a similarity metric in Transformer models. We introduce L1 augmented attention, a simple and computationally parallelizable modification that subtracts a learned, head specific L1 distance between queries and keys from the dot product score. This hybrid similarity captures complementary geometric information. Dot product rewards directional alignment, while L1 penalizes coordinate deviations. To reduce the cost of L1 computation, we project queries and keys into low dimensional subspaces whose parameters specialize to preserve informative L1 structure. Evaluated on WikiText 2 using a compact transformer, L1 augmented attention achieves up to a 14.5% reduction in perplexity over the original transformer baseline and outperforms an RBF L2 kernel. Analysis of norm variance and learned L1 weights reveals distinct geometric roles across layers and strong head level specialization. These results demonstrate that enriching attention with L1 geometry provides a principled and effective improvement to similarity computation in modern language models, with practical benefits for both accuracy and parallel efficiency.

</details>


### [333] [Investigation of Polycystic Ovary Syndrome (PCOS) Diagnosis Using Machine Learning Approaches](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16941)
*Al Zadid Sultan Bin Habib,Md Asif Bin Syed,Md. Ekramul Islam,Tanpia Tasnim*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 本研究提出一种基于机器学习的数据驱动方法，结合特征工程与多种特征选择算法，用于多囊卵巢综合征（PCOS）的早期诊断。通过对比CatBoost、XGBoost、LGBM、AdaBoost和随机森林（RF）等模型，发现采用随机森林特征重要性与最高相关性（HC）筛选出的10个特征时，AdaBoost模型达到最高测试准确率，表明该方法在PCOS预测中具有优异性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统PCOS诊断依赖临床评估、病史、体格检查和实验室检测，但这些方法耗时、耗资源且成本高。随着医疗数据的积累，利用数据驱动的机器学习技术实现更早、更高效的PCOS诊断成为可能，因此本研究旨在探索高效、准确的机器学习模型以提升诊断效率。

Method: 本研究采用特征工程与多种机器学习算法相结合的方法，包括特征选择（基于随机森林特征重要性和最高相关性）、模型训练（使用CatBoost、XGBoost、LGBM、AdaBoost、RF），并通过交叉验证评估模型性能，最终选取表现最优的组合进行分析。

Result: 实验结果表明，采用随机森林特征重要性与最高相关性（HC）选出的10个特征，配合AdaBoost模型，在测试集上取得了最高的准确率，优于其他模型组合。

Conclusion: 所提出的基于特征选择与AdaBoost模型的PCOS诊断方法在准确性方面表现最佳，证明了数据驱动方法在疾病早期预测中的有效性，具备临床应用潜力。

Abstract: Polycystic Ovarian Syndrome (PCOS) is a widespread hormone problem for women of childbearing age. Women with PCOS may not ovulate; they might have high levels of androgens and have many small cysts on the ovaries. It can cause missed or irregular menstrual periods, excess hair growth, acne, infertility, and weight gain. Machine Learning (ML) can effectively diagnose this disease at an earlier stage as tons of medical data are available now. Traditional approaches to detect PCOS encompass a combination of clinical evaluation, medical history assessment, physical examination, and laboratory tests. These approaches aim to identify the characteristic symptoms and hormonal imbalances associated with PCOS. Physical examination requires good resources and costs time and money. In recent times, data-driven techniques have substantially advanced disease prediction within the medical field. We aim to utilize ML approaches, incorporating unique feature selection algorithms, to predict PCOS. This paper introduces a data-driven approach to PCOS diagnosis, combining Feature Engineering and ML. Several feature selection approaches have been considered to select sets of features for training the ML model, including CatBoost, Extreme Gradient Boosting (XGBoost), Light Gradient Boosting Machine (LGBM), AdaBoost, Random Forest (RF). Results demonstrate that AdaBoost, with ten features selected by RF Feature Importance and Highest Correlation (HC), provides the highest test accuracy.

</details>


### [334] [CADENCE: Closing the Reasoning Gap via Coverage-Adaptive On-Policy Distillation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16955)
*Satyam Kumar,Saurabh Jha*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: CADENCE提出一种统一框架，解决 on-policy 知识蒸馏中的三大失效模式：冷启动崩溃、状态无关的发散调度和二元奖励稀疏性。通过 DRIFT 机制实现逐令牌的前向/反向 KL 混合，并结合 COVA、FTB、CCD、LAP、EMR、BSD 六个组件优化训练过程。在 GSM8K 和 MATH-500 上，使用单台 Mac Studio 即可将 0.5B 学生模型性能提升至 69.8%（闭合教师差距 63.2%），3B 教师下达 72.1%，显著优于基线方法，证明了高效蒸馏无需数据中心级硬件。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有 on-policy 知识蒸馏方法存在冷启动崩溃、状态无关的发散调度和二元奖励稀疏性三大问题，导致学生模型难以有效学习教师推理过程，限制了小模型在复杂推理任务上的表现。

Method: 提出 CADENCE 框架，核心为 DRIFT 机制，通过逐令牌的前向与反向 KL 混合来动态调整损失；引入 COVA 实现覆盖自适应的 β 调度，FTB 增强高熵位置梯度，CCD 提供数值接近的局部奖励，LAP 强化简洁正确轨迹，EMR 进行熵匹配校准，BSD 实现自蒸馏，协同优化学习过程。

Result: 在 GSM8K 与 MATH-500 数据集上，0.5B 学生模型达到 69.8±0.5% 的 pass@1，3B 教师下达 72.1±0.4%，较最强基线提升 +4.4±0.7 分点，且所有实验仅需一台 Apple Mac Studio，验证了高效蒸馏的可行性与优越性。

Conclusion: CADENCE 通过系统性解决关键失败模式，实现了高性能、低成本的知识蒸馏，使小型模型在复杂推理任务中接近大模型表现，且无需依赖大规模计算资源。

Abstract: On-policy knowledge distillation transfers reasoning from large teachers to compact students, but existing approaches suffer three compounding failure modes: (i) cold-start collapse, where a fresh student assigns near-zero mass to teacher-preferred tokens; (ii) state-agnostic divergence scheduling, where time-only forward/reverse-KL interpolation ignores the student's coverage state; and (iii) binary reward sparsity, where pass/fail signals discard information from partially correct traces.
  We present CADENCE, a unified framework with a targeted fix for each. Its DRIFT mechanism schedules a per-token convex mixture of forward-KL and reverse-KL surrogate objectives on student-sampled trajectories (per-token surrogates, not sequence-level KL gradient estimators). Six components extend it: (A) COVA, a coverage-adaptive $β$ schedule accelerating the forward-to-reverse transition; (B) FTB, a forking-token boost concentrating gradient at high-entropy positions via a globally-normalized entropy reference; (C) CCD, a dense reward adding numerical-proximity partial credit for incorrect-but-close traces; (D) LAP, brevity-preferential correct-rollout reinforcement; (E) EMR, an entropy-matching calibration regularizer; (F) BSD, a bootstrapped self-distillation phase.
  On GSM8K and MATH-500 (corrected 512-token protocol, 5 seeds, reported std), CADENCE distills a 0.5B student from a 1.5B teacher to 69.8 $\pm$ 0.5% GSM8K pass@1 (from 48.7% pretrained; 63.2% of the teacher gap closed) and to 72.1 $\pm$ 0.4% with a 3B teacher (76.2% closed), beating the strongest matched-compute label-using baseline (DRIFT+binary reward) by +4.4 $\pm$ 0.7 points. All experiments run on a single Apple Mac Studio (M-series, 64GB unified memory), showing principled distillation reaches strong reasoning quality without datacenter-scale hardware.

</details>


### [335] [LLM-as-a-Coach: Experiential Learning for Non-Verifiable Tasks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.18110)
*Tianzhu Ye,Li Dong,Guanheng Chen,He Zhu,Xun Wu,Shaohan Huang,Furu Wei*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出了一种名为经验学习（Experiential Learning, EL）的新方法，将语言模型作为裁判的评估反馈转化为语言模型作为教练的指导性知识，通过高带宽的文本反馈实现更精细的监督，提升在开放任务上的表现与泛化能力，并有效缓解奖励欺骗问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统强化学习在开放任务中使用标量奖励压缩了语言模型的丰富文本反馈，导致信息丢失和高质量响应之间的细微差异被忽略。需要一种能保留细粒度偏好并增强泛化能力的学习机制。

Method: 将LLM-as-a-Judge的反馈模型改造为LLM-as-a-Coach，将每条策略响应的评估转化为可转移的经验知识，通过上下文蒸馏方式内化至策略模型中，形成更高带宽的反馈通道。

Result: EL在多个策略家族和不同反馈源下均优于基于规则的强化学习，在未见任务上表现更优，具备更强的泛化能力且减少奖励黑客行为。

Conclusion: 经验知识作为一种更丰富、更具泛化性的学习信号，显著提升了后训练阶段对不可验证任务的学习效果，是未来非验证性任务学习的重要方向。

Abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) on open-ended tasks compresses an LLM's rubric-based evaluation into a scalar reward, discarding rich textual feedback and conflating responses with distinct quality profiles. We propose Experiential Learning (EL), which repurposes the feedback model from an LLM-as-a-Judge into an LLM-as-a-Coach. The coach distills its assessment of each on-policy response into transferable experiential knowledge, which conditions a teacher model and is internalized by the policy through on-policy context distillation. Compared with scalar rewards, this higher-bandwidth feedback channel provides dense supervision and preserves fine-grained preferences among high-quality responses. Across two policy families, with feedback from the policy itself or a proprietary model, EL consistently outperforms rubric-based RL on held-out and unseen open-ended tasks. Notably, EL generalizes better beyond the training distribution, and mitigates reward hacking. These findings establish experiential knowledge as a richer and more generalizable learning signal for post-training on non-verifiable tasks.

</details>


### [336] [SurvCF(t): Counterfactual Explanations for Survival Analysis in Predictive Maintenance Multivariate Time Series Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16969)
*Zara Karazian,Panagiotis Papapetrou,Sindri Magnússon,Erik Frisk,Tony Lindgren*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出SurvCF(t)框架，用于生成基于时间序列数据的生存模型的反事实解释，通过约束优化实现最小、合理且时间一致的改变，以提升预测寿命，已在多个基准和真实案例中验证其可操作性和可解释性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有深度生存模型虽预测性能强，但黑箱特性限制了在安全关键场景中的应用，缺乏可解释性与可行动干预支持。

Method: 将解释问题建模为结合有效性、接近性、稀疏性和合理性约束的优化问题，识别资产运行历史中最小且合理的改变以延长预测寿命。

Result: 在C-MAPSS、N-CMAPSS及Scania Component_X真实数据集上验证，SurvCF(t)能生成可操作且可解释的干预建议，有效连接预测与处方性维护。

Conclusion: SurvCF(t)填补了生存预测与可解释决策之间的空白，推动维护策略向可解释、面向决策的人工智能发展。

Abstract: Predictive maintenance relies on accurate Remaining Useful Life estimation, often formulated using survival analysis over multivariate time-series data. While modern deep survival models achieve strong predictive performance, their black-box nature limits their use in safety-critical settings where actionable insight is required. In this work, we introduce \textit{SurvCF(t)}, the first framework for generating counterfactual explanations for survival models operating on time-series data. \textit{SurvCF(t)} identifies minimal, plausible, and temporally consistent changes to an asset's operational history that increase its predicted life time, framing explanation as a constrained optimization problem combining validity, proximity, sparsity, and plausibility. We evaluate the method on multiple benchmarks, including C-MAPSS, N-CMAPSS, and a real-world case study of the Scania Component\_X dataset, demonstrating its ability to produce actionable and interpretable interventions. Our results show that \textit{SurvCF(t)} bridges the gap between survival prediction and prescriptive maintenance, enabling explainable and decision-oriented AI for maintenance strategies.

</details>


### [337] [TurboVec: A Case Study in Cost-Efficient Private Retrieval for Enterprise RAG via Codebook-Oblivious Quantization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.16973)
*Navnit Shukla,Kamal Pandey,Omsankar Tiwari*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: TurboVec 是一个基于 codebook-oblivious scalar quantizer TurboQuant 构建的开源向量索引，旨在解决 RAG 系统中向量检索层的两个关键问题：代码本泄露和租户隔离下的召回率下降。在 DBpedia OpenAI 嵌入基准上，4-bit TurboQuant 在相同内存预算下比训练过的 FAISS Product Quantization 提升 8.5-8.9 个百分点的 Recall@5，且优于 IVF-PQ 而无需训练，同时仅需 HNSW 的 1/4 到 1/8 内存。在 Snowpark 容器服务中，其查询延迟低至 11ms（10 万向量），远优于仓库暴力扫描的 707ms。通过内核级白名单过滤，其在多租户场景下保持 0.86-0.93 的 Recall@10，显著优于后处理过滤基线（0.09-0.19）。代码本无关设计将成员推断准确率降至接近随机水平（50.0%），相比 PQ 的 57.3% 显著提升隐私性。局限包括仅单数据集评估、与未压缩 HNSW 对比、以及隐私评估基于合成数据。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: RAG 系统在企业大模型应用中广泛应用，但其向量检索层存在两个未被充分研究的问题：一是训练过的代码本量化器可能在索引构建过程中暴露语料库统计信息，导致多租户部署中的信息泄露；二是事后过滤用于租户隔离会降低选择性查询的召回率。因此需要一种既安全又高效、无需依赖语料训练的向量索引方案。

Method: 提出 TurboQuant，一种 codebook-oblivious scalar quantizer，不依赖语料库训练，直接对原始向量进行标量量化。在此基础上构建 TurboVec 向量索引，结合 kernel-level allowlist filtering 实现租户隔离。采用 4-bit 量化，在保持高召回的同时大幅降低内存占用。

Result: 在 DBpedia OpenAI 嵌入基准（d=1536, 10 万至 99.9 万向量）上，4-bit TurboQuant 比 FAISS Product Quantization 在相同内存下提升 8.5-8.9 个百分点的 Recall@5；相较于 HNSW（R@5=0.991）和 IVF-PQ（R@5=0.840），TurboQuant 在更低内存（4-8倍）下实现更高召回率。在实际部署中，10 万向量下查询延迟仅为 11ms，对比仓库暴力扫描的 707ms。多租户场景下，kernel-level 过滤使 Recall@10 维持在 0.86-0.93，而 post-filter 基线仅为 0.09-0.19。成员推断准确率从 57.3% 降至 50.0%，表明更强的隐私保护能力。

Conclusion: TurboVec 通过 codebook-oblivious 量化设计，在无需语料库训练的前提下实现了高性能、高隐私性的向量检索，特别适用于多租户 RAG 场景。其在召回率、内存效率和安全性方面均优于现有方法，具备实际部署价值。

Abstract: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems increasingly power enterprise LLM applications, yet the vector retrieval layer introduces two underexplored challenges: (1) trained codebook quantizers may expose corpus statistics during index construction, creating a leakage channel in multi-tenant deployments, and (2) post-hoc filtering for tenant isolation degrades recall on selective queries. We study TurboVec, an open-source vector index built on TurboQuant - a codebook-oblivious scalar quantizer requiring no corpus-dependent training. On the DBpedia OpenAI embeddings benchmark (d=1536, 100K-999K vectors), TurboQuant 4-bit outperforms trained FAISS Product Quantization at the same memory budget by 8.5-8.9 percentage points in Recall@5 across all scales. Compared to HNSW (R@5=0.991) and IVF-PQ (R@5=0.840), TurboQuant occupies a distinct design point: higher recall than IVF-PQ without training, at 4-8x less memory than HNSW. Deployed on Snowpark Container Services, TurboVec achieves 11ms median query latency at 100K vectors versus 707ms for warehouse brute-force scan. Kernel-level allowlist filtering maintains 0.86-0.93 Recall@10 across 10-1000 tenant workloads versus 0.09-0.19 for post-filter baselines. Codebook-oblivious design reduces membership inference accuracy to near-random (50.0%) versus 57.3% for PQ codebooks. Limitations include single dataset evaluation, uncompressed HNSW comparison, and privacy evaluation on synthetic data only.

</details>


### [338] [Do Language Models Dream of Binding Molecules? Benchmarking LLMs under Spatial Constraints](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.18144)
